title: Enhanced crystal-melt segregation within dynamic mush systems links silicic cumulates with caldera-forming eruptions
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Supported by the mush model, the origin of crystal-poor, high-silica rhyolitic magmas (≥ 75 SiO₂ wt.%) is commonly linked to melt extraction in shallow, crystalline mushes, yet their complementary cumulates remain elusive in the upper crust. Here we present the “dynamic mush model” for the Campo Alegre-Corupá system (Brazil), combining textural analysis and thermodynamic modeling to show that high-silica melts formed through upper-crustal fractionation, leaving a granitic residue and feeding a caldera-forming eruption. Syenites and melasyenites represent their silicic-mafic cumulates, the syenites being formed at relatively low crystallinities (~16-33 of bulk vol.%) after extraction of large amounts of interstitial melts (~47-80 of liquid vol.%). In contrast to static models (extraction window ~50-70 vol.%), our results indicate early melt segregation in a dynamic reservoir. Alkali-feldspar crystals were size-selectively and hydraulically sorted by upward melt flow; aggregates were then formed at low crystallinities, supposedly via synneusis, enabling rapid sinking, and were repacked by recharge. This process, enhanced by relatively high magma fluxes, efficiently separated crystals from melt, explaining the origin of large-volume eruptible magmas in the upper crust. Our findings redefine mush evolution while underscoring the role of flow-driven crystal sorting (elutriation) in caldera-forming systems.
title_zh: 动态糊状系统内增强的晶体熔融分离将硅质堆积物与火山口形成的喷发联系起来
abstract_zh: 在糊状模型的支持下，贫晶体、高硅流纹质岩浆（≥ 75 SiO2 wt.%）的起源通常与浅层结晶糊状的熔体提取有关，但它们的互补堆积物在上地壳中仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们提出了坎波阿雷格里-科鲁帕系统（巴西）的“动态糊状模型”，结合结构分析和热力学模型，表明高硅熔体通过上地壳分馏形成，留下花岗岩残留物并为形成火山口的喷发提供动力。正长岩和黑长岩代表它们的硅质-镁铁质堆积物，在提取大量填隙熔体（约 47-80 液体体积%）后，正长岩以相对较低的结晶度（约 16-33 体积体积%）形成。与静态模型（提取窗口~50-70 vol.%）相比，我们的结果表明动态储层中存在早期熔体偏析。通过向上熔体流对碱长石晶体进行尺寸选择性和水力分选；然后，聚集体以低结晶度形成，据称是通过联结作用，实现快速下沉，并通过补给重新包装。这一过程在相对较高的岩浆通量的推动下，有效地将晶体从熔体中分离出来，解释了上地壳中大量喷发岩浆的起源。我们的研究结果重新定义了糊状物的演化，同时强调了流动驱动的晶体分选（淘析）在破火山口形成系统中的作用。

title: Production of aromatics from high density polyethylene over a hierarchical zeolite synthesised from steam-assisted crystallisation
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The conversion of high-density polyethylene wastes to aromatic feedstocks in noble-metal-free systems poses a significant challenge. Here, we report a steam-assisted synthesised zeolite (SA-HZSM-5) that can promote the conversion of high-density polyethylene to aromatics, achieving simultaneously high conversion and selectivity (85.4% and 49.2%, respectively) at 260 °C, outperforming noble metal-based catalysts, such as Ru-HZSM-5, under the same conditions. The produced aromatics predominantly consist of valuable monocyclic aromatics (circa 85%). The steam-assisted synthetic method endows a specific distribution of Lewis and Brønsted acid sites in SA-HZSM-5. In situ neutron diffraction and infrared spectroscopy, coupled with modelling, reveal a dual-site adsorption mechanism of mono-olefins intermediates, facilitating their transformation into dienes with suitable spaced double bonds, a feature that is crucial for the sequential cyclisation and dehydroaromatisation into aromatic compounds. This study underscores the potential of hierarchical zeolite materials for efficient upcycling of plastic wastes into chemical feedstocks.
title_zh: 在蒸汽辅助结晶合成的分级沸石上用高密度聚乙烯生产芳烃
abstract_zh: 在不含贵金属的系统中将高密度聚乙烯废物转化为芳烃原料提出了重大挑战。在这里，我们报道了一种蒸汽辅助合成沸石（SA-HZSM-5），它可以促进高密度聚乙烯转化为芳烃，在260℃下同时实现高转化率和选择性（分别为85.4％和49.2％），在相同条件下优于贵金属基催化剂，例如Ru-HZSM-5。生产的芳烃主要由有价值的单环芳烃组成（约 85%）。蒸汽辅助合成方法赋予 SA-HZSM-5 特定的路易斯和布朗斯台德酸位分布。原位中子衍射和红外光谱与建模相结合，揭示了单烯烃中间体的双位点吸附机制，促进其转化为具有适当间隔双键的二烯，这一特征对于顺序环化和脱氢芳构化为芳香族化合物至关重要。这项研究强调了分级沸石材料在将塑料废物有效升级为化学原料方面的潜力。

title: Harnessing interfacial click polymerization using pyridinium-yne films as photochromic, radical generation and sensing platforms
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Convenient and effective fabrication of free-standing organic polymer films with tunable properties is highly desirable towards visual sensing applications. Herein, we pioneered an innovative interfacial pyridinium-yne click polymerization strategy to in situ fabricate uniform, defect-free, and large-area films. Using pyridinium salt (HDPP-BF4) as an acceptor and tricarbonylbenzene activated alkyne (TFB-3EK) as a donor, a free-standing HDPP-TFB-BF4 film (Film #1) with precisely tunable thickness from tens to hundreds of nanometers was formed at the air-DMSO interface. Interestingly, Film #1 exhibited promising photochromism, showing a 100 nm hypsochromic shift and a 5-fold fluorescence enhancement under continuous UV irradiation, which induced the formation of a radical-based Film #2. Film #2 served as a portable visual sensing platform for gaseous ammonia, achieving a detection limit as low as 0.16 ppm, and was successfully applied as a colorimetric chart for seafood spoilage. Strategically, an anion exchange of Film #2 with TCNQ- yielded a fluorescence-silent Film #3, which enabled efficient detection and elimination of reactive oxygen species through turn-on fluorescence visualization. This work not only provides a straightforward approach for in situ fabricating versatile polymer films but also establishes a generalizable strategy for developing multi-responsive visualization systems through the rational molecular design and controlled polymer variability.
title_zh: 利用吡啶鎓-炔薄膜作为光致变色、自由基生成和传感平台的界面点击聚合
abstract_zh: 方便有效地制造具有可调特性的独立式有机聚合物薄膜对于视觉传感应用来说是非常理想的。在此，我们首创了一种创新的界面吡啶鎓-炔点击聚合策略，可原位制造均匀、无缺陷的大面积薄膜。使用吡啶鎓盐（HDPP-BF4）作为受体，三羰基苯活化炔烃（TFB-3EK）作为供体，在空气-DMSO界面形成厚度从数十纳米到数百纳米精确可调的独立式HDPP-TFB-BF4薄膜（薄膜#1）。有趣的是，薄膜 #1 表现出有前景的光致变色性，在连续紫外线照射下显示出 100 nm 的低色移和 5 倍的荧光增强，这诱导了基于自由基的薄膜 #2 的形成。薄膜 #2 作为气态氨的便携式视觉传感平台，检测限低至 0.16 ppm，并成功应用于海鲜腐败的比色图。从策略上讲，薄膜 #2 与 TCNQ- 进行阴离子交换，产生荧光沉默薄膜 #3，通过开启荧光可视化，能够有效检测和消除活性氧。这项工作不仅为原位制造多功能聚合物薄膜提供了一种简单的方法，而且还建立了通过合理的分子设计和受控的聚合物可变性开发多响应可视化系统的通用策略。

title: Plasmonic nanocomposite helices for weather-adaptive LiDAR function
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Reliable light detection and ranging (LiDAR) is often challenged by multiscale water droplets on protective covers, as macroscopic raindrops cause refraction and diffraction, while microscopic fog condensation scatters light, distorting returned signals. Here, we present a bioinspired strategy for multiscale droplet clearance using plasmonic nanocomposite helices that couple passive photothermal antifogging with pressure-stable hydrophobic water repellence. Inspired by penguin feather barbules, copper nanoparticles are embedded within three-dimensional silica nanohelices via glancing angle co-deposition. The copper nanoparticles provide visible-light plasmonic heating while preserving >85% transmittance at 905 nm, and the helical architecture imparts hierarchical roughness, yielding a 143° contact angle. Under 1 sun illumination, the surface shows a 9.3°C temperature rise, clearing condensation within 6 seconds. During natural rainfall (3-5 mm/h), LiDAR transmission through the plasmonic nanohelices remains at 100%, whereas bare glass drops to 70% after 5 minutes. These results demonstrate weather-adaptive LiDAR operation for robust autonomous sensing.
title_zh: 用于天气自适应激光雷达功能的等离子体纳米复合螺旋
abstract_zh: 可靠的光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 经常受到防护罩上多尺度水滴的挑战，因为宏观雨滴会引起折射和衍射，而微观雾凝结会散射光，使返回的信号失真。在这里，我们提出了一种利用等离子体纳米复合螺旋来清除多尺度液滴的仿生策略，该螺旋将被动光热防雾与压力稳定的疏水性拒水性结合起来。受企鹅羽毛小羽枝的启发，铜纳米颗粒通过掠射角共沉积嵌入三维二氧化硅纳米螺旋中。铜纳米颗粒提供可见光等离子体加热，同时在 905 nm 下保持 >85% 的透射率，螺旋结构赋予分层粗糙度，产生 143° 接触角。在1个太阳光照下，表面温升9.3°C，6秒内消除凝结。在自然降雨期间（3-5 毫米/小时），LiDAR 通过等离子体纳米螺旋的传输率保持在 100%，而裸玻璃在 5 分钟后降至 70%。这些结果证明了天气自适应激光雷达操作可实现强大的自主传感。

title: Probing mixed-state phases on a quantum computer via Renyi correlators and variational decoding
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Recent advances have defined nontrivial phases of matter in open quantum systems such as many-body quantum states subject to environmental noise. In this work, we experimentally probe and characterize mixed-state phases on Quantinuum’s H1 quantum computer using two measures: Renyi correlators and the coding performance of a quantum error-correcting code associated with the phase. As a concrete example, we probe the low-energy states of the critical transverse field Ising model under different dephasing noise channels. First, we employ shadow tomography to extract a newly proposed Renyi correlator in two distinct phases obtained by applying two different channels, observing one with faster decay and the other with slower decay. Second, we investigate the decoding fidelity of the associated quantum error-correcting code using a variational quantum circuit. We find that a shallow circuit of depth-3 is sufficient to distinguish the above-mentioned two mixed-state phases, up to L = 24. Experimentally, we observe this distinction for system sizes up to L = 8 with a depth-1 decoder. Our work is a proof of concept for the quantum simulation and characterization of mixed-state phases.
title_zh: 通过 Renyi 相关器和变分解码在量子计算机上探测混合态相位
abstract_zh: 最近的进展定义了开放量子系统中物质的非平凡相，例如受环境噪声影响的多体量子态。在这项工作中，我们使用两种测量方法在 Quantinuum H1 量子计算机上实验性地探测和表征混合态相位：Renyi 相关器和与相位相关的量子纠错码的编码性能。作为一个具体例子，我们探讨了不同相移噪声通道下临界横向场 Ising 模型的低能态。首先，我们采用阴影断层扫描来提取新提出的 Renyi 相关器，该相关器处于两个不同的阶段，通过应用两个不同的通道获得，观察一个通道的衰减较快，另一个通道的衰减较慢。其次，我们使用变分量子电路研究相关量子纠错码的解码保真度。我们发现深度 3 的浅电路足以区分上述两个混合状态阶段，最高可达 L = 24。通过实验，我们使用深度 1 解码器观察到系统尺寸最高为 L = 8 的这种区别。我们的工作是混合态相的量子模拟和表征的概念证明。

title: Hyperbranched dielectric polymer networks exhibiting giant energy storage density at 250 °C
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Harsh-environment requirements of electrical and electronic systems demand advanced dielectrics with high energy storage density at elevated temperatures. Heat-resistant polymers are usually designed with densely packed molecular chains to maintain structural integrity. Unfortunately, the narrowed inter-chain spacing causes severe charge transfer under high electro-thermal fields, prohibiting capacitive energy storage beyond 200 °C. Here we report hyperbranched dielectric polymer networks as a solution to the persistent challenge. The hyperbranched topological junctions not only transform the linear polymer chains into a robust network to tolerate thermal stress, but also expand the inter-chain spacing to inhibit charge transfer. Results suggest that the hyperbranched networks exhibit suppressed secondary chain relaxation alongside expanded free volume. Moreover, the customizable chemical structure of hyperbranched centers renders this method general to capacitive polymer design. The hyperbranched polymer networks exhibit an exceptionally high discharged energy density of 4.9 J/cm3 above 90% efficiency at 250 °C, surpassing the existing polymeric dielectrics.
title_zh: 超支化介电聚合物网络在 250 °C 下表现出巨大的能量存储密度
abstract_zh: 电气和电子系统的恶劣环境要求需要先进的电介质在高温下具有高能量存储密度。耐热聚合物通常设计有密集的分子链以保持结构完整性。不幸的是，狭窄的链间距会在高电热场下导致严重的电荷转移，从而阻止电容式能量存储超过 200°C。在这里，我们报告超支化介电聚合物网络作为应对持续挑战的解决方案。超支化拓扑连接不仅将线性聚合物链转变为坚固的网络以承受热应力，而且还扩大了链间距以抑制电荷转移。结果表明，超支化网络表现出二级链松弛受到抑制，自由体积扩大。此外，超支化中心的可定制化学结构使该方法适用于电容聚合物设计。超支化聚合物网络在 250 °C 时表现出 4.9 J/cm3 的极高放电能量密度，效率高于 90%，超过了现有的聚合物电介质。

title: Enhancing molecular property prediction of transformer models with dual graph representation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Accurate prediction of molecular properties is central to advancing chemistry, materials science, and drug discovery. Machine learning on molecular graphs depends critically on representations that capture the topology and structure of molecules. Here we propose the dual graph transformer (DGT), a self-attention architecture that jointly models atom and bond graphs to achieve comprehensive molecular encodings. DGT fuses atom and bond features, graph topology and structure, and stereogeometric information within its self-attention module for an effective molecular representation. We benchmark DGT across a range of datasets for molecular property prediction, showing that it considerably outperforms the current state of the art. DGT demonstrates performance contributions from its dual graph representation, relative positional and structural encodings, and stereogeometric information incorporation while also offering interpretability at the molecular structural level. We envision DGT advancing molecular machine learning by improving both the prediction accuracy and interpretability of molecular properties.
title_zh: 利用双图表示增强变压器模型的分子特性预测
abstract_zh: 准确预测分子特性对于推进化学、材料科学和药物发现至关重要。分子图上的机器学习关键取决于捕获分子拓扑和结构的表示。在这里，我们提出了双图变换器（DGT），这是一种自注意力架构，可以联合建模原子图和键图以实现全面的分子编码。 DGT 在其自注意力模块中融合了原子和键特征、图形拓扑和结构以及立体几何信息，以实现有效的分子表示。我们在一系列用于分子特性预测的数据集上对 DGT 进行了基准测试，结果表明它大大优于当前最先进的技术。 DGT 展示了其双图表示、相对位置和结构编码以及立体几何信息合并的性能贡献，同时还提供了分子结构水平的可解释性。我们设想 DGT 通过提高分子特性的预测准确性和可解释性来推进分子机器学习。

abstract_zh: 序列定义的低聚物提供了可编程分子架构，在数据存储、身份验证和防伪方面具有潜力。然而，它们在现实世界材料中的部署受到其规模小、热弹性有限以及需要专门分析方法的限制。在这里，我们介绍了一种基于以超低浓度掺入的非生物序列定义的寡酰胺的分子标记策略（

title: No cloning of quantum ensembles
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Modern quantum physics now enables control of quantum systems at the level of individual trajectories, opening a new frontier that links quantum information theory, quantum many-body physics, and quantum thermodynamics, and uncovers novel non-equilibrium phenomena such as deep thermalization and measurement-induced entanglement. However, a central challenge remains: their characterization relies on measuring nonlinear properties of individual quantum states, a task tantamount to fine-grained cloning of a quantum ensemble. Here, the fundamental laws governing the cloning of quantum ensembles are investigated. First, a general no-cloning theorem for arbitrary ensembles is established from an information-theoretic perspective, even assuming multiple copies of the ensemble’s purification. It is then shown that this barrier can be unexpectedly circumvented for physical ensembles generated by finite-time evolutions. Nevertheless, these tasks are proven to remain computationally intractable, even when the full circuit description of state preparation is known. This stands in sharp contrast to the conventional no-cloning theorem, which relies on the state being unknown. Together, these results establish new fundamental principles of quantum mechanics, reveal intrinsic trade-offs among sample complexity, computational complexity, and quantum measurements, and highlight the necessity of problem-specific strategies for probing measurement-induced quantum phenomena.
title_zh: 无法克隆量子系综
abstract_zh: 现代量子物理学现在能够在单个轨迹水平上控制量子系统，开辟了连接量子信息论、量子多体物理学和量子热力学的新前沿，并揭示了新的非平衡现象，例如深度热化和测量引起的纠缠。然而，一个核心挑战仍然存在：它们的表征依赖于测量单个量子态的非线性特性，这项任务相当于量子系综的细粒度克隆。在这里，研究了控制量子系综克隆的基本定律。首先，从信息论的角度建立了任意系综的通用不可克隆定理，甚至假设系综纯化的多个副本。然后表明，对于有限时间演化生成的物理系综来说，这个障碍可以出乎意料地绕过。然而，事实证明，即使状态准备的完整电路描述已知，这些任务在计算上仍然难以处理。这与传统的不可克隆定理形成鲜明对比，传统的不可克隆定理依赖于状态未知。这些结果共同建立了量子力学的新基本原理，揭示了样本复杂性、计算复杂性和量子测量之间的内在权衡，并强调了探测测量引起的量子现象的特定问题策略的必要性。

title: Long-distance lanthanide migration regulated by interfacial lattice strain in nanostructures
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Interfacial strain engineering by controlling lattice mismatch holds implications for both fundamental studies and technological applications of heterostructured nanomaterials. However, defining its role remains challenging because the type, magnitude, and spatial distribution of strain are difficult to regulate at the nanoscale. Here, we establish a controllable model system to regulate interfacial lattice strain in lanthanide-doped core-shell-shell nanolattices by tuning lanthanide composition and shell deposition rate. We show that lattice mismatch governs lanthanide migration across heterointerfaces, thereby dictating crystal growth and optical properties. In hexagonal-phase NaErF4@NaYF4@NaLnF4 nanolattices, when the lattice mismatch exceeds 5.1%, lanthanide ions migrate by up to 13 nm from the core into the shell along the crystallographic direction. Mechanistic studies reveal that large interfacial strain not only promotes anisotropic shell growth by triggering preferential deposition of shell precursors onto specific crystal surfaces but also facilitates the formation of lanthanide vacancies at the core-shell interface. These findings identify interfacial strain as a key regulator of ion diffusion and structural evolution in heterostructured nanocrystals, providing a design principle for constructing heterostructures with spatially confined active ions for applications in bioimaging, nanocatalysis, and quantum information.
title_zh: 纳米结构中界面晶格应变调控的长距离镧系元素迁移
abstract_zh: 通过控制晶格失配进行界面应变工程对异质结构纳米材料的基础研究和技术应用具有重要意义。然而，定义其作用仍然具有挑战性，因为应变的类型、大小和空间分布很难在纳米尺度上调节。在这里，我们建立了一个可控模型系统，通过调节稀土成分和壳沉积速率来调节稀土掺杂核-壳-壳纳米晶格中的界面晶格应变。我们表明，晶格失配控制着镧系元素在异质界面上的迁移，从而决定了晶体生长和光学性质。在六方相NaErF4@NaYF4@NaLnF4纳米晶格中，当晶格失配超过5.1%时，镧系元素离子沿晶体方向从核迁移到壳中长达13 nm。机理研究表明，大的界面应变不仅通过触发壳前体在特定晶体表面上的优先沉积来促进各向异性壳生长，而且还促进了核-壳界面处镧系元素空位的形成。这些发现确定界面应变是异质结构纳米晶体中离子扩散和结构演化的关键调节剂，为构建具有空间受限活性离子的异质结构以应用于生物成像、纳米催化和量子信息提供了设计原理。

title: Confined ionic order in atomic nanowires of rare-earth chlorides unveiled via symmetry-guided structural screening
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Low-dimensional materials can exhibit unusual structural, electronic, and magnetic properties that arise from nanoscale confinement and quantum effects. However, determining their local atomic structures remains challenging, especially when long-range periodicity is limited and conventional crystallographic approaches are difficult to apply. Here, we show a symmetry-guided screening strategy for resolving confined one-dimensional materials by combining scanning transmission electron microscopy with reactive force-field molecular dynamics and density functional theory. We encapsulate rare-earth chlorides within single-walled carbon nanotubes (SWCNTs) to form stable LnCl3@SWCNTs hybrids (Ln = Y, Gd, Dy, Er), which contain ordered one-dimensional atomic nanowires. The screening strategy identifies structural models that are consistent with experimental imaging and energetic stability, enabling local configurations to be distinguished. Electronic and magnetic analyses, particularly for Dy-based systems using complete active space self-consistent field calculations and Boltzmann transport theory, reveal how local symmetry and confinement influence their functional properties. This experiment–theory framework provides a broadly applicable route for probing short-range-ordered nanostructures, establishing structure–property correlations, and guiding the design of functional low-dimensional materials.
title_zh: 通过对称引导结构筛选揭示稀土氯化物原子纳米线中的受限离子序
abstract_zh: 低维材料可以表现出由纳米级限制和量子效应产生的不寻常的结构、电子和磁性特性。然而，确定它们的局部原子结构仍然具有挑战性，特别是当长程周期性有限并且传统的晶体学方法难以应用时。在这里，我们展示了一种通过将扫描透射电子显微镜与反应力场分子动力学和密度泛函理论相结合来解决受限一维材料的对称引导筛选策略。我们将稀土氯化物封装在单壁碳纳米管 (SWCNT) 内，形成稳定的 LnCl3@SWCNTs 杂化物 (Ln = Y、Gd、Dy、Er)，其中包含有序的一维原子纳米线。筛选策略确定了与实验成像和能量稳定性一致的结构模型，从而能够区分局部构型。电子和磁分析，特别是对于使用完整活性空间自洽场计算和玻尔兹曼输运理论的镝基系统，揭示了局部对称性和限制如何影响其功能特性。该实验理论框架为探测短程有序纳米结构、建立结构-性能关联以及指导功能低维材料的设计提供了广泛适用的途径。

title: Direct observation of long-range many-body coherence in quasi-one-dimensional attractive Bose gases
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Macroscopic coherence is an important feature of quantum many-body systems exhibiting collective behaviors, with examples ranging from atomic Bose-Einstein condensates, and quantum liquids to superconductors. Probing many-body coherence in a dynamically unstable regime, however, presents an intriguing and outstanding challenge in out-of-equilibrium quantum many-body physics. Here, we experimentally study the first- and second-order coherence of degenerate quasi-one-dimensional (1D) Bose gases quenched from repulsive to modulationally unstable attractive interaction regimes. The resulting dynamics, monitored by in situ density and matter-wave interference imaging, reveals phase-coherent density wave evolutions, clearly distinguished from iconic soliton trains previously observed in attractive gases. This arises from the interplay between noise-amplified density modulations and dispersive shock waves of broad interest in nonlinear physics, plasmas, granular systems, and beyond. At longer times, the gases become phase-scrambled, exhibiting a finite correlation length. Interestingly, following an interaction quench back to the repulsive regime, we observe that quasi-long-range coherence can be spontaneously re-established. This captivating rephasing dynamics can be attributed to the nucleation and annihilation of density defects in the quasi-1D geometry. These results shed light on out-of-equilibrium phase coherence in quantum many-body systems in a regime where beyond mean-field effects may arise and theoretical approaches have not been well-established.
title_zh: 准一维吸引玻色气体中远程多体相干性的直接观察
abstract_zh: 宏观相干性是量子多体系统表现出集体行为的一个重要特征，例子包括从原子玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体、量子液体到超导体。然而，在动态不稳定的状态下探测多体相干性，对非平衡量子多体物理学提出了一个有趣且突出的挑战。在这里，我们通过实验研究了从排斥到调制不稳定吸引相互作用状态淬灭的简并准一维（1D）玻色气体的一阶和二阶相干性。通过原位密度和物质波干涉成像监测所产生的动力学，揭示了相位相干密度波的演化，与之前在有吸引力的气体中观察到的标志性孤子列明显不同。这是由噪声放大密度调制与非线性物理、等离子体、颗粒系统等领域广泛关注的色散冲击波之间的相互作用产生的。在较长的时间里，气体变得相扰乱，表现出有限的相关长度。有趣的是，在相互作用淬灭回到排斥状态之后，我们观察到准长程相干性可以自发地重新建立。这种迷人的重定相动力学可归因于准一维几何中密度缺陷的成核和湮灭。这些结果揭示了量子多体系统中的非平衡相位相干性，在这种情况下，可能会出现超出平均场效应且理论方法尚未完善。

title: 3D nanoprinting of metals by spatiotemporally confined hot electrons via multiple-electron excitations in nanocrystals
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: For decades, multi-photon polymerization has been a key technology for fabricating complex 3D micro- and nanoscale structures from polymer materials. However, extending this capability beyond polymers remains a significant challenge. In particular, nanoscale metal printing is challenging because solid metal formation typically requires energy-driven reactions or thermally activated processes that are difficult to spatially localize, resulting in compromised feature resolution. Here, we demonstrate 3D nanoprinting of metals with depth and lateral resolution
title_zh: 通过纳米晶体中的多电子激发，通过时空限制的热电子进行金属 3D 纳米打印
abstract_zh: 几十年来，多光子聚合一直是利用聚合物材料制造复杂 3D 微米级和纳米级结构的关键技术。然而，将这种能力扩展到聚合物之外仍然是一个重大挑战。特别是，纳米级金属打印具有挑战性，因为固体金属的形成通常需要能量驱动的反应或热激活过程，而这些反应或热激活过程很难在空间上定位，从而导致特征分辨率受损。在这里，我们演示了具有深度和横向分辨率的金属 3D 纳米打印

title: Multidirectional strain-insensitive stretchable RF electronics
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Stretchable radio-frequency (RF) electronics underpin emerging wearable systems for body-centric communication, continuous health monitoring, and wireless power transfer. However, on-body stretchable antennas undergo multidirectional in-plane strain during natural motion, which detunes resonance and destabilizes wireless links. Existing strain-insensitive designs are typically effective only along prescribed loading directions and often compromise radiation performance. Here, we establish a systematic directional mechano-electromagnetic analysis framework for resonant planar antennas and introduce a dual-port multidirectional strain-insensitive antenna (DP-MSiA), whereby strain-insensitive resonance (shift ≤ 40 MHz at 2.45 GHz) is achieved under up to 45% strain across diverse in-plane directions. Based on the stable resonance and high realized gain of the DP-MSiA, we demonstrate strain-insensitive wireless energy harvesting with rectifiers under in-plane strain of varying direction and magnitude, as well as a strain-robust on-body communication system that sustains stable multimodal health-data transmission during natural motion. Our work opens new opportunities for creating deformation-insensitive electronics and enables integrated functionalities in wearable and embodied systems.
title_zh: 多向应变不敏感可拉伸射频电子器件
abstract_zh: 可拉伸射频 (RF) 电子器件支撑着新兴可穿戴系统，用于以身体为中心的通信、持续健康监测和无线功率传输。然而，贴体可拉伸天线在自然运动过程中会经历多向平面内应变，从而导致谐振失谐并破坏无线链路的稳定性。现有的应变不敏感设计通常仅在规定的负载方向上有效，并且常常会损害辐射性能。在这里，我们为谐振平面天线建立了系统的定向机电磁分析框架，并引入了双端口多向应变不敏感天线（DP-MSiA），从而在不同面内方向上高达 45% 的应变下实现了应变不敏感谐振（2.45 GHz 时位移≤ 40 MHz）。基于 DP-MSiA 的稳定谐振和高实现增益，我们展示了在不同方向和大小的面内应变下使用整流器进行应变不敏感无线能量收集，以及在自然运动期间维持稳定的多模态健康数据传输的应变鲁棒体上通信系统。我们的工作为创建变形不敏感电子产品开辟了新的机会，并实现了可穿戴和嵌入式系统中的集成功能。

title: Broadband Radiative Heat Transfer Suppression via Dispersion-Engineered Metasurfaces
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Suppressing radiative heat transfer using metallic reflectors fails where electrical conduction or material incompatibility are prohibitive, whereas non-metallic alternatives that rely on conventional thermophotonic approaches face fundamental performance-bandwidth trade-offs, bounded by the Bode-Fano limit. Here, we redefine the strategy for broadband radiative suppression by leveraging complementary dispersion engineering in a dielectric metasurface pair. Using stochastic gradient descent (SGD) optimization, we co-design aperiodic distributed Bragg reflector (DBR) pairs with deliberately misaligned passbands across the broad thermal band of interest, enabling effective broadband thermal decoupling within a small thickness and fabrication budget, beyond the limits of conventional approaches. Experimental validation reveals that our optimized 7-layered (7-L) metasurface pair reduces radiative heat exchange significantly compared to fused silica benchmarks, as confirmed through both angle-resolved emissivity measurements (82% reduction) and direct radiometric power quantification (62.5% reduction). Importantly, our compact system exhibits strong robustness against design and fabrication tolerance and operational temperature drift (320–500 K). This work establishes a generalizable framework for bandwidth-unconstrained thermal radiation engineering, with applications in energy-efficient systems, thermal insulation and thermal management. By circumventing the need for metallic components, our approach opens new possibilities for controlling radiative heat transfer in an all-dielectric ultrathin platform.
title_zh: 通过分散工程超表面抑制宽带辐射传热
abstract_zh: 在导电或材料不兼容的情况下，使用金属反射器抑制辐射传热会失败，而依赖传统热光子方法的非金属替代品则面临着基本的性能与带宽权衡，受到 Bode-Fano 极限的限制。在这里，我们通过利用介电超表面对中的互补色散工程重新定义了宽带辐射抑制策略。利用随机梯度下降 (SGD) 优化，我们共同设计了非周期性分布式布拉格反射器 (DBR) 对，在感兴趣的宽热带上故意错位通带，从而在较小的厚度和制造预算内实现有效的宽带热解耦，超出了传统方法的限制。实验验证表明，与熔融石英基准相比，我们优化的 7 层 (7-L) 超表面对显着减少了辐射热交换，这通过角度分辨发射率测量（减少 82%）和直接辐射功率量化（减少 62.5%）得到证实。重要的是，我们的紧凑型系统在设计和制造公差以及工作温度漂移 (320–500 K) 方面表现出强大的鲁棒性。这项工作为带宽不受限制的热辐射工程建立了一个通用框架，并应用于节能系统、隔热和热管理。通过规避对金属部件的需求，我们的方法为控制全模具中的辐射传热开辟了新的可能性

title: Hierarchical self-assembly of atomically precise Au6 nanoclusters into fibrillar superstructures with collective optical properties
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Self-assembly, a key approach in material science, enables modulation of nanostructures to achieve distinct materials properties. Atomically precise metal nanoclusters (NCs), consisting of a few metal atoms, exhibit distinctive optical and electronic properties due to their “molecule-like” discrete energy levels. Such NCs offer advantages over conventional metal nanoparticles by avoiding dispersity in size and uncontrolled aggregation. Here we demonstrate a study on crystalline aggregates of Au6 NCs, formed under varying conditions. Notably, the controlled aggregation of these Au6 NCs, synchronising by protonation or employing specific hydrogen bonding, yields self-assembled nanoribbons and percolated networks of nanofibers that further produce extended 3D fibrillar architectures. X-ray scattering and electron microscopy reveal two distinct packing modes: a monoclinic 2D oblique lattice with sparse NC arrangement, and a nematic 2D hexagonal packing, resembling liquid-crystalline rod-like assemblies. The resulting superstructures exhibit enhanced optical responses, retaining the photoluminescence of their constituents, and manifesting third-harmonic generation, slow photoluminescence decay driven by charge-migration effects, and polarization effects influenced by the ordered structure with the periodicity of the NCs. Overall, this work emphasizes the potential of NCs as versatile building blocks for tunable and responsive optoelectronic materials, providing insights into the mechanisms of self-assembly.
title_zh: 原子级精确的 Au6 纳米团簇分层自组装成具有集体光学特性的纤维状超结构
abstract_zh: 自组装是材料科学的一种关键方法，它能够调节纳米结构以获得独特的材料特性。原子精确的金属纳米团簇（NC）由一些金属原子组成，由于其“类似分子”的离散能级，表现出独特的光学和电子特性。与传统金属纳米颗粒相比，此类纳米颗粒具有避免尺寸分散和不受控制聚集的优点。在这里，我们展示了对在不同条件下形成的 Au6 NC 晶体聚集体的研究。值得注意的是，这些 Au6 NC 的受控聚集，通过质子化或采用特定氢键同步，产生自组装纳米带和纳米纤维渗透网络，进一步产生扩展的 3D 纤维结构。 X射线散射和电子显微镜揭示了两种不同的堆积模式：具有稀疏NC排列的单斜二维斜晶格，以及向列二维六边形堆积，类似于液晶棒状组件。由此产生的超结构表现出增强的光学响应，保留其成分的光致发光，并表现出三次谐波的产生、由电荷迁移效应驱动的缓慢光致发光衰减以及受具有NC周期性的有序结构影响的偏振效应。总体而言，这项工作强调了数控作为可调谐和响应光电材料的多功能构建模块的潜力，为自组装机制提供了见解。

title: Unifying network connectivity from geodesics to random walks via the random cluster model
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Connectivity is a fundamental concept in network science, characterizing how interactions propagate through indirect pathways. While numerous connectivity metrics exist, such as shortest paths, effective resistance and minimum cut, each highlighting distinct structural features, their relationships remain largely fragmented. Here we show that these classical notions arise as limiting cases of a unified statistical-physics framework based on the random cluster (RC) model, which interprets connectivity as a principled synthesis of series and parallel transmission. By tuning its parameters, the RC model not only recovers classical connectivity measures but also extrapolates into unexplored regimes, leading to emergent notions of connectivity which yield practical tools for network learning tasks. In particular, RC connectivity naturally encodes the kinetics of growing paths, enhancing learning performance in dynamical settings such as epidemic spreading and neurodynamics. By linking structural, dynamical, and learning-based perspectives, RC connectivity establishes a general and interpretable foundation for the analysis of networked systems.
title_zh: 通过随机集群模型统一从测地线到随机游走的网络连接
abstract_zh: 连接性是网络科学中的一个基本概念，描述了交互如何通过间接路径传播。虽然存在许多连通性指标，例如最短路径、有效阻力和最小切割，每个指标都突出了不同的结构特征，但它们的关系在很大程度上仍然是支离破碎的。在这里，我们表明这些经典概念是作为基于随机集群（RC）模型的统一统计物理框架的限制情况而出现的，该框架将连通性解释为串联和并行传输的原则性综合。通过调整其参数，RC 模型不仅恢复了经典的连通性测量，而且还推断出未探索的状态，从而产生了新兴的连通性概念，从而为网络学习任务提供了实用的工具。特别是，RC 连接自然地编码了生长路径的动力学，从而增强了流行病传播和神经动力学等动态环境中的学习性能。通过链接结构、动态和基于学习的视角，RC 连接为网络系统的分析建立了通用且可解释的基础。

title: Negative temperature coefficient metamaterial absorber for uniform microwave heating
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Microwave heating is widely used in daily applications but is fundamentally limited by non-uniform temperature distribution. Despite extensive efforts to manipulate energy distribution around materials, achieving uniform heating remains elusive due to the intrinsic inhomogeneity of electromagnetic fields. Here, we report a self-regulating solution that adaptively modulates the absorbance distribution using a Negative Temperature Coefficient (NTC) Metamaterial Absorber (MA). Distinct from electromagnetic field-shaping strategies, our approach intrinsically suppresses overheating in high-temperature regions and redistributes energy to cooler areas. We demonstrate, for the first time, that uniform heating—quantified by over 90% reduction in the coefficient of variation—can be achieved across diverse configurations, including planar, polyhedral, curved, and multiple objects, as well as under power variations spanning two orders of magnitude. This work not only provides a theoretical resolution to the longstanding challenge of non-uniform microwave heating but also opens new avenues for development and application of temperature-adaptive metamaterials.
title_zh: 用于均匀微波加热的负温度系数超材料吸收器
abstract_zh: 微波加热广泛应用于日常应用，但从根本上受到温度分布不均匀的限制。尽管人们在控制材料周围的能量分布方面做出了广泛的努力，但由于电磁场固有的不均匀性，实现均匀加热仍然难以实现。在这里，我们报告了一种使用负温度系数 (NTC) 超材料吸收器 (MA) 自适应调节吸光度分布的自调节解决方案。与电磁场整形策略不同，我们的方法本质上抑制高温区域的过热并将能量重新分配到较冷的区域。我们首次证明，均匀加热（通过变异系数降低 90% 以上来量化）可以在不同的配置（包括平面、多面体、弯曲和多个物体）以及跨越两个数量级的功率变化下实现。这项工作不仅为非均匀微波加热的长期挑战提供了理论解决方案，而且为温度自适应超材料的开发和应用开辟了新途径。

title: Metal-center electron affinity modulates multicolor electrochromism in 2D conjugated metal-organic frameworks
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Two-dimensional conjugated metal-organic frameworks are emerging platforms for electrochromic devices, yet the current stage is limited by monotonous color and an unclear coloration mechanism. While prior studies emphasize the ligand-centered redox process, the role of metal centers is often overlooked. Herein, we report a metal-center electron-affinity mechanism that is critical to electrochromic performance. We first employ an unsupervised machine learning method to screen divalent metal-catecholate (CAT) systems, identifying Zn, Ni, and Cu as optimal candidates. All three systems exhibit multicolor transitions from green to blue and eventually to purple; however, Zn- and Ni-CAT-1 significantly outperform Cu-CAT-1, with nearly threefold faster switching speeds (4.8/5.4 vs. 14.4 s) and cycling stability enhanced by two orders of magnitude ( > 20000 vs. 2+ (3d9) possesses a redox-active configuration that favors electron affinity, thereby requiring additional electron participation and a higher energy demand than the relatively inert Ni2+ (3d8) and Zn2+ (3d10). This valence variation also induces stronger metal-oxygen coupling, ultimately leading to slower redox kinetics and structural degradation. As proof of concept, we demonstrate the applicability of these findings to camouflage, displays, and wearables for designing multicolor electrochromic devices.
title_zh: 金属中心电子亲和力调节二维共轭金属有机框架中的多色电致变色
abstract_zh: 二维共轭金属有机框架是电致变色器件的新兴平台，但目前阶段受到颜色单调和不明确的着色机制的限制。虽然先前的研究强调以配体为中心的氧化还原过程，但金属中心的作用常常被忽视。在此，我们报告了一种对电致变色性能至关重要的金属中心电子亲和机制。我们首先采用无监督机器学习方法来筛选二价金属儿茶酚酸盐 (CAT) 系统，将 Zn、Ni 和 Cu 确定为最佳候选。所有三个系统都表现出从绿色到蓝色并最终到紫色的多色过渡；然而，Zn-和Ni-CAT-1的性能显着优于Cu-CAT-1，开关速度快了近三倍（4.8/5.4 vs. 14.4 s），循环稳定性提高了两个数量级（> 20000 vs. 2+ (3d9) 具有有利于电子亲和力的氧化还原活性配置，因此需要额外的电子参与和比相对惰性的 Ni2+ (3d8) 和 Zn2+ 更高的能量需求(3d10)。这种价态变化还会引起更强的金属-氧耦合，最终导致氧化还原动力学变慢和结构降解。作为概念证明，我们证明了这些发现在设计多色电致变色设备的伪装、显示器和可穿戴设备中的适用性。

title: Collateral impact: U.S.-China tensions and energy transition in third countries
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Energy Policy
title_zh: 附带影响：中美紧张局势和第三国能源转型

title: Development and validation of a multiancestry and multitrait polygenic risk score for lung cancer
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Polygenic risk scores (PRSs) quantify genetic susceptibilities, yet ancestry imbalance in genome-wide association studies (GWASs) limits the accuracy of monoracial PRSs in non-European populations. Here, we perform a multiancestry GWAS meta-analysis for lung cancer (76,953 cases and 1,886,372 controls), identifying 87 conditionally independent genome-wide significant loci, including two unreported cytobands. We use a PRS construction method, PRS-CSx, to develop a multiancestry PRS (PRSMA" role="presentation">PRSMA{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MA}}}}}) which outperforms 32 published PRSs. To enhance predictive power, we construct a multitrait PRS (PRSMT" role="presentation">PRSMT{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MT}}}}}) using CatBoost, integrating 32 cross-trait PRSs across three ancestries. Combining PRSMA" role="presentation">PRSMA{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MA}}}}} and PRSMT" role="presentation">PRSMT{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MT}}}}}, we generate PRSMAMT" role="presentation">PRSMAMT{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MAMT}}}}} and validate it in independent cohorts (OncoArray, TRICL and All of Us). PRSMAMT" role="presentation">PRSMAMT{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MAMT}}}}} demonstrates superior discriminability in European, Asian, and African populations, improves risk stratification, and identifies approximately 10% additional lung cancer cases in the UK Biobank. Individuals with elevated PLCOm2012 scores and high genetic risk exhibit a 12.64-fold higher cumulative risk than those with low scores and low genetic risk, supporting precision prevention strategies.
title_zh: 肺癌多祖先和多性状多基因风险评分的开发和验证
abstract_zh: 多基因风险评分 (PRS) 量化遗传易感性，但全基因组关联研究 (GWAS) 中的血统不平衡限制了非欧洲人群中单种族 PRS 的准确性。在这里，我们对肺癌（76,953 例病例和 1,886,372 例对照）进行了多祖先 GWAS 荟萃分析，确定了 87 个条件独立的全基因组显着位点，包括两个未报告的细胞带。我们使用 PRS 构建方法 PRS-CSx 来开发多祖先 PRS (PRSMA" role="presentation">PRSMA{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MA}}}}})，其性能优于 32 个已发布的 PRS。为了增强预测能力，我们构建了多特征 PRS (PRSMT" role="presentation">PRSMT{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MT}}}}}) 使用 CatBoost，集成了三个祖先的 32 个跨特征 PRS。结合 PRSMA" role="presentation">PRSMA{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MA}}}}} 和 PRSMT" role="presentation">PRSMT{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MT}}}}}，我们生成 PRSMAMT" role="presentation">PRSMAMT{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MAMT}}}}} 并在独立队列（OncoArray、TRICL 和 All of Us）中进行验证。" role="presentation">PRSMAMT{{{{\rm{PRS}}}}}_{{{{\rm{MAMT}}}}} 在欧洲、亚洲和非洲人群中表现出卓越的辨别能力，可降低风险分层，并在英国生物银行中确定了大约 10% 的额外肺癌病例。 PLCOm2012 得分较高且遗传风险较高的个体的累积风险比得分较低且遗传风险较低的个体高 12.64 倍，支持精准预防策略。

title: Financial inclusion and access to clean cooking fuels and technologies under uncertainty in emerging and developing countries
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Energy Policy
title_zh: 新兴国家和发展中国家不确定性下的金融包容性以及获得清洁烹饪燃料和技术的机会

title: Volcanic eruptions caused weakening AMOC during the preindustrial past millennium
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation (AMOC) is a key component of our climate system. However, the evolution history and the forcing mechanism of AMOC in the last millennial has remained uncertain. Here, combining available paleo AMOC-sensitive indicators with multiple climate models and paleo Data Assimilation, we show, for the first time, that the AMOC transport exhibits a slow declining trend into the Little Ice Age, with a reduction of about −0.7±0.4Sv." role="presentation">−0.7±0.4Sv.-0.7\,\pm 0.4{Sv}. (~4%) from AD 850-1850. This weakening is mainly caused by explosive volcanic eruptions. After a rapid strengthening in the initial decade following a volcanic eruption, the AMOC tends to show a slow weakening of centennial timescale, driven by stored cooling in the deep Atlantic and its feedback on North Atlantic climate.
title_zh: 前工业化时期，火山喷发导致 AMOC 减弱
abstract_zh: 大西洋经向翻转环流（AMOC）是我们气候系统的关键组成部分。然而，AMOC在上个世纪的演变历史和驱动机制仍然不确定。在这里，将现有的古 AMOC 敏感指标与多种气候模型和古数据同化相结合，我们首次表明，从公元 850 年到 1850 年，AMOC 运输呈现出缓慢下降的趋势，进入小冰河时代，减少了约 -0.7±0.4Sv。" role="presentation">-0.7±0.4Sv.-0.7\,\pm 0.4{Sv}。（~4%）。减弱主要是由火山喷发引起的，在火山喷发后的最初十年迅速增强之后，在大西洋深处的储存冷却及其对北大西洋气候的反馈的驱动下，AMOC往往会表现出百年时间尺度的缓慢减弱。

title: Lithosphere as a bottom-up modulator of mountain vegetation resilience
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Understanding vegetation resilience, defined as the recovery speed of vegetation following external perturbations, is essential for predicting ecosystem stability under climate change, yet the role of lithosphere in mountain systems remains poorly understood. Here, we assess how lithology and tectonics modulate vegetation resilience across global mountains using integrated climate, soil, topography, human footprint, lithology, land-cover, and vegetation datasets. Vegetation type and temperature dominate global patterns, with resilience highest in trees, followed by herbs and shrubs, together explaining 86% of the spatial variability. After accounting for climatic and anthropogenic effects, resilience across vegetation types is strongly mediated by lithospheric pathways. Tree resilience peaks in steep, actively incising terrains underlain by erosion-resistant plutonic and metamorphic rocks, as well as dissolution-prone carbonate rocks. Herb resilience is strongly linked to soil organic carbon enriched on mafic and metamorphic rocks. Shrub resilience is primarily temperature-dependent (93%) but shows reduced warming sensitivity on nutrient-poor substrates. Moreover, resilience peaks at intermediate channel steepness (ksn ≈ 500), suggesting that moderate tectonic uplift promotes vegetation resilience. These findings identify the lithosphere as a fundamental modulator of mountain vegetation resilience and highlight geological constraints on ecosystem stability across heterogeneous landscapes.
title_zh: 岩石圈作为山地植被恢复力的自下而上调节器
abstract_zh: 了解植被恢复力（定义为植被在外部扰动后的恢复速度）对于预测气候变化下生态系统的稳定性至关重要，但岩石圈在山区系统中的作用仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们利用综合气候、土壤、地形、人类足迹、岩性、土地覆盖和植被数据集评估岩性和构造如何调节全球山脉的植被恢复力。植被类型和温度主导着全球模式，树木的恢复力最高，其次是草本植物和灌木，共同解释了 86% 的空间变异。在考虑了气候和人为影响后，不同植被类型的恢复力很大程度上受到岩石圈路径的调节。在陡峭、活跃的切割地形中，树木的恢复能力达到顶峰，该地形下方是抗侵蚀的深成岩和变质岩，以及易溶解的碳酸盐岩。草本植物的恢复力与镁铁质和变质岩上富集的土壤有机碳密切相关。灌木的恢复力主要取决于温度（93%），但在营养贫乏的基质上表现出对变暖的敏感性降低。此外，恢复力在中等河道陡度处达到峰值（ksn ≈ 500），表明适度的构造隆升可促进植被恢复力。这些发现将岩石圈确定为山地植被恢复力的基本调节器，并强调了异质景观中生态系统稳定性的地质限制。

title: Ecological multifunctionality of watersheds increases with tree species richness
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Watersheds are natural units and meta-ecosystems of the earth’s land surface providing multiple ecological functions. However, little is known about the biodiversity-ecological multifunctionality relationships of watersheds, particularly regarding how these relationships scale to large and complex landscapes. Here, we explore the impact of forest tree species richness on the ecological multifunctionality of watersheds in terms of carbon sequestration, carbon storage, water supply, water regulation, and soil conservation, by utilizing integrated ground-sourced forest inventory datasets comprising 846 forest watersheds from the Global Forest Biodiversity Initiative, the Global Streamflow Indices and Metadata Archive, and remote sensing data products. We find a consistently positive relationship between forest tree species richness and watershed ecological multifunctionality by accounting for factors such as forest structural characteristics and environmental conditions. Furthermore, we find that this biodiversity-multifunctionality link is dependent on spatial scale and climatic context, becoming stronger in larger watersheds but diminishing in arid climatic conditions. These insights enhance our understanding of ecosystem multifunctionality and underscore the importance of considering watershed-scale ecological processes and biodiversity in ecosystem management and conservation strategies.
title_zh: 流域的生态多功能性随着树种丰富度的增加而增强
abstract_zh: 流域是地球陆地表面的自然单位和元生态系统，提供多种生态功能。然而，人们对流域的生物多样性-生态多功能性关系知之甚少，特别是这些关系如何扩展到大型和复杂的景观。在这里，我们利用由全球森林生物多样性倡议的 846 个森林流域、全球水流指数和元数据档案以及遥感数据产品组成的综合地面来源森林清查数据集，探讨了森林树种丰富度对流域碳固存、碳储存、供水、水调节和土壤保持等生态多功能性的影响。通过考虑森林结构特征和环境条件等因素，我们发现森林树种丰富度与流域生态多功能性之间始终存在正相关关系。此外，我们发现这种生物多样性与多功能性的联系取决于空间尺度和气候背景，在较大的流域中变得更强，但在干旱的气候条件下减弱。这些见解增强了我们对生态系统多功能性的理解，并强调了在生态系统管理和保护战略中考虑流域规模的生态过程和生物多样性的重要性。

title: Intranasal boosting induces variant-specific responses in SARS-CoV-2 vaccine-imprinted mice
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The continued evolution of SARS-CoV-2 variants that evade immunity highlights a need to develop vaccines that elicit variant-specific antibodies and neutralize emerging strains. However, immune imprinting from antecedent SARS-CoV-2 exposure can limit the generation of such antibodies. Here, we evaluate strategies to enhance variant-specific antibody responses in female mice primed with Wuhan-1 spike-based mRNA or chimpanzee adenoviral-vectored (ChAd) vaccines and boosted with Omicron variant-matched vaccines. Altering the intramuscular injection site did not substantially affect variant-specific serum antibody responses. However, increasing booster antigen doses, performing repeated boosters, and administering booster vaccines intranasally enhanced variant-specific responses against the vaccine-matched Omicron strain. Boosting intranasally with a ChAd vaccine encoding the spike protein of Omicron XBB.1.5 elicited stronger XBB.1.5-specific responses in serum, bronchoalveolar lavage fluid, and draining lymph nodes than intramuscular boosting with the same vaccine. Regardless of booster regimen, neutralizing activity against XBB.1.5 was predominantly mediated by antibodies that were non-reactive to Wuhan-1 spike. These findings establish that in mice, intranasal or repeated variant-matched boosting can overcome the effects of imprinting and enhance immunity against SARS-CoV-2 strains.
title_zh: 鼻内加强诱导 SARS-CoV-2 疫苗印迹小鼠的变异特异性反应
abstract_zh: 逃避免疫的 SARS-CoV-2 变体的持续进化凸显了开发能够引发变体特异性抗体并中和新出现病毒株的疫苗的必要性。然而，先前暴露于 SARS-CoV-2 的免疫印记可能会限制此类抗体的产生。在这里，我们评估了增强雌性小鼠体内变异特异性抗体反应的策略，这些小鼠接种了 Wuuu-1 刺突蛋白 mRNA 或黑猩猩腺病毒载体 (ChAd) 疫苗，并使用 Omicron 变异匹配疫苗进行加强。改变肌内注射部位并没有显着影响变体特异性血清抗体反应。然而，增加加强抗原剂量、重复加强和鼻内注射加强疫苗可增强针对疫苗匹配的 Omicron 菌株的变体特异性反应。使用编码 Omicron XBB.1.5 刺突蛋白的 ChAd 疫苗进行鼻内加强，与使用相同疫苗进行肌内加强相比，在血清、支气管肺泡灌洗液和引流淋巴结中引发了更强的 XBB.1.5 特异性反应。无论加强方案如何，针对 XBB.1.5 的中和活性主要由对 Wuuhan-1 刺突无反应的抗体介导。这些发现证实，在小鼠中，鼻内或重复的变异匹配加强可以克服印记的影响并增强对 SARS-CoV-2 毒株的免疫力。

title: Prediction error correlates in the striosome-dopamine circuit emerge from information gain
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The striosome compartments in the striatum gate cortical inputs to dopamine neurons, which then feed back to the striosomes and surrounding matrix. This loop underlies decision-making, learning, and movement. Dopamine signals strongly correlate with reward prediction errors (RPEs) in certain tasks. However, many dopaminergic responses, such as to high costs, novelty, aversive stimuli, and real-time movement guidance, do not align with RPE. Separately, information theory explains how dopamine responds to uncertainty and encodes when rewards are expected to occur. Here, we show that apparent RPE correlations arise mathematically from the information gain of the policy of actions (policy-IG). Policy-IG quantifies how much newly arriving information changes choice. In simple reward tasks, policy-IG reduces to classic RPEs, but it also predicts dopamine responses to aversive events, nonlinear reward scaling, novelty, movement, state valuation, and moment-by-moment decision control. Thus, RPE could be a special case of this more general function. We show that policy-IG is mathematically related to a range of information-centric, Bayesian, active inference, and casual association models, allowing those models to formally incorporate the experimental RPE literature in their support. Simulating impaired policy-IG replicates basal ganglia disorder features, suggesting policy-IG as a target for therapies.
title_zh: 纹状体-多巴胺回路中的预测误差与信息增益相关
abstract_zh: 纹状体中的纹状体区室控制皮质输入多巴胺神经元，然后反馈回纹状体和周围基质。这个循环是决策、学习和行动的基础。多巴胺信号与某些任务中的奖励预测错误（RPE）密切相关。然而，许多多巴胺能反应，例如对高成本、新奇、厌恶刺激和实时运动指导的反应，与 RPE 不一致。另外，信息论解释了多巴胺如何对不确定性做出反应，并在预期奖励发生时进行编码。在这里，我们证明了明显的 RPE 相关性在数学上是由行动政策 (policy-IG) 的信息增益产生的。 Policy-IG 量化新到达的信息改变选择的程度。在简单的奖励任务中，策略-IG 简化为经典的 RPE，但它也预测多巴胺对厌恶事件、非线性奖励缩放、新颖性、运动、状态评估和即时决策控制的反应。因此，RPE 可能是这种更通用功能的特例。我们表明，policy-IG 在数学上与一系列以信息为中心、贝叶斯、主动推理和随意关联模型相关，从而使这些模型能够正式将实验性 RPE 文献纳入其支持中。模拟受损的策略-IG 可以复制基底神经节疾病的特征，表明策略-IG 可作为治疗的目标。

title: A primordial synaptotagmin-independent function of complexin in regulated exocytosis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: In Ca²⁺-triggered exocytosis such as synaptic neurotransmitter release, vesicle fusion is tightly regulated by synaptotagmin (Syt) and complexin (Cpx), which together clamp partially assembled SNARE complexes to prevent premature fusion. However, Cpx is evolutionarily more ancient than Syt, suggesting that it may also regulate exocytosis independently of Syt. To test this possibility, we sought to identify an extant exocytic pathway that requires Cpx but naturally lacks Syt. Here, we uncovered such a pathway – hormone-triggered exocytosis of glucose transporters in adipocytes. In this pathway, Cpx acts exclusively as a positive regulator, accelerating the evoked phase of exocytosis without affecting basal fusion. Mechanistically, this Syt-independent activity depends on the central helix of Cpx for SNARE binding and on its C-terminal membrane-binding peptide, which remodels the lipid bilayer to promote exocytosis. Our findings support a model in which Cpx originally evolved to accelerate exocytosis independently of Ca²⁺, enabling rapid mobilization of exocytic cargoes in response to environmental cues. With the later emergence of Syt, Cpx acquired an additional role – acting in concert with Syt to regulate Ca²⁺-triggered exocytosis.
title_zh: 复合蛋白在调节胞吐作用中的原始突触结合蛋白独立功能
abstract_zh: 在 Ca2+ 触发的胞吐作用中，例如突触神经递质释放，囊泡融合受到突触结合蛋白 (Syt) 和复合蛋白 (Cpx) 的严格调节，它们共同夹紧部分组装的 SNARE 复合物，以防止过早融合。然而，Cpx 在进化上比 Syt 更古老，这表明它也可能独立于 Syt 调节胞吐作用。为了测试这种可能性，我们试图确定一个现有的胞吐途径，它需要 Cpx 但天然缺乏 Syt。在这里，我们发现了这样一个途径——脂肪细胞中激素触发的葡萄糖转运蛋白的胞吐作用。在此通路中，Cpx 专门充当正调节因子，加速胞吐作用的诱发阶段而不影响基底融合。从机制上讲，这种不依赖于 Syt 的活性依赖于 SNARE 结合的 Cpx 中央螺旋及其 C 端膜结合肽，后者重塑脂质双层以促进胞吐作用。我们的研究结果支持一个模型，其中 Cpx 最初进化为独立于 Ca2+ 加速胞吐作用，从而能够快速动员胞吐货物以响应环境提示。随着 Syt 后来的出现，Cpx 获得了一个额外的角色——与 Syt 协同作用来调节 Ca²⁺ 触发的胞吐作用。

title: In-scanner thoughts contribute to resting-state functional connectivity
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Resting-state fMRI (rsfMRI) scans—acquired in the absence of experimentally controlled stimuli or task demands—are widely used to identify aberrant patterns of functional connectivity (FC) in clinical populations. To minimize interpretational uncertainty, researchers routinely control for across-cohort disparities in age, gender, comorbidities, and head motion. Yet, studies rarely consider the possibility that systematic differences in inner experience (i.e., how subjects think and feel during the scan) directly affect FC measures. Here, using an rsfMRI dataset comprising 469 scans with retrospective experiential annotations, we show that summary descriptors of in-scanner experience are reproducible across visits and subject-specific, consistent with trait-like characteristics. We further show that widespread significant differences in FC are observed between scans that are associated with different reported experiential profiles, and that FC can predict specific experiential dimensions with performance comparable to that reported for demographic, cognitive, and clinical variables. Together, these findings highlight the key role that in-scanner experience should play when interpreting FC in the context of rsfMRI. Given that the available experiential measures are retrospective summaries, these results speak to stable experiential tendencies rather than potential moment-to-moment, state-dependent relationships between ongoing experience and concurrent brain activity.
title_zh: 扫描仪内的想法有助于静息状态的功能连接
abstract_zh: 静息态功能磁共振成像 (rsfMRI) 扫描（在没有实验控制刺激或任务要求的情况下获得）被广泛用于识别临床人群中功能连接 (FC) 的异常模式。为了最大限度地减少解释的不确定性，研究人员通常会控制年龄、性别、合并症和头部运动方面的跨群体差异。然而，研究很少考虑内部体验的系统差异（即受试者在扫描过程中如何思考和感受）直接影响 FC 测量的可能性。在这里，使用包含 469 次扫描和回顾性经验注释的 rsfMRI 数据集，我们表明扫描仪内体验的摘要描述符在访问和特定主题中是可重复的，与类特质特征一致。我们进一步表明，在与不同报告的经验概况相关的扫描之间观察到 FC 存在广泛的显着差异，并且 FC 可以预测特定的经验维度，其性能与报告的人口统计、认知和临床变量相当。总之，这些发现强调了在 rsfMRI 背景下解释 FC 时扫描仪内体验应发挥的关键作用。鉴于可用的经验测量是回顾性总结，这些结果说明了稳定的经验倾向，而不是持续的经验和并发的大脑活动之间潜在的时刻到时刻、状态依赖的关系。

title: Active-learning-guided optimization of cell-free systems for genome-wide transcriptomic profiling reveals progressive layers of regulation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Understanding genome regulation is limited by the complexity of molecular interactions in living cells. Cell-free systems provide a simplified platform for studying gene expression, but low mRNA levels have prevented RNA-seq. To address this, we develop an active learning workflow combining Bayesian optimization with automated high-throughput experimentation to systematically explore over 1.6 million buffer compositions, experimentally testing 653. We identify a “mRNA-optimized” buffer (20-fold increase in mRNA yield) and a “trade-off” buffer (13-fold increase while maintaining protein production). Using direct RNA-seq, we profile the T7 phage transcriptome in cell-free systems and compare it with a purified T7-RNAP transcription system and phage-infected bacteria. This comparative analysis reveals distinct regulatory layers: the T7-RNAP system captures promoter-strength hierarchies but lacks RNA degradation, whereas cell-free systems provide an accurate estimation of in vivo expression and reveal mRNA maturation sites. This work establishes cell-free transcriptomics as a controlled approach to study genome regulation.
title_zh: 主动学习引导的全基因组转录组分析无细胞系统优化揭示了渐进的调控层
abstract_zh: 了解基因组调控受到活细胞中分子相互作用的复杂性的限制。无细胞系统为研究基因表达提供了一个简化的平台，但低 mRNA 水平阻碍了 RNA 测序。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个主动学习工作流程，将贝叶斯优化与自动化高通量实验相结合，系统地探索超过 160 万种缓冲液成分，并通过实验测试了 653 种缓冲液成分。我们确定了“mRNA 优化”缓冲液（mRNA 产量增加 20 倍）和“权衡”缓冲液（在保持蛋白质产量的同时增加 13 倍）。使用直接 RNA 测序，我们分析了无细胞系统中的 T7 噬菌体转录组，并将其与纯化的 T7-RNAP 转录系统和噬菌体感染的细菌进行比较。这种比较分析揭示了不同的调控层：T7-RNAP 系统捕获启动子强度层次结构，但缺乏 RNA 降解，而无细胞系统提供体内表达的准确估计并揭示 mRNA 成熟位点。这项工作将无细胞转录组学建立为研究基因组调控的受控方法。

title: Covalent pan-TEAD inhibitors block YAP activity and demonstrate brain penetrance in a Hippo-dependent cancer model
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: TEAD transcription factors enable the oncogenic activity of deregulated Hippo signaling and are a promising therapeutic target in oncology. Targeting the TEAD lipid pocket is an established path to inhibit the oncogenic activities of cofactors YAP and TAZ. Here we present two pan-TEAD inhibitors, GNE-8025 and its in vivo brain-penetrant derivative GNE-2181, that covalently bind the lipid pocket at a conserved cysteine. Both small molecules show growth inhibition of YAP-driven tumor cells in vitro and in vivo. Moreover, we show that GNE-8025 increases the activity of a broad range of MAPK pathway inhibitors in vitro as well as the KRASG12C inhibitor Divarasib both in vitro and in vivo. In addition, GNE-2181 inhibits growth of an intracranial tumor model in vivo. Altogether we present a next-generation class of TEAD inhibitors representing a significant advancement towards potent, specific, and effective Hippo-targeting cancer therapies.
title_zh: 共价泛 TEAD 抑制剂可阻断 YAP 活性并在 Hippo 依赖性癌症模型中显示脑外显率
abstract_zh: TEAD 转录因子能够解除 Hippo 信号传导的致癌活性，是肿瘤学中有前途的治疗靶点。靶向 TEAD 脂质袋是抑制辅因子 YAP 和 TAZ 致癌活性的既定途径。在这里，我们提出了两种泛 TEAD 抑制剂，GNE-8025 及其体内脑渗透衍生物 GNE-2181，它们在保守的半胱氨酸处共价结合脂质袋。这两种小分子在体外和体内均表现出对 YAP 驱动的肿瘤细胞生长的抑制作用。此外，我们还发现 GNE-8025 可以在体外增强多种 MAPK 通路抑制剂的活性，并在体外和体内增强 KRASG12C 抑制剂 Divarasib 的活性。此外，GNE-2181 还能抑制体内颅内肿瘤模型的生长。总之，我们推出了下一代 TEAD 抑制剂，代表着强效、特异性和有效的 Hippo 靶向癌症疗法的重大进步。

title: Haplotype-resolved genome assembly sheds light on the evolutionary history of autohexaploid Tripidium arundinaceum
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Tripidium arundinaceum, a wild perennial grass with exceptional stress tolerance, has been tested in sugarcane breeding. Its complex polyploid genome has hindered understanding of its evolution and adaptive traits. Here, we present a high-quality, haplotype-resolved reference genome for autohexaploid T. arundinaceum Hainan92-105 (2n = 6x = 60). T. arundinaceum is likely originated from a diploid ancestor approximately 1.31 million years ago and contains abundant repetitive sequences from two major recent bursts of long terminal repeat retrotransposons following polyploidization. Phylogenetic analyses place Saccharum closer to Sorghum bicolor than to T. arundinaceum, indicating that the polyploidizations in these two lineages occurred independently. Population genomics analysis reveals southwestern China (Yunnan) as a diversity center for T. arundinaceum within China. Genotype–environment associations highlight temperature and precipitation as key local adaptation drivers mediated by stress-associated genes. This study provides a genomic resource for understanding polyploid evolution and climate adaptation in T. arundinaceum.
title_zh: 单倍型解析的基因组组装揭示了同源六倍体Tripidium arundinaceum的进化史
abstract_zh: Tripidium arundinaceum 是一种具有出色抗逆性的野生多年生草本植物，已在甘蔗育种中进行了测试。其复杂的多倍体基因组阻碍了对其进化和适应性特征的理解。在这里，我们提出了同源六倍体 T. arundinaceum Hainan92-105 (2n = 6x = 60) 的高质量、单倍型解析的参考基因组。 T. arundinaceum 可能起源于大约 131 万年前的二倍体祖先，并且包含来自多倍化后最近两次主要的长末端重复反转录转座子爆发的丰富重复序列。系统发育分析表明，甘蔗与高粱的关系比与高粱的关系更近，表明这两个谱系的多倍化是独立发生的。群体基因组学分析表明，中国西南部（云南）是中国青茅的多样性中心。基因型-环境关联强调温度和降水是由应激相关基因介导的关键局部适应驱动因素。这项研究为了解青冈的多倍体进化和气候适应提供了基因组资源。

title: The quantitative contribution of different Photosystem II compartments to non-photochemical quenching in Arabidopsis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Excess excitation energy in the light-harvesting antenna of Photosystem II (PSII) can cause irreversible damage to the photosynthetic apparatus. In periods of high light intensity, a feedback mechanism known as non-photochemical quenching (NPQ) induces the formation of quenchers, which can safely dissipate excess excitation energy as heat. Although quenchers have been identified in more than one compartment of the PSII supercomplex, there is currently no quantitative description of the extent to which NPQ occurs at each of these locations. Here, we perform time-resolved fluorescence measurements on Arabidopsis thaliana WT and antenna mutants lacking LHCII trimers (koLHCII) and all peripheral antenna (Ch1lhcb5). By combining the results with those from steady-state fluorescence experiments, we are able to estimate the intrinsic rate of NPQ for each plant and each PSII compartment. It is concluded that more than 70% of quenching occurs in LHCII, less than 10% in the minor antenna, and the rest is associated with the PSII core.
title_zh: 拟南芥中不同光系统II区室对非光化学猝灭的定量贡献
abstract_zh: 光系统 II (PSII) 的光捕获天线中的过量激发能量会对光合作用装置造成不可逆的损害。在高光强度时期，一种称为非光化学猝灭（NPQ）的反馈机制会诱导猝灭剂的形成，猝灭剂可以安全地以热量的形式消散多余的激发能。尽管已在 PSII 超复合物的多个区室中鉴定出猝灭剂，但目前还没有定量描述 NPQ 在每个位置发生的程度。在这里，我们对拟南芥 WT 和缺乏 LHCII 三聚体 (koLHCII) 的天线突变体和所有外围天线 (Ch1lhcb5) 进行时间分辨荧光测量。通过将结果与稳态荧光实验的结果相结合，我们能够估计每个植物和每个 PSII 区室的 NPQ 内在速率。结论是70%以上的猝灭发生在LHCII中，小于10%发生在小天线中，其余与PSII核心有关。

title: Electrocatalytic galvanic cells: A paradigm toward spontaneous chemicals synthesis and electricity generation
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Electrocatalytic galvanic cells redefine electrochemical energy conversion by enabling the spontaneous co-production of chemicals and electricity from renewable and waste feedstocks.
title_zh: 电催化原电池：自发化学合成和发电的范例
abstract_zh: 电催化原电池通过利用可再生和废弃原料自发联产化学品和电力，重新定义了电化学能量转换。

title: Structural basis for multivitamin recognition and transport by human SMVT
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The human sodium-dependent multivitamin transporter (SMVT, SLC5A6) mediates cellular uptake of essential metabolic cofactors, including biotin, pantothenate, and lipoate. Its dysfunction is associated with neurological disorders, metabolic abnormalities, and cancer. However, the molecular mechanism underlying its multi-substrate transport has remained elusive. Here, we present cryo-electron microscopy structures of human SMVT in three conformational states: occluded, outward-open, and inward-open. These structural snapshots capture the complete transport cycle and reveal a conserved substrate-binding pocket near a kinked transmembrane helix (TM1). Within this pocket, substrate carboxyl groups are electrostatically anchored, while distinct chemical moieties interact with specific polar and hydrophobic residues. Functional assays identify key binding residues and elucidate the pathogenic effects of disease-associated mutations. Further structural analysis delineates the principles of substrate discrimination within the SLC5 transporter family. Together, our work provides a structural framework for SMVT’s polyspecificity and lays a foundation for understanding related diseases and developing targeted therapeutic strategies.
title_zh: 人类 SMVT 识别和运输多种维生素的结构基础
abstract_zh: 人钠依赖性多种维生素转运蛋白（SMVT、SLC5A6）介导细胞对必需代谢辅因子的摄取，包括生物素、泛酸和硫辛酸。其功能障碍与神经系统疾病、代谢异常和癌症有关。然而，其多底物运输的分子机制仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们展示了人类 SMVT 三种构象状态的冷冻电子显微镜结构：闭塞、向外开放和向内开放。这些结构快照捕获了完整的运输循环，并揭示了扭结的跨膜螺旋 (TM1) 附近的保守底物结合口袋。在这个口袋内，底物羧基被静电锚定，而不同的化学部分与特定的极性和疏水残基相互作用。功能测定可识别关键结合残基并阐明疾病相关突变的致病作用。进一步的结构分析描述了 SLC5 转运蛋白家族内底物区分的原理。总之，我们的工作为 SMVT 的多特异性提供了一个结构框架，并为了解相关疾病和制定有针对性的治疗策略奠定了基础。

title: Splenic macrophage-B cell axis drives systemic autoimmune-like pathology in Cerebral Malaria
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Cerebral malaria (CM) is a severe complication of Plasmodium infection, classically attributed to parasite sequestration and neuroinflammation. Here, we uncover a spleen-centered humoral autoimmune circuit that drives CM pathology. Proteomic analyses identify CD36 as a dominant host-derived antigen enriched in infected red blood cells (iRBCs), triggering anti-CD36 autoantibody production in patients with falciparum malaria. Although contributing to iRBCs clearance, these autoantibodies also target other CD36-expressing cells, thereby driving thrombocytopenia, endothelial injury, and macrophage activation, ultimately amplifying systemic inflammation. Mechanistically, Plasmodium infection recruits Ly6c+Glut1hi macrophages to the spleen through the CCL2-CCR2 axis. These macrophages exhibit elevated proteasome activity and drive B cell activation and anti-CD36 antibody production. Targeting Ly6c+Glut1hi macrophages, we develop Glutoborin, a GLUT1-directed proteasome inhibitor that preferentially suppresses their function, reduces autoantibody production, and alleviates CM-associated pathology in vivo. Together, these findings establish a spleen-centered anti-CD36 autoimmune circuit as a key driver of CM and nominate Ly6c+Glut1hi macrophages as therapeutic targets.
title_zh: 脾巨噬细胞-B 细胞轴驱动脑型疟疾的系统性自身免疫样病理学
abstract_zh: 脑型疟疾（CM）是疟原虫感染的严重并发症，通常归因于寄生虫隔离和神经炎症。在这里，我们发现了一个以脾脏为中心的体液自身免疫回路，它驱动 CM 病理学。蛋白质组学分析确定 CD36 是一种主要的宿主来源抗原，富含受感染的红细胞 (iRBC)，可触发恶性疟疾患者产生抗 CD36 自身抗体。虽然有助于 iRBC 清除，但这些自身抗体也靶向其他表达 CD36 的细胞，从而导致血小板减少、内皮损伤和巨噬细胞活化，最终放大全身炎症。从机制上讲，疟原虫感染通过 CCL2-CCR2 轴将 Ly6c+Glut1hi 巨噬细胞招募到脾脏。这些巨噬细胞表现出升高的蛋白酶体活性并驱动 B 细胞激活和抗 CD36 抗体产生。针对 Ly6c+Glut1hi 巨噬细胞，我们开发了 Glutoborin，一种 GLUT1 定向的蛋白酶体抑制剂，可优先抑制其功能，减少自身抗体的产生，并减轻体内 CM 相关病理。总之，这些发现确立了以脾脏为中心的抗 CD36 自身免疫回路作为 CM 的关键驱动因素，并指定 Ly6c+Glut1hi 巨噬细胞作为治疗靶点。

title: NAD+ modulates mitochondrial vulnerability in MERTK-associated models of retinitis pigmentosa
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Retinitis pigmentosa (RP) is the most common inherited retinal degenerative disease leading to blindness. RP is characterized by progressive loss of photoreceptors and retinal pigment epithelium (RPE), leading to retinal degeneration. The mechanisms that initiate RP and drive retinal vulnerability are poorly understood, and new strategies for preventing and treating RP are urgently needed. Although mitochondrial dysfunction initiates many neurodegenerative diseases, the contribution of mitochondrial dysfunction to RP is unclear. Single-cell RNA sequencing, transmission electron microscopy, and enzyme-linked immunosorbent assays revealed that photoreceptor and RPE cells have abnormal mitochondria in rats with RP. Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+) metabolism decreased in rats with RP, increasing the vulnerability to disease-related insults. Similar experimental results were observed in a Mer tyrosine kinase receptor (MERTK)-associated RP primary human RPE cell model. Electroretinography, immunofluorescence, and fundus photography revealed that oral administration of the NAD+ precursor nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN) protected rats with RP from retinal degeneration. Single-cell RNA sequencing, siRNA targeting, and Adeno-associated virus applications demonstrated that NMN elicits therapeutic effects via the glyceraldehyde-phosphate dehydrogenase-mitochondria pathway. These results indicate that mitochondrial abnormalities may be drivers of RP, and NMN elicits therapeutic effects on RP.
title_zh: NAD+ 调节 MERTK 相关视网膜色素变性模型中的线粒体脆弱性
abstract_zh: 色素性视网膜炎（RP）是最常见的导致失明的遗传性视网膜退行性疾病。 RP 的特点是光感受器和视网膜色素上皮 (RPE) 逐渐丧失，导致视网膜变性。人们对引发 RP 和导致视网膜脆弱性的机制知之甚少，迫切需要预防和治疗 RP 的新策略。尽管线粒体功能障碍会引发许多神经退行性疾病，但线粒体功能障碍对 RP 的影响尚不清楚。单细胞 RNA 测序、透射电子显微镜和酶联免疫吸附测定显示 RP 大鼠的光感受器和 RPE 细胞具有异常线粒体。 RP 大鼠的烟酰胺腺嘌呤二核苷酸 (NAD+) 代谢下降，增加了对疾病相关损伤的脆弱性。在 Mer 酪氨酸激酶受体 (MERTK) 相关 RP 原代人 RPE 细胞模型中观察到类似的实验结果。视网膜电图、免疫荧光和眼底照相显示，口服 NAD+ 前体烟酰胺单核苷酸 (NMN) 可保护 RP 大鼠免受视网膜变性。单细胞 RNA 测序、siRNA 靶向和腺相关病毒应用表明，NMN 通过甘油醛-磷酸脱氢酶-线粒体途径产生治疗效果。这些结果表明线粒体异常可能是 RP 的驱动因素，而 NMN 对 RP 具有治疗作用。

title: Targeting macrophage ferritin heavy chain mitigates ferroptosis and lung injury in experimental acute respiratory distress syndrome
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Ferritin, composed of heavy chain (FTH1) and light chain (FTL) subunits, is a key intracellular iron storage protein, but the origin and biological role of extracellular ferritin (ex-ferritin) remain poorly understood. Elevated serum ex-ferritin is associated with worse outcomes in acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS). Here, we show that both FTH1 and FTL are significantly enriched in the serum, blood monocytes, and alveolar macrophages (AM) of individuals with ARDS, findings we replicate in a murine hyperoxia-induced acute lung injury model. Myeloid-specific FTH1 (Fth1ΔLysM) deletion attenuates lung injury, and is associated with reduced macrophage ferroptosis, altered airway inflammatory responses, lower extracellular iron and compensatory secretion of FTL-ex-ferritin. While pharmacologic ferroptosis inhibition prior to hyperoxia had no effect, transplantation of FTL-ex-ferritin-enriched bronchoalveolar lavage fluid conferred protection from lung injury. These findings identify macrophage ferritin metabolism and ex-ferritin secretion as critical regulators of lung injury, offering new insights into the pathobiology of ARDS.
title_zh: 靶向巨噬细胞铁蛋白重链可减轻实验性急性呼吸窘迫综合征中的铁死亡和肺损伤
abstract_zh: 铁蛋白由重链 (FTH1) 和轻链 (FTL) 亚基组成，是一种关键的细胞内铁储存蛋白，但细胞外铁蛋白 (ex-ferritin) 的起源和生物学作用仍知之甚少。血清前铁蛋白升高与急性呼吸窘迫综合征 (ARDS) 的不良结局相关。在这里，我们发现 FTH1 和 FTL 在 ARDS 个体的血清、血液单核细胞和肺泡巨噬细胞 (AM) 中显着富集，我们在小鼠高氧诱导的急性肺损伤模型中复制了这一发现。骨髓特异性 FTH1 (Fth1ΔLysM) 缺失可减轻肺损伤，并与巨噬细胞铁死亡减少、气道炎症反应改变、细胞外铁降低和 FTL-前铁蛋白的代偿性分泌相关。虽然高氧前的药物铁死亡抑制没有作用，但移植富含 FTL-ex-铁蛋白的支气管肺泡灌洗液可防止肺损伤。这些发现确定巨噬细胞铁蛋白代谢和前铁蛋白分泌是肺损伤的关键调节因子，为 ARDS 的病理学提供了新的见解。

title: The role of supraoptic hypothalamic arginine vasopressin neurons in aging-associated water balance and thermoregulatory deficits in male mice
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Aging disrupts physiological homeostasis, impairing thermoregulation, metabolism, and water balance, but the underlying neural mechanisms remain unclear. Here, we identify arginine vasopressin (AVP) neurons in the supraoptic nucleus (SON) of the hypothalamus as a critical driver of these changes in male mice. Single-nucleus RNA-sequencing revealed Avp among the most upregulated neuronal transcripts with age. Aged SONAVP neurons displayed enlarged size and heightened excitability, features consistent with hyperactivity. Chemogenetic activation of SONAVP neurons in young mice reproduced aging-associated phenotypes including hypothermia, reduced energy expenditure, and suppressed water intake. Conversely, knockdown of Avp in the SON of aged mice restored water balance, partially improved thermoregulation and metabolism. Pharmacological studies demonstrated that neuroendocrine AVP signaling mediates these deficits through distinct contributions of V1A and V2 receptors. These findings identify SONAVP neurons as a central regulator of physiological aging and a potential therapeutic target for age-related homeostatic dysfunction.
title_zh: 视上下丘脑精氨酸加压素神经元在雄性小鼠衰老相关水平衡和体温调节缺陷中的作用
abstract_zh: 衰老会破坏生理稳态，损害体温调节、新陈代谢和水平衡，但潜在的神经机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们确定下丘脑视上核（SON）中的精氨酸加压素（AVP）神经元是雄性小鼠这些变化的关键驱动因素。单核 RNA 测序显示，随着年龄的增长，Avp 是上调最多的神经元转录物之一。老化的 SONAVP 神经元表现出增大的尺寸和增强的兴奋性，这些特征与多动症一致。年轻小鼠 SONAVP 神经元的化学遗传学激活再现了与衰老相关的表型，包括体温过低、能量消耗减少和水摄入量抑制。相反，敲低老年小鼠 SON 中的 Avp 可恢复水平衡，部分改善体温调节和新陈代谢。药理学研究表明，神经内分泌 AVP 信号通过 V1A 和 V2 受体的不同贡献来介导这些缺陷。这些发现表明 SONAVP 神经元是生理衰老的中心调节器，也是年龄相关稳态功能障碍的潜在治疗靶点。

title: Bispecific antibody engineered extracellular vesicles redirect T cells to prevent postoperative epidural fibrosis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Epidural fibrosis (EF) is a frequent and debilitating complication that impairs recovery following spinal surgery, yet effective targeted therapies are lacking. Here we observe enrichment of FAP⁺ fibroblasts at surgical sites in patients after laminectomy. To therapeutically target this subset, we develop bispecific antibody–decorated extracellular vesicles (BsAb EVs), which redirect endogenous T cells to eliminate FAP⁺ fibroblasts in situ. In a preclinical model, BsAb EVs selectively eliminate pathogenic fibroblasts, reduce fibrotic collagen accumulation, and prevent the development of postoperative epidural fibrosis without detectable systemic toxicity under the tested conditions. Single-cell RNA sequencing reveals that FAP⁺ fibroblasts represent a transcriptionally distinct subset from α-SMA⁺ myofibroblasts, characterized by enhanced extracellular matrix remodeling and TGF-β production. Together, these findings highlight a critical stromal subset in EF pathogenesis and position BsAb EVs as a promising immunotherapeutic strategy for targeting pathogenic stromal cells in fibrotic and tissue-remodeling disorders.
title_zh: 双特异性抗体工程细胞外囊泡重定向 T 细胞以预防术后硬膜外纤维化
abstract_zh: 硬膜外纤维化 (EF) 是一种常见且令人衰弱的并发症，会损害脊柱手术后的恢复，但缺乏有效的靶向治疗。在这里，我们观察椎板切除术后患者手术部位 FAP⁺ 成纤维细胞的富集。为了在治疗上针对这一亚群，我们开发了双特异性抗体修饰的细胞外囊泡（BsAb EV），它可以重定向内源性 T 细胞以原位消除 FAP⁺ 成纤维细胞。在临床前模型中，BsAb EV 选择性消除致病性成纤维细胞，减少纤维化胶原积累，并防止术后硬膜外纤维化的发展，在测试条件下未检测到全身毒性。单细胞 RNA 测序表明，FAP⁺ 成纤维细胞代表了与 α-SMA⁺ 肌成纤维细胞在转录上不同的子集，其特征是细胞外基质重塑和 TGF-β 生成增强。总之，这些发现强调了 EF 发病机制中的一个关键基质子集，并将 BsAb EV 定位为一种有前途的免疫治疗策略，用于靶向纤维化和组织重塑疾病中的致病性基质细胞。

title: Abrupt permafrost thaw drives exceptional carbon release across the Tibetan Plateau
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Climate warming is accelerating abrupt permafrost thaw, driving substantial carbon emissions. Retrogressive thaw slumps (RTSs) represent the most severe instance of abrupt permafrost thaw, yet their carbon emissions remain poorly quantified due to limited observations. Here, by synthesizing 4728 RTS incidents and 1862 in-situ CO2 and CH4 measurements from RTS-affected zones across the Tibetan Plateau, we estimate that the area of RTS susceptibility will expand by 17–19% by 2100 relative to 2022, driven primarily by precipitation changes. Compared to control areas, the ecosystem respiration rate in collapsed areas decreases by 14.4%, while CH4 release rate increases by 20.0%. The combined CO2 and CH4 release associated with RTS expansion increased 1.1-fold between 2016 and 2022. Under the intermediate Shared Socioeconomic Pathways scenario, carbon emissions from RTS-susceptible areas are projected to surge 2.7-fold by 2100. These findings highlight that abrupt thaw strengthens permafrost carbon-climate feedback in high-altitude regions, underscoring the urgent need for targeted permafrost protection strategies to achieve carbon neutrality goals.
title_zh: 永久冻土突然融化导致青藏高原异常碳释放
abstract_zh: 气候变暖正在加速永久冻土的突然融化，导致大量碳排放。倒退解冻塌陷（RTS）代表了永久冻土突然融化的最严重情况，但由于观测有限，其碳排放量仍然很难量化。在此，通过综合青藏高原受 RTS 影响区域的 4728 个 RTS 事件和 1862 个 CO2 和 CH4 现场测量，我们估计到 2100 年 RTS 易感性区域将比 2022 年扩大 17-19%，这主要是由降水变化驱动的。与对照区相比，塌陷区生态系统呼吸速率降低了14.4%，CH4释放速率增加了20.0%。 2016 年至 2022 年间，与 RTS 扩张相关的二氧化碳和甲烷排放总量增加了 1.1 倍。在中间共享社会经济路径情景下，到 2100 年，RTS 易受影响地区的碳排放量预计将激增 2.7 倍。这些发现强调，突然解冻加强了高海拔地区的永久冻土碳气候反馈，强调迫切需要有针对性的永久冻土保护策略来实现碳排放中立目标。

title: Multilayered control of mRNA delivery to cell protrusions drives localized mini-cytoplasm establishment for stress-induced cell activation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: In response to stress, cells exploit plasticity to self-activate and form protrusions that explore the environment and guide migration. While protrusion initiation is well characterized, their maturation and functional composition remain poorly understood. Here, using a new pooled genetic approach (ReGenT-seq) to interrogate chromatin factors controlling epidermal progenitor activation, we unexpectedly identified Cbx3 as a critical determinant of protrusion formation. Beyond its nuclear activities, we revealed a cytoplasmic moonlighting function of CBX3 that governs the subcellular localization of specific mRNAs within polarizing protrusions of migrating epidermal progenitor cells, as well as in invadopodia of squamous carcinoma cells. CBX3-dependent mRNA transport promotes the localized establishment of multiple organelles, including the endoplasmic reticulum and lysosomes, within maturing protrusions, and regulates focal adhesion dynamics. Together, our findings uncover a multilayered gene regulatory mechanism controlling cell motility through protrusionogenesis and identify a chromatin-to-cell-protrusion mRNA transport pathway that represents a potential therapeutic target for enhancing wound healing and limiting cancer invasion.
title_zh: mRNA 递送至细胞突起的多层控制可驱动局部微型细胞质的建立，从而实现应激诱导的细胞激活
abstract_zh: 为了应对压力，细胞利用可塑性进行自我激活并形成突出物，探索环境并引导迁移。虽然突起的起始已得到很好的表征，但它们的成熟和功能组成仍然知之甚少。在这里，使用新的汇集遗传方法 (ReGenT-seq) 来询问控制表皮祖细胞激活的染色质因子，我们意外地发现 Cbx3 是突起形成的关键决定因素。除了其核活动之外，我们还揭示了 CBX3 的细胞质兼职功能，该功能控制迁移表皮祖细胞的极化突起内以及鳞状癌细胞的侵袭伪足中特定 mRNA 的亚细胞定位。 CBX3 依赖性 mRNA 运输促进成熟突起内多个细胞器（包括内质网和溶酶体）的局部建立，并调节粘着斑动力学。总之，我们的研究结果揭示了通过突起发生控制细胞运动的多层基因调控机制，并确定了染色质到细胞突起的 mRNA 运输途径，该途径代表了增强伤口愈合和限制癌症侵袭的潜在治疗靶点。

title: Brain-inspired spatial intelligence for embodied agents
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Spatial cognition enables adaptive goal-directed behavior through structured internal models of space. Robust biological systems consolidate spatial knowledge into three interconnected forms: landmarks for salient cues, route knowledge for movement trajectories, and survey knowledge for map-like representations. While recent advances in multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have enabled visual-language reasoning in embodied agents, these efforts lack structured spatial memory and instead operate reactively, limiting their generalization and adaptability in complex real-world environments. Here we present Brain-inspired Spatial Cognition for Navigation (BSC-Nav), a unified framework for constructing and leveraging structured spatial memory in embodied agents. BSC-Nav builds allocentric cognitive maps from egocentric trajectories and contextual cues, and dynamically retrieves spatial knowledge aligned with semantic goals. Integrated with powerful MLLMs, BSC-Nav achieves state-of-the-art efficacy and efficiency across diverse embodied navigation tasks (e.g., improving success weighted by path length from 17.6% to 44.9% in instance-level navigation and from 42.7% to 53.1% in zero-shot long-horizon instruction-following), while also supporting versatile embodied behaviors in the real physical world. These results highlight a scalable path toward general-purpose spatial intelligence.
title_zh: 实体主体的受大脑启发的空间智能
abstract_zh: 空间认知通过结构化的内部空间模型实现自适应目标导向行为。强大的生物系统将空间知识整合为三种相互关联的形式：显着线索的地标、运动轨迹的路线知识以及类地图表示的调查知识。虽然多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的最新进展使得实体代理能够进行视觉语言推理，但这些努力缺乏结构化空间记忆，而是反应性操作，限制了它们在复杂现实环境中的泛化和适应性。在这里，我们提出了受大脑启发的空间认知导航（BSC-Nav），这是一个用于在实体代理中构建和利用结构化空间记忆的统一框架。 BSC-Nav 根据自我中心轨迹和上下文线索构建异中心认知地图，并动态检索与语义目标一致的空间知识。与强大的 MLLM 集成，BSC-Nav 在各种具体化导航任务中实现了最先进的功效和效率（例如，在实例级导航中将按路径长度加权的成功率从 17.6% 提高到 44.9%，在零样本长视野指令跟踪中将成功率从 42.7% 提高到 53.1%），同时还支持现实物理世界中的多种具体化行为。这些结果凸显了通向通用空间智能的可扩展路径。
