title: Steatosis shapes prognosis-defining liver metastasis heterogeneity in CRC
source: Nature
abstract: Patients with colorectal cancer (CRC) frequently develop liver metastases1,2,3. The prognosis of these patients is skewed by the histopathological heterogeneity of their liver metastases4,5. Patients with ‘replacement’ metastases have a 5-year overall survival of less than 44.2%, compared with 73.4% in patients with ‘encapsulated’ (previously known as desmoplastic) metastases5; yet there are currently no approved therapies targeting replacement liver metastases. Here we show that treatment-naive patients with CRC with liver steatosis have an increased occurrence of replacement metastases compared with patients without steatosis. Mechanistically, we find that steatosis-promoted fatty acid oxidation increases formation of replacement metastases by increasing MYC stability through acetylation. In turn, MYC activates proline synthesis, fuelling collagen production, enabling growth of replacement metastases. Targeting MYC, P5CS or COL1A1 suppresses the occurrence and growth of replacement metastases in patient-derived organoids, mouse or patient-derived xenograft models. Spatial metabolite and protein analyses of liver metastases from patients with CRC further support this mechanism. In conclusion, we provide a mechanistic understanding of the emergence of liver metastases with poor prognosis in treatment-naive patients with CRC, identifying potential targets for therapeutic intervention.
title_zh: 脂肪变性塑造结直肠癌中决定预后的肝转移异质性
abstract_zh: 结直肠癌 (CRC) 患者经常发生肝转移1,2,3。这些患者的预后因其肝转移的组织病理学异质性而产生偏差4,5。患有“替代性”转移的患者的 5 年总生存率低于 44.2%，而患有“包膜”（以前称为促纤维增生性）转移的患者的 5 年总生存率为 73.4%5；然而，目前还没有针对替代性肝转移的批准疗法。在这里，我们发现，与没有脂肪变性的患者相比，未经治疗的患有肝脂肪变性的结直肠癌患者的替代转移发生率更高。从机制上讲，我们发现脂肪变性促进的脂肪酸氧化通过乙酰化增加 MYC 稳定性，从而增加替代转移的形成。反过来，MYC 会激活脯氨酸合成，促进胶原蛋白的产生，从而促进替代转移瘤的生长。靶向 MYC、P5CS 或 COL1A1 可抑制患者来源的类器官、小鼠或患者来源的异种移植模型中替代转移的发生和生长。 CRC 患者肝转移的空间代谢物和蛋白质分析进一步支持了这一机制。总之，我们对未经治疗的 CRC 患者出现预后不良的肝转移的机制进行了了解，并确定了治疗干预的潜在目标。

title: Chlorinated VSLSs Surpass HCFCs in CFC-11-Equivalent Emissions for Ozone Layer Depletion in China
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Escalating emissions of chlorinated very short-lived substances (Cl-VSLSs), which remain unregulated under the Montreal Protocol, could delay the recovery of the global ozone layer. In this study, we developed a comprehensive sectoral and regional bottom-up emission inventory of the two most abundant Cl-VSLSs, dichloromethane (CH2Cl2) and chloroform (CHCl3), from 2010 to 2023 in China, alongside projections to 2035. Our best estimates indicate an upward trend in historical emissions for both substances, with CH2Cl2 emissions more than doubling since 2010, and both species are projected to grow substantially by 2035 under the Business-As-Usual (BAU) scenario. The implementation of best practicable technologies is projected to mitigate cumulative CH2Cl2 and CHCl3 emissions by approximately 50% and 7%, respectively, over 2024–2035. Crucially, projections indicate that the CFC-11 equivalent emissions of CH2Cl2 in China would exceed the country’s aggregate emissions of all hydrochlorofluorocarbons (HCFCs) annually from 2024 onwards under the BAU scenario. This study underscores the need for integrated domestic regulations and international negotiations to address the increasing threat from Cl-VSLSs to stratospheric ozone recovery.
title_zh: 中国臭氧层消耗的氯化 VSLS 的 CFC-11 当量排放量超过了 HCFC
abstract_zh: 氯化极短寿命物质（Cl-VSLS）的排放量不断增加，而这些物质仍然不受《蒙特利尔议定书》的管制，可能会延迟全球臭氧层的恢复。在这项研究中，我们针对 2010 年至 2023 年中国两种最丰富的 Cl-VSLS：二氯甲烷 (CH2Cl2) 和氯仿 (CHCl3) 制定了全面的部门和区域自下而上的排放清单，并预测到 2035 年。我们的最佳估计表明，这两种物质的历史排放量呈上升趋势，自 2010 年以来，CH2Cl2 排放量增加了一倍多，预计到 2023 年这两种物质的排放量将大幅增长。一切照常 (BAU) 情景下的 2035 年。预计最佳可行技术的实施将在 2024 年至 2035 年期间将 CH2Cl2 和 CHCl3 累积排放量分别减少约 50% 和 7%。至关重要的是，预测表明，在 BAU 情景下，从 2024 年起，中国每年的 CH2Cl2 CFC-11 当量排放量将超过该国每年所有氢氯氟碳化合物 (HCFC) 的排放总量。这项研究强调需要综合国内法规和国际谈判来解决 Cl-VSLS 对平流层臭氧恢复日益增加的威胁。

title: Dual tumour–myeloid targeting of glioblastoma with GPNMB CAR-T cells
source: Nature
abstract: Glioblastoma is a lethal brain tumour for which current multimodal treatment rarely prevents recurrence1. Therapeutic failure is driven by extensive intratumoural cellular heterogeneity2 with a microenvironment dominated by tumour-associated macrophages that sustain tumour growth and immunosuppression3. Although chimeric antigen receptor (CAR)-T cell therapies are being developed for glioblastoma, sustained response has been undermined by non-uniform antigen expression, antigen loss and microenvironmental barriers that are not directly engaged by tumour-targeting designs4. These limitations motivate new strategies that address the disease as a coupled tumour–immune system rather than a single malignant compartment. Here we use a multi-omic target discovery platform to identify GPNMB as a dual-compartment antigen in glioblastoma. Anti-GPNMB CAR-T cells showed potent anti-tumour activity, with long-term disease control in orthotopic patient-derived xenografts and syngeneic glioma models through concomitant depletion of GPNMB+ tumour and immunosuppressive myeloid populations. By collapsing tumour control and microenvironmental reprogramming, these findings provide a new strategy for antigen selection and targeting in heterogenous, myeloid-rich solid cancers.
title_zh: GPNMB CAR-T 细胞对胶质母细胞瘤的肿瘤-骨髓双重靶向
abstract_zh: 胶质母细胞瘤是一种致命的脑肿瘤，目前的多模式治疗很少能防止复发1。治疗失败的原因是广泛的肿瘤内细胞异质性2，其微环境以维持肿瘤生长和免疫抑制的肿瘤相关巨噬细胞为主3。尽管针对胶质母细胞瘤的嵌合抗原受体 (CAR)-T 细胞疗法正在开发中，但持续的反应已被不均匀的抗原表达、抗原丢失和与肿瘤靶向设计不直接相关的微环境障碍所破坏。这些限制激发了新的策略，将这种疾病作为一个耦合的肿瘤免疫系统而不是单一的恶性隔室来解决。在这里，我们使用多组学靶标发现平台将 GPNMB 鉴定为胶质母细胞瘤中的双室抗原。抗 GPNMB CAR-T 细胞显示出有效的抗肿瘤活性，通过同时消除 GPNMB+ 肿瘤和免疫抑制性骨髓细胞群，在原位患者来源的异种移植物和同基因神经胶质瘤模型中实现长期疾病控制。通过破坏肿瘤控制和微环境重编程，这些发现为异源、富含骨髓的实体癌的抗原选择和靶向提供了新策略。

title: A deep learning framework for efficient pathology image analysis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Artificial intelligence has transformed digital pathology by enabling biomarker prediction from high-resolution whole-slide images. However, current methods are computationally inefficient, processing thousands of redundant tiles per slide and requiring complex aggregation models. We introduce EAGLE (Efficient Approach for Guided Local Examination), a deep learning framework that emulates pathologists by selectively analyzing informative regions. EAGLE combines task-agnostic tile selection with detailed feature extraction and is benchmarked against leading slide- and tile-level foundation models across 43 tasks from nine cancer types spanning morphology, biomarker prediction, treatment response and prognosis. EAGLE outperforms patch aggregation methods by up to 23% and achieves the highest overall classification performance. It processes one slide in 2.27 s, reducing computational time by more than 99% compared with existing models. This efficiency supports rapid and auditable workflows by enabling review of the exact tiles used for each prediction and reducing dependence on high-performance computing. By reliably identifying informative regions and minimizing artifacts, EAGLE provides robust and auditable outputs, supported by systematic negative controls and attention concentration analyses. Its unified embedding enables rapid slide search, integration into multi-omics pipelines and emerging clinical foundation models.
title_zh: 用于高效病理图像分析的深度学习框架
abstract_zh: 人工智能通过高分辨率全玻片图像进行生物标志物预测，改变了数字病理学。然而，当前的方法计算效率低下，每张幻灯片处理数千个冗余图块，并且需要复杂的聚合模型。我们引入 EAGLE（引导局部检查的有效方法），这是一种深度学习框架，通过选择性分析信息区域来模仿病理学家。 EAGLE 将与任务无关的切片选择与详细特征提取相结合，并以领先的幻灯片和切片级基础模型为基准，涵盖 9 种癌症类型的 43 项任务，涵盖形态、生物标志物预测、治疗反应和预后。 EAGLE 的性能比补丁聚合方法高出 23%，并实现了最高的整体分类性能。它在 2.27 秒内处理一张幻灯片，与现有模型相比，计算时间减少了 99% 以上。这种效率支持快速且可审核的工作流程，支持审查用于每个预测的精确图块并减少对高性能计算的依赖。通过可靠地识别信息区域并最大程度地减少伪影，EAGLE 提供了稳健且可审计的输出，并得到系统性阴性对照和注意力集中分析的支持。其统一嵌入可实现快速载玻片搜索、集成到多组学流程和新兴临床基础模型中。

title: Developmental timing distinguishes pediatric and adult cancers through retention and rewiring mechanisms
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Oncogenic mutations can have fundamentally different consequences depending on the developmental state of the tissue in which they arise. We propose a unifying model in which early-life oncogenic events promote retention, stabilization of transient embryo-fetal transcriptional and epigenetic programs, whereas later-life mutations more often require rewiring, reactivating suppressed oncofetal states through stepwise transcriptional and chromatin remodeling. This temporal dimension helps explain why childhood and adult cancers can follow distinct lineage trajectories, behaviors, and therapeutic responses, even when initiated by the same genetic lesion. Incorporating developmental timing into cancer modeling and risk stratification may improve prognostic resolution and reveal stage-specific vulnerabilities.
title_zh: 发育时机通过保留和重新布线机制区分儿童和成人癌症
abstract_zh: 致癌突变可能会产生根本不同的后果，具体取决于它们产生的组织的发育状态。我们提出了一个统一的模型，其中早期致癌事件促进瞬时胚胎-胎儿转录和表观遗传程序的保留和稳定，而晚年突变通常需要重新布线，通过逐步转录和染色质重塑重新激活受抑制的致癌胎儿状态。这一时间维度有助于解释为什么儿童和成人癌症即使是由相同的基因病变引发的，也可以遵循不同的谱系轨迹、行为和治疗反应。将发育时间纳入癌症模型和风险分层可能会提高预后分辨率并揭示特定阶段的脆弱性。

title: A carboxylate switch point controls long-range energy transduction in respiratory Complex I
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Complex I is a highly intricate membrane-bound protein complex that powers the cellular energy metabolism by a long-range ( > 300 Å) proton-coupled electron transfer (PCET) reaction. Here, we investigate the highly debated coupling mechanism of Complex I by probing the charge transfer reaction along its functionally central carboxylate pathway (E-channel). By combining biophysical and site-directed mutagenesis experiments with high-resolution (2.6-2.8 Å) cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) and multiscale simulations, we identify a conserved carboxylate switch point (D79NuoA) that mediates proton transfer by establishing a kinetic gate and couples the redox chemistry to proton pumping. We find that mutation of the identified site, as found in patients suffering from severe neurodegenerative disorders, drastically perturbs the charge transfer mechanism, and results in a 20% PCET activity. Our combined findings illustrate mechanistic principles of molecular gates underlying long-range charge transfer reactions, and show how disease mutations perturb the function of conserved switch points in energy transduction.
title_zh: 羧酸盐开关点控制呼吸复合物 I 中的长程能量转换
abstract_zh: 复合物 I 是一种高度复杂的膜结合蛋白复合物，通过长程 (> 300 Å) 质子耦合电子转移 (PCET) 反应为细胞能量代谢提供动力。在这里，我们通过探索沿着其功能性中心羧酸途径（E通道）的电荷转移反应，研究了备受争议的复合物 I 的耦合机制。通过将生物物理和定点诱变实验与高分辨率（2.6-2.8 Å）冷冻电子显微镜（cryo-EM）和多尺度模拟相结合，我们确定了一个保守的羧酸盐开关点（D79NuoA），该点通过建立动力学门来介导质子转移并将氧化还原化学与质子泵耦合。我们发现，在患有严重神经退行性疾病的患者中发现的已识别位点的突变会极大地扰乱电荷转移机制，并导致 PCET 活性达到 20%。我们的综合发现阐明了长程电荷转移反应背后的分子门的机制原理，并显示了疾病突变如何扰乱能量转导中保守开关点的功能。

title: TMEM216 inhibits breast cancer lung metastasis by modulating IGF1R-IRS4 signaling pathway
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Breast cancer (BC) metastasis remains a major cause of mortality, yet the molecular mechanisms driving this process are incompletely understood. This study identifies TMEM216, a transmembrane protein implicated in ciliary homeostasis, as a suppressor of lung metastasis in BC. Using mammary-specific Tmem216 knockout mice, we demonstrate that Tmem216 deficiency promotes lung metastasis without affecting primary tumor proliferation. Clinical analyses reveal reduced TMEM216 expression in metastatic lesions and aggressive cell lines, correlating with poor patient distant metastasis-free survival. Mechanistically, TMEM216 interacts with IGF1R and binds to IRS4 via the conserved K79-D1049 interaction, disrupting the IGF1R-IRS4 complex formation and suppressing IGF pathway activation. Rescue experiments in vitro and in vivo confirm that TMEM216-mediated metastasis inhibition depends on IGF signaling modulation. Tissue microarray analyses further establish an inverse correlation between TMEM216 levels and IGF1R phosphorylation in BC patients, with low TMEM216 expression associated with advanced metastasis. These findings delineate TMEM216 as a critical regulator of the IGF1R-IRS4 axis, offering therapeutic opportunities for targeting metastatic BC.
title_zh: TMEM216通过调节IGF1R-IRS4信号通路抑制乳腺癌肺转移
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌（BC）转移仍然是死亡的主要原因，但驱动这一过程的分子机制尚不完全清楚。这项研究确定了 TMEM216（一种与纤毛稳态有关的跨膜蛋白）作为 BC 肺转移的抑制剂。使用乳腺特异性 Tmem216 敲除小鼠，我们证明 Tmem216 缺陷会促进肺转移，而不影响原发肿瘤增殖。临床分析显示，转移性病灶和侵袭性细胞系中 TMEM216 表达降低，与患者较差的无远处转移生存率相关。从机制上讲，TMEM216 与 IGF1R 相互作用，并通过保守的 K79-D1049 相互作用与 IRS4 结合，破坏 IGF1R-IRS4 复合物形成并抑制 IGF 通路激活。体外和体内救援实验证实，TMEM216 介导的转移抑制依赖于 IGF 信号传导调节。组织微阵列分析进一步确定了 BC 患者中 TMEM216 水平与 IGF1R 磷酸化之间的负相关性，TMEM216 低表达与晚期转移相关。这些发现表明 TMEM216 是 IGF1R-IRS4 轴的关键调节因子，为靶向转移性 BC 提供了治疗机会。

title: De novo EHMT2 variants cause an autosomal dominant EHMT2-related Kleefstra syndrome via loss of G9a methyltransferase activity
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: EHMT1 and EHMT2 genes encode human euchromatin histone lysine methyltransferase 1 and 2 (EHMT1 alias GLP; EHMT2 alias G9a) that form heteromeric GLP/G9a complexes with essential roles in epigenetic regulation of gene expression. While EHMT1 haploinsufficiency has been established as the cause of Kleefstra syndrome 1, the pathogenesis of G9a dysfunction in human disease remains largely unknown. We identified seven de novo EHMT2 variants in patients with clinical presentation, episignatures, histone modifications and transcriptomic profiles similar to those of Kleefstra syndrome 1. In vitro studies reveal that these variants encode for structurally stable G9a proteins that are catalytically incompetent due to aberrant interactions either with histone H3 tail or with S-adenosylmethionine. Heterozygous mice carrying a patient-derived variant exhibit growth retardation, facial/skull dysmorphia and aberrant behavior. Here we report pathogenic EHMT2 variants that likely exert dominant-negative effect on GLP/G9a complexes and thus genocopy the EHMT1 haploinsufficiency via a distinct molecular mechanism, defining an autosomal dominant EHMT2-related Kleefstra syndrome.
title_zh: 新的 EHMT2 变异通过 G9a 甲基转移酶活性的丧失导致常染色体显性 EHMT2 相关的 Kleefstra 综合征
abstract_zh: EHMT1 和 EHMT2 基因编码人常染色质组蛋白赖氨酸甲基转移酶 1 和 2（EHMT1 别名 GLP；EHMT2 别名 G9a），形成异聚 GLP/G9a 复合物，在基因表达的表观遗传调控中发挥重要作用。虽然 EHMT1 单倍体不足已被确定为 Kleefstra 综合征 1 的病因，但人类疾病中 G9a 功能障碍的发病机制仍然很大程度上未知。我们在临床表现、表观特征、组蛋白修饰和转录组谱与 Kleefstra 综合征 1 相似的患者中发现了 7 个从头的 EHMT2 变异。体外研究表明，这些变异编码结构稳定的 G9a 蛋白，由于与组蛋白 H3 尾部或与 S-腺苷甲硫氨酸的异常相互作用，这些蛋白催化能力不强。携带患者来源变异的杂合小鼠表现出生长迟缓、面部/头骨畸形和异常行为。在这里，我们报告了致病性 EHMT2 变异，可能对 GLP/G9a 复合物产生显性失活作用，从而通过独特的分子机制对 EHMT1 单倍体不足进行基因复制，定义了常染色体显性 EHMT2 相关的 Kleefstra 综合征。

title: Interferon-elicited lipoprotein metabolism in lung fibroblasts facilitates premetastatic niche formation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: While premetastatic niche formation is known to affect primary tumors lung metastases, the role of lung stromal cells in this process remains unclear. Here, by performing multiomics sequencing, we identify interferon-regulated CD34+fibroblasts that reshape the immunosuppressive lung microenvironment via VLDLR-mediated lipoprotein metabolism activation. Increased lipoprotein uptake facilitates intracellular lipid accumulation, followed by CD155 expression in fibroblasts. CD155+fibroblasts strongly induce cytotoxic CD8+T and NK cell exhaustion, resulting in the formation of a premetastatic niche. The genetic disruption of the interferon–VLDLR–CD155 axis robustly reinstates immune surveillance and suppresses lung metastasis in multiple tumor models. Notably, interferon-based therapy is potentiated by specific silencing of the interferon response in fibroblasts or CD155 blockade. Moreover, the FTO-YTHDF2-mediated STAT1 m6A modification results in differences in the interferon response. Collectively, our findings reveal how interferon-induced metabolic rewiring in fibroblasts promotes metastatic competence via CD155-mediated immune evasion, suggesting stromal-targeted strategies for treating lung metastasis.
title_zh: 干扰素引起的肺成纤维细胞脂蛋白代谢促进转移前生态位形成
abstract_zh: 虽然已知转移前生态位的形成会影响原发性肿瘤肺转移，但肺基质细胞在此过程中的作用仍不清楚。在这里，通过进行多组学测序，我们鉴定了干扰素调节的 CD34+ 成纤维细胞，它们通过 VLDLR 介导的脂蛋白代谢激活重塑免疫抑制肺微环境。脂蛋白摄取增加促进细胞内脂质积累，进而促进成纤维细胞中 CD155 的表达。 CD155+成纤维细胞强烈诱导细胞毒性CD8+T和NK细胞耗竭，导致转移前生态位的形成。干扰素-VLDLR-CD155轴的基因破坏可有力地恢复多种肿瘤模型中的免疫监视并抑制肺转移。值得注意的是，基于干扰素的治疗通过成纤维细胞中干扰素反应的特异性沉默或 CD155 阻断来增强。此外，FTO-YTHDF2 介导的 STAT1 m6A 修饰会导致干扰素反应的差异。总的来说，我们的研究结果揭示了干扰素诱导的成纤维细胞代谢重连如何通过 CD155 介导的免疫逃避来促进转移能力，从而提出了治疗肺转移的基质靶向策略。

title: Transposable elements impact the human regulatory landscape through cell type specific epigenomic associations
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Transposable elements (TEs) are DNA sequences able to create copies of themselves within the genome. TEs have been shown to act as cis-regulatory elements and be co-opted in the human genome. Thus, their impact might come from their relationship with the epigenome. However, a systematic analysis that relates TEs with chromatin histone marks across human cell types remains lacking. Here we leverage a dataset from the International Human Epigenome Consortium featuring 4867 uniformly processed ChIP-seq experiments for 6 histone marks across 47 cell types and show that TEs have drastically different enrichments levels across histone marks. We find that TEs are generally depleted but enriched in select contexts such as L1s in H3K9me3 histone mark. Notably, we identify 456 cell type-histone-TE triplets with strong cell-type specific enrichments and show that many of these triplets are associated with relevant biological processes.
title_zh: 转座因子通过细胞类型特异性表观基因组关联影响人类调控景观
abstract_zh: 转座元件 (TE) 是能够在基因组内创建自身副本的 DNA 序列。 TE 已被证明可以作为顺式调控元件并被纳入人类基因组中。因此，它们的影响可能来自于它们与表观基因组的关系。然而，仍然缺乏将 TE 与跨人类细胞类型的染色质组蛋白标记联系起来的系统分析。在这里，我们利用国际人类表观基因组联盟的数据集，该数据集包含 47 个细胞类型中 6 个组蛋白标记的 4867 个统一处理的 ChIP-seq 实验，并表明 TE 在组蛋白标记之间具有截然不同的富集水平。我们发现 TE 通常会被耗尽，但在特定环境中会被富集，例如 H3K9me3 组蛋白标记中的 L1。值得注意的是，我们鉴定了 456 个具有强细胞类型特异性富集的细胞类型-组蛋白-TE 三联体，并表明其中许多三联体与相关的生物过程相关。

title: Nuclear-specific reductive carboxylation of alpha-ketoglutarate fuels histone acetylation to induce chromatin accessibility and gene activation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mitochondria remain at the core of cell metabolism, whereas the nucleus integrates cellular and environmental signals to activate genes. However, the mechanisms that directly link cellular metabolism to gene regulation are not well understood. Here we show, a metabolic pathway in the nucleus controls acetylation of histones by nuclear localization of mitochondrial enzymes aconitase (ACO2) and isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH2). Metabolic tracing studies show that IDH2 and ACO2 catalyze reductive carboxylation of α-ketoglutarate to rapidly synthesize citrate to increase nuclear acetyl-CoA pool. Genetic and proteomic analyses reveal nuclear IDH2 and ACO2 form a complex with KAT2A/GCN5 for acetylation of histones to increase chromatin accessibility and activation of proliferative genes. Robust nuclear expressions of ACO2 and IDH2 drive aggressive tumors indicating the tumorigenic potential of IDH2-ACO2-KAT2A axis. Altogether, our work reveals a paradigm coupling a nuclear metabolic pathway with histone acetylation to control of gene expression that accentuates hyperproliferative phenotype in tumors.
title_zh: α-酮戊二酸的核特异性还原羧化促进组蛋白乙酰化，从而诱导染色质可及性和基因激活
abstract_zh: 线粒体仍然是细胞代谢的核心，而细胞核则整合细胞和环境信号来激活基因。然而，将细胞代谢与基因调控直接联系起来的机制尚不清楚。在这里，我们展示了细胞核中的代谢途径通过线粒体酶乌头酸酶（ACO2）和异柠檬酸脱氢酶（IDH2）的核定位来控制组蛋白的乙酰化。代谢追踪研究表明，IDH2 和 ACO2 催化 α-酮戊二酸的还原羧化，快速合成柠檬酸，从而增加核乙酰辅酶 A 池。遗传和蛋白质组学分析表明，核 IDH2 和 ACO2 与 KAT2A/GCN5 形成复合物，用于组蛋白乙酰化，从而增加染色质可及性和增殖基因的激活。 ACO2 和 IDH2 的强大核表达可驱动侵袭性肿瘤，表明 IDH2-ACO2-KAT2A 轴具有致瘤潜力。总而言之，我们的工作揭示了一种将核代谢途径与组蛋白乙酰化结合起来控制基因表达的范例，从而加剧肿瘤中的过度增殖表型。

title: The potential role of H2S in the anti-infective function of antimicrobial peptides
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Antimicrobial peptides (AMPs) are essential components of the innate immune system in animals, playing crucial roles in defending against microbial infections. Hydrogen sulfide (H2S), a vital gasotransmitter, is involved in regulating a wide array of physiological functions. However, the role of H₂S in the anti-infective actions of AMPs remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate the crucial role of H2S in mediating the anti-infective functions of AMPs across diverse animal species. LL-37/CRAMP, the human cathelicidin family AMP and its mouse homolog, induce H2S production predominantly through 3-mercaptopyruvate sulfurtransferase (3MST) in Escherichia coli and Clostridium perfringens. The generated H₂S further participates in reactive oxygen species (ROS) accumulation, leading to bacterial death by oxidative damage. Additionally, LL-37 activates the Akt signaling pathway, upregulating cystathionine γ-lyase (CSE) expression to generate H2S in macrophages. This process plays a potential role in facilitating the immunomodulatory activity of LL-37/CRAMP and we confirmed that H2S is involved in their in vivo anti-infective activity of LL-37. Moreover, besides LL-37/CRAMP, we reveal that AMPs from various animal species also induce H2S production in bacteria and macrophages. Overall, our findings highlight a previously unrecognized role of H2S in AMP anti-infective function, which is ubiquitous across AMPs from different animals.
title_zh: H2S 在抗菌肽抗感染功能中的潜在作用
abstract_zh: 抗菌肽（AMP）是动物先天免疫系统的重要组成部分，在防御微生物感染方面发挥着至关重要的作用。硫化氢 (H2S) 是一种重要的气体递质，参与调节多种生理功能。然而，H2S 在 AMP 抗感染作用中的作用仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们证明了 H2S 在介导不同动物物种的 AMP 抗感染功能中的关键作用。 LL-37/CRAMP 是人导管素家族 AMP 及其小鼠同源物，主要通过大肠杆菌和产气荚膜梭菌中的 3-巯基丙酮酸硫转移酶 (3MST) 诱导 H2S 产生。生成的 H2S 进一步参与活性氧 (ROS) 的积累，导致细菌因氧化损伤而死亡。此外，LL-37 还可激活 Akt 信号通路，上调胱硫醚 γ-裂解酶 (CSE) 的表达，从而在巨噬细胞中产生 H2S。该过程在促进 LL-37/CRAMP 的免疫调节活性中发挥潜在作用，我们证实 H2S 参与了 LL-37 的体内抗感染活性。此外，除了 LL-37/CRAMP 之外，我们还发现来自不同动物物种的 AMP 也会诱导细菌和巨噬细胞产生 H2S。总的来说，我们的研究结果强调了 H2S 在 AMP 抗感染功能中以前未被认识到的作用，这种作用在不同动物的 AMP 中普遍存在。

title: Alphavirus M1 disrupts super-enhancer-driven oncogenic transcription via non-structural protein NSP2 in osteosarcoma
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Oncolytic virotherapy has shown promise for various cancers, but its application in osteosarcoma (OS) remains underexplored. This study provides evidence that M1, a natural Getah-like alphavirus, exerts oncolytic activity against OS. We demonstrate that OS cells exhibit heightened sensitivity to M1 infection, with its anti-tumor effects not solely dependent on the canonical ER stress-induced apoptosis. Proteomic and ChIP-seq analyses show the DNA-directed RNA polymerase II subunit RPB1 contributes to oncogenic super-enhancer activity and serves as a direct target of M1-mediated regulation. The oncolytic potency correlated positively with the transcriptional dependency on RPB1 within super-enhancer regions. Mechanistically, the viral non-structural protein NSP2 disrupts super-enhancer activity by recruiting the CUL2-RBX1-ELOC complex, which triggers K63-linked ubiquitination and degradation of RPB1. Together, these findings uncover a previously unrecognized mechanism underlying M1 activity in osteosarcoma, support further preclinical evaluation of M1 in this setting, and identify RPB1 as a candidate biomarker for virotherapy response.
title_zh: 甲病毒 M1 通过骨肉瘤中的非结构蛋白 NSP2 破坏超级增强子驱动的致癌转录
abstract_zh: 溶瘤病毒疗法已显示出治疗多种癌症的希望，但其在骨肉瘤 (OS) 中的应用仍未得到充分探索。这项研究提供了证据，证明 M1（一种天然 Getah 样甲病毒）对 OS 具有溶瘤活性。我们证明 OS 细胞对 M1 感染表现出高度的敏感性，其抗肿瘤作用不仅仅依赖于典型的 ER 应激诱导的细胞凋亡。蛋白质组学和 ChIP-seq 分析显示 DNA 指导的 RNA 聚合酶 II 亚基 RPB1 有助于致癌超级增强子活性，并可作为 M1 介导的调节的直接目标。溶瘤效力与超级增强子区域内对 RPB1 的转录依赖性呈正相关。从机制上讲，病毒非结构蛋白 NSP2 通过招募 CUL2-RBX1-ELOC 复合物来破坏超级增强子活性，从而触发 K63 连接的泛素化和 RPB1 的降解。总之，这些发现揭示了骨肉瘤中 M1 活性的一个以前未被认识的机制，支持在这种情况下对 M1 进行进一步的临床前评估，并将 RPB1 确定为病毒治疗反应的候选生物标志物。

title: Dual activation of NLRP3 and pyrin inflammasomes mediates host responses to the human fungal pathogen Coccidioides
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Coccidioides is a dimorphic fungal pathogen that grows as a mold in soil and produces infectious arthroconidia. Inhaled arthroconidia transition to spherules containing endospores in mammalian hosts. How distinct developmental forms of Coccidioides interact with immune cells remains poorly defined. Here, we show that arthroconidia activates TLR2 and induces NLRP3-pyrin inflammasomes in macrophages, while ferroptotic signaling promotes arthroconidia killing. Upon transition to spherules, only ruptured spherules—not intact ones—trigger IL-1β production through NLRP3-pyrin inflammasomes and GSDMD-GSDME pores. A TLR2-NLRP3-pyrin-IL-18 axis in macrophages promotes spherule growth. Endospores activate NLRP3 but not pyrin inflammasomes. Caspase-1-deficient mice show improved disease tolerance to coccidioidomycosis despite equivalent fungal burdens, correlating with enhanced neutrophil extracellular trap formation in lung granulomas. Neutrophils respond to spherules through NLRP3-pyrin inflammasomes, GSDMD-GSDME, and MLKL. Together, these findings reveal that Coccidioides morphotypes elicit distinct yet overlapping immune programs, coordinating inflammasome activation and regulated cell death to shape host-pathogen dynamics.
title_zh: NLRP3 和吡啶炎症小体的双重激活介导宿主对人类真菌病原体球孢子菌的反应
abstract_zh: 球孢子菌是一种二形性真菌病原体，在土壤中以霉菌形式生长并产生传染性节分孢子。吸入的节分孢子在哺乳动物宿主中转变为含有内生孢子的小球。球孢子菌的不同发育形式如何与免疫细胞相互作用仍不清楚。在这里，我们发现节分孢子激活 TLR2 并诱导巨噬细胞中的 NLRP3-pyrin 炎性小体，而铁死亡信号传导促进节分孢子死亡。转变为小球后，只有破裂的小球（而非完整的小球）才会通过 NLRP3-pyrin 炎症小体和 GSDMD-GSDME 孔触发 IL-1β 的产生。巨噬细胞中的 TLR2-NLRP3-pyrin-IL-18 轴促进小球生长。内生孢子激活 NLRP3，但不激活 Pyrin 炎症小体。尽管真菌负荷相当，但 Caspase-1 缺陷小鼠对球孢子菌病的疾病耐受性有所提高，这与肺肉芽肿中中性粒细胞胞外陷阱形成的增强相关。中性粒细胞通过 NLRP3-pyrin 炎性体、GSDMD-GSDME 和 MLKL 对小球做出反应。总之，这些发现表明，球孢子菌形态型引发独特但重叠的免疫程序，协调炎症小体激活和调节细胞死亡，从而塑造宿主-病原体动态。

title: Interpretable spatial multi-omics data integration and dimensionality reduction with SpaMV
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Spatial multi-omics technologies revolutionized our understanding of biological systems by providing spatially resolved molecular profiles from multiple perspectives. Existing spatial multi-omics integration methods often assume that data from different omics share a common underlying distribution and aim to project them into a single unified latent space. This assumption, however, obscures the unique insights offered by each omics, thereby limiting the full potential of multi-omics analyses. To address this limitation, we develop the Spatial Multi-View (SpaMV) representation learning algorithm, which explicitly captures both shared information across omics and the distinct, omics-specific information, enabling a more comprehensive and interpretable representation of spatial multi-omics data. Through extensive evaluation on both simulated and real-world datasets, SpaMV demonstrates superior spatial domain clustering performance and offers topic modeling with more interpretable dimensionality reduction for downstream analysis. Moreover, our method more effectively discovers interpretable omics-specific biomarkers than existing approaches, highlighting its strength in disentangling multi-omics signals.
title_zh: 使用 SpaMV 进行可解释的空间多组学数据集成和降维
abstract_zh: 空间多组学技术通过从多个角度提供空间解析的分子图谱，彻底改变了我们对生物系统的理解。现有的空间多组学集成方法通常假设来自不同组学的数据具有共同的基础分布，并旨在将它们投影到单个统一的潜在空间中。然而，这种假设掩盖了每个组学提供的独特见解，从而限制了多组学分析的全部潜力。为了解决这一限制，我们开发了空间多视图（SpaMV）表示学习算法，该算法明确捕获跨组学的共享信息和独特的组学特定信息，从而实现空间多组学数据的更全面和可解释的表示。通过对模拟和真实数据集的广泛评估，SpaMV 展示了卓越的空间域聚类性能，并为下游分析提供了具有更可解释的降维功能的主题建模。此外，我们的方法比现有方法更有效地发现可解释的组学特异性生物标志物，突显​​了其在解开多组学信号方面的优势。

title: Connecting single-cell transcriptomes to projectomes in the mouse visual cortex
source: Nature
abstract: The mammalian brain consists of diverse neuron types with various functions. Recent single-cell RNA sequencing approaches have led to a whole-brain taxonomy of transcriptomically defined cell types1. Patch-seq experiments augment these cell-type descriptions by linking transcriptomic profiles with local morphological and electrophysiological properties2,3,4,5,6,7. However, linking transcriptomic identities to long-range axonal projections remains a major unresolved challenge. Here, to address this, we collected two datasets from the mouse visual cortex consisting of: (1) 1,528 excitatory Patch-seq neurons, with local morphological, electrophysiological and transcriptomic data collected from each cell, and (2) 341 excitatory, whole-neuron morphologies. From the Patch-seq data, we defined 17 morphoelectric–transcriptomic types and built a multistep classifier to integrate cell-type assignments with whole-neuron morphology and interrogate cross-modality relationships. We find that transcriptomic variation within and across morphoelectric–transcriptomic types corresponds with morphological and electrophysiological phenotypes. In addition, these gene expression patterns, along with the anatomical location of the cell, can be used to predict projection targets of individual neurons. We observed novel multimodal cell-type signatures for layer 5 intratelencephalic and extratelencephalic neurons and shed new light on their axonal circuitry, including interhemispheric intratelencephalic projections. With this approach, we establish a comprehensive, integrated taxonomy of cortical, excitatory neuron types, and create a system for high-dimensional cell-type classification that can be extended to the whole brain and potentially across species.
title_zh: 将单细胞转录组与小鼠视觉皮层中的投影组连接
abstract_zh: 哺乳动物的大脑由具有不同功能的多种神经元类型组成。最近的单细胞 RNA 测序方法已经形成了转录组定义的细胞类型的全脑分类学。 Patch-seq 实验通过将转录组图谱与局部形态学和电生理学特性联系起来，增强了这些细胞类型的描述2,3,4,5,6,7。然而，将转录组特性与长程轴突投射联系起来仍然是一个尚未解决的重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们从小鼠视觉皮层收集了两个数据集，其中包括：(1) 1,528 个兴奋性 Patch-seq 神经元，从每个细胞收集局部形态学、电生理学和转录组数据，以及 (2) 341 个兴奋性全神经元形态。根据 Patch-seq 数据，我们定义了 17 种形态电转录组类型，并构建了一个多步分类器，将细胞类型分配与整个神经元形态整合起来，并询问跨模态关系。我们发现形态电转录组类型内部和之间的转录组变异与形态和电生理表型相对应。此外，这些基因表达模式以及细胞的解剖位置可用于预测单个神经元的投射目标。我们观察到第 5 层端脑内和端脑外神经元的新型多模态细胞类型特征，并为它们的轴突回路（包括半球间端脑内投射）提供了新的线索。通过这种方法，我们建立了一个全面、综合的皮质、前

title: Two-pore channel-2 controls calmodulin-dependent STIM1 inactivation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Lysosomal two-pore channels (TPC) trigger Ca2+ release from the endoplasmic reticulum (ER). The ensuing ER Ca2+ depletion activates STIM1-gated store-operated Ca2+ entry (SOCE) channels that sustain Ca2+ signals regulating fundamental cellular processes. How TPC channels and STIM1 integrate distinct intra and extracellular cues is unclear. Here, we show that TPC2 activation inhibits SOCE by enforcing rapid and persistent Ca2+-CaM-dependent inactivation of the STIM-Orai activating region (SOAR). The TPC2 activators NAADP and TPC2-A1-N abrogated SOCE in multiple cell lines and enhanced the slow Ca2+ dependent inactivation (SCDI) of STIM1-gated Orai1 channels. TPC2 engagement triggered lysosomal Ca2+ release and mobilized ER Ca2+ stores but prevented RFP-STIM1 recruitment to the TIRF plane by thapsigargin and disassembled RFP-STIM1 clusters forming after store depletion, preventing and acutely reversing SOCE. These effects persisted in STIM1 mutants truncated after the SOAR and were prevented by TPC2 genetic or pharmacological invalidation, Calmodulin (CaM) inhibition, and cytosolic Ca2+ chelation. We conclude that Ca2+ ions released by TPC2 channels on lysosomes regulate CaM-dependent STIM1 inactivation.
title_zh: 双孔通道 2 控制钙调蛋白依赖性 STIM1 失活
abstract_zh: 溶酶体双孔通道 (TPC) 触发内质网 (ER) 释放 Ca2+。随后的 ER Ca2+ 耗竭会激活 STIM1 门控 Ca2+ 进入 (SOCE) 通道，维持调节基本细胞过程的 Ca2+ 信号。 TPC 通道和 STIM1 如何整合不同的细胞内和细胞外信号尚不清楚。在这里，我们发现 TPC2 激活通过强制 STIM-Orai 激活区 (SOAR) 快速且持续的 Ca2+-CaM 依赖性失活来抑制 SOCE。 TPC2 激活剂 NAADP 和 TPC2-A1-N 消除了多种细胞系中的 SOCE，并增强了 STIM1 门控 Orai1 通道的缓慢 Ca2+ 依赖性失活 (SCDI)。 TPC2 的参与触发了溶酶体 Ca2+ 释放并动员了 ER Ca2+ 储备，但阻止了毒胡萝卜素将 RFP-STIM1 招募到 TIRF 平面，并在储备耗尽后形成分解的 RFP-STIM1 簇，从而防止并急剧逆转 SOCE。这些效应在 SOAR 后截短的 STIM1 突变体中持续存在，并被 TPC2 遗传或药理学失效、钙调蛋白 (CaM) 抑制和胞质 Ca2+ 螯合所阻止。我们得出结论，溶酶体上 TPC2 通道释放的 Ca2+ 离子调节 CaM 依赖性 STIM1 失活。

title: Loss of Echs1 in neural stem and progenitor cells impairs neurogenesis via ER stress activation and lipid metabolic reprogramming
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mitochondrial short-chain enoyl-CoA hydratase 1 deficiency (ECHS1D) is a rare and severe encephalopathy linked to neurodevelopmental disorders, yet the connection between metabolic dysfunction and impaired neurogenesis remains unclear. In this study, we demonstrate that the loss of Echs1 in neural stem/progenitor cells (NSPCs) leads to fatty acid accumulation, which hinders proliferation and differentiation while promoting apoptosis. Mechanistically, Echs1 deficiency increases crotonyl-CoA levels, resulting in global histone crotonylation (Kcr) with an enrichment of H3K9cr. Neurodevelopmental gene promoters, such as the endoplasmic reticulum (ER) stress regulator Atf4, acquire H3K9cr. Atf4 then upregulates fatty acid synthase (Fasn), creating a feed-forward loop that exacerbates lipid accumulation. Inhibiting Fasn can rescue these defects. Alleviating ER stress through tauroursodeoxycholic acid (TUDCA) or Atf4 inhibition restores neurogenesis in vitro and enhances survival in vivo. This study uncovers an Echs1-H3K9cr-Atf4-Fasn axis that links metabolism to neurogenesis through epigenetic reprogramming and suggests TUDCA as a potential treatment for ECHS1D.
title_zh: 神经干细胞和祖细胞中 Echs1 的缺失会通过内质网应激激活和脂质代谢重编程损害神经发生
abstract_zh: 线粒体短链烯酰辅酶 A 水合酶 1 缺乏症 (ECHS1D) 是一种罕见且严重的脑病，与神经发育障碍有关，但代谢功能障碍与神经发生受损之间的联系仍不清楚。在这项研究中，我们证明神经干/祖细胞 (NSPC) 中 Echs1 的缺失会导致脂肪酸积累，从而阻碍增殖和分化，同时促进细胞凋亡。从机制上讲，Echs1 缺陷会增加巴豆酰辅酶 A 水平，导致整体组蛋白巴豆酰化 (Kcr) 和 H3K9cr 富集。神经发育基因启动子，例如内质网 (ER) 应激调节因子 Atf4，获得 H3K9cr。 Atf4 随后上调脂肪酸合酶 (Fasn)，形成一个加剧脂质积累的前馈循环。抑制 Fasn 可以挽救这些缺陷。通过牛磺熊去氧胆酸 (TUDCA) 或 Atf4 抑制来缓解 ER 应激可恢复体外神经发生并提高体内存活率。这项研究揭示了 Echs1-H3K9cr-Atf4-Fasn 轴，该轴通过表观遗传重编程将新陈代谢与神经发生联系起来，并表明 TUDCA 作为 ECHS1D 的潜在治疗方法。

title: Structural basis for independent pore function of Vpb4 from Bacillus thuringiensis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The Bacterial_Exotoxin_B family constitutes translocating pore-forming proteins that function as the binding (B) component in the binary AB Toxin mechanism. While the two-component system of the family is consistent among well-characterised members, the single-component Vpb4 subclass from entomopathogenic Bacillus thuringiensis challenges this dogma. Here, through single-particle cryo-electron microscopy, we elucidate the inserted pore structure of a Vpb4 member, Vpb4Aa2, at 2.2 Å resolution. The structure reveals distinguishing features from other family members: missing molecular bottleneck and neutrally charged β-barrel. Accordingly, preliminary electrophysiology studies show greater ion flux by Vpb4Aa2 compared to archetypal family member, PA. Through our findings, structure-guided database search allows identification of putative Vpb4-like proteins, which suggest a broader class of single-component proteins within the larger family. This provides mechanistic understanding of the differences between independent pores and translocating pores, with implications in the agricultural industry for screening and identification of future pest control candidates.
title_zh: 苏云金芽孢杆菌Vpb4独立孔功能的结构基础
abstract_zh: Bacterial_Exotoxin_B 家族由易位成孔蛋白组成，在二元 AB 毒素机制中充当结合 (B) 成分。虽然该家族的双组分系统在特征明确的成员中是一致的，但来自昆虫病原性苏云金芽孢杆菌的单组分 Vpb4 亚类挑战了这一教条。在这里，通过单粒子冷冻电子显微镜，我们以 2.2 Å 的分辨率阐明了 Vpb4 成员 Vpb4Aa2 的插入孔结构。该结构揭示了与其他家族成员的显着特征：缺少分子瓶颈和带中性电荷的β-桶。因此，初步的电生理学研究表明，与原型家族成员 PA 相比，Vpb4Aa2 的离子通量更大。通过我们的发现，结构引导的数据库搜索可以识别假定的 Vpb4 样蛋白，这表明在更大的家族中存在更广泛的单组分蛋白类别。这提供了对独立孔隙和易位孔隙之间差异的机械理解，对农业行业筛选和识别未来害虫防治候选物具有影响。

title: Pre-existing antibody and T cell responses to SaCas9, AsCas12a and CasΦ are comparable in naïve individuals
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Cas9 proteins are derived from human pathogens and are immunogenic, thereby raising potential safety concerns and limiting clinical effectiveness when using Cas9 as a gene-editing tool. Cas orthologs developed from organisms not directly associated with human infections may thus be safer. Here we compare the immunogenicity risk of SaCas9 (derived from the human pathogen, Staphylococcus aureus), AsCas12a (derived from the human commensal, Acidaminococcus sp.) and CasΦ (derived from a bacteria phage, Biggiephage). Ex vivo and in vitro analyses show that SaCas9, AsCas12a and CasΦ are recognized similarly by antibodies and T cells from unimmunized individuals. Using mass-spectrometry to identify MHC-I-bound peptides, we find SaCas9, AsCas12a and CasΦ peptides presented on 9 MHC-I proteins commonly found in the North American population. Our results thus indicate that AsCas12a and CasΦ do not present a less immunogenic alternative to Cas9, and underscore the need for systematic immunogenicity evaluation of all Cas proteins intended for clinical use.
title_zh: 先前存在的抗体和 T 细胞对 SaCas9、AsCas12a 和 CasΦ 的反应在未接触过的个体中是相当的
abstract_zh: Cas9 蛋白源自人类病原体，具有免疫原性，因此在使用 Cas9 作为基因编辑工具时，会引起潜在的安全问题并限制临床有效性。因此，由与人类感染不直接相关的生物体开发的 Cas 直向同源物可能更安全。在这里，我们比较了 SaCas9（源自人类病原体金黄色葡萄球菌）、AsCas12a（源自人类共生菌、氨基酸球菌）和 CasΦ（源自细菌噬菌体 Biggiephage）的免疫原性风险。离体和体外分析表明，来自未免疫个体的抗体和 T 细胞对 SaCas9、AsCas12a 和 CasΦ 的识别相似。使用质谱法来鉴定 MHC-I 结合肽，我们发现 SaCas9、AsCas12a 和 CasΦ 肽存在于北美人群中常见的 9 种 MHC-I 蛋白上。因此，我们的结果表明 AsCas12a 和 CasΦ 并不提供 Cas9 的免疫原性较低的替代品，并强调需要对所有用于临床的 Cas 蛋白进行系统的免疫原性评估。

title: DNA hypomethylation enables the transcriptional repressor SlSPL-CNR to control fruit flavor ester biosynthesis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Reduction of DNA methylation has traditionally been associated with gene activation. Here, we show that DNA hypomethylation permits the binding of a transcriptional repressor, leading to gene silencing. In tomato, the SQUAMOSA PROMOTER BINDING PROTEIN-LIKE TF SlSPL-CNR exhibits methylation-sensitive DNA binding and preferentially occupies unmethylated GTACGG motifs. During fruit ripening, DEMETER-LIKE 2 (SlDML2)-mediated DNA demethylation at the alcohol acyltransferase 1 (SlAAT1) promoter allows SlSPL-CNR binding, which in turn represses SlAAT1 expression and thereby modulates the biosynthesis of ester metabolites—key components of fruit flavor. Structural analysis reveals that cytosine methylation introduces a steric clash with Gln94 in the SBP domain of SlSPL-CNR, explaining its methylation sensitivity. CRISPR knockout of SlSPL-CNR de-represses SlAAT1 and increases ester accumulation, confirming its inhibitory role. Importantly, this methylation-sensitive binding is conserved across SBP domain proteins from rice, maize, and tomato. Our findings reveal a mechanism in which DNA hypomethylation facilitates repressor recruitment, establishing a regulatory logic linking epigenetic dynamics to metabolic control in plants.
title_zh: DNA 低甲基化使转录抑制子 SlSPL-CNR 控制水果风味酯的生物合成
abstract_zh: DNA 甲基化的减少传统上与基因激活有关。在这里，我们证明 DNA 低甲基化允许转录抑制子的结合，导致基因沉默。在番茄中，SQUAMOSA 启动子结合蛋白样 TF SlSPL-CNR 表现出甲基化敏感的 DNA 结合，并优先占据未甲基化的 GTACGG 基序。在果实成熟过程中，DEMETER-LIKE 2 (SlDML2) 介导的醇酰基转移酶 1 (SlAAT1) 启动子处的 DNA 去甲基化允许 SlSPL-CNR 结合，进而抑制 SlAAT1 表达，从而调节酯代谢物（水果风味的关键成分）的生物合成。结构分析表明，胞嘧啶甲基化在 SlSPL-CNR 的 SBP 结构域中引入了与 Gln94 的空间冲突，解释了其甲基化敏感性。 SlSPL-CNR 的 CRISPR 敲除可解除 SlAAT1 的抑制并增加酯的积累，证实了其抑制作用。重要的是，这种甲基化敏感结合在水稻、玉米和番茄的 SBP 结构域蛋白中是保守的。我们的研究结果揭示了 DNA 低甲基化促进阻遏蛋白招募的机制，建立了将表观遗传动力学与植物代谢控制联系起来的调控逻辑。

title: Activating in-plane dead zones of anode catalyst layers in proton exchange membrane water electrolyzers
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The utilization of iridium-based anode catalysts in proton exchange membrane water electrolyzers is largely limited by the presence of electrochemically inactive “dead zones” within the catalyst layer. Here, by combining in-situ visualization of gas bubble evolution with quantitative conductivity measurements and electrochemical analysis, we establish that the limited in-plane electronic conductivity, dictated by the ionomer disrupting the conductive network of IrO2 nanocatalysts, is the dominant factor. A sequential spray-coating strategy is further developed, which decouples the deposition of a pristine conductive catalyst layer from the ionomer and thereby preserves continuous electron transport pathways. This approach effectively activates the in-plane dead zones, resulting in membrane electrode assemblies that exhibit over 30% higher activity (4.2 A cm−2@2.0 V@80 °C; membrane: Nafion 115) than those prepared by the conventional one-step method based on IrO2/ionomer mixed inks. Crucially, this approach achieves both low iridium loading (0.25 mg cm–2) with standard catalysts and demonstrates extended stability over 8300 hours under practical current densities.
title_zh: 质子交换膜水电解槽阳极催化剂层面内死区的活化
abstract_zh: 铱基阳极催化剂在质子交换膜水电解槽中的使用很大程度上受到催化剂层内电化学惰性“死区”的限制。在这里，通过将气泡演化的原位可视化与定量电导率测量和电化学分析相结合，我们确定有限的面内电子电导率（由破坏 IrO2 纳米催化剂导电网络的离聚物决定）是主导因素。进一步开发了顺序喷涂策略，将原始导电催化剂层的沉积与离聚物分离，从而保留了连续的电子传输路径。这种方法有效地激活了面内死区，使得膜电极组件的活性比基于 IrO2/离聚物混合油墨的传统一步法制备的膜电极组件的活性高出 30% 以上（4.2 A cm−2@2.0 V@80 °C；膜：Nafion 115）。至关重要的是，该方法使用标准催化剂实现了低铱负载量（0.25 mg cm-2），并在实际电流密度下展示了超过 8300 小时的延长稳定性。

title: Fossil fuel emissions dominate Northern Hemisphere CO2 seasonal cycle trends under mitigation scenarios
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Variations in the atmospheric CO2 seasonal cycle across the Northern Hemisphere have historically been dominated by terrestrial ecosystems, making ground-based observations a reliable proxy for terrestrial carbon dynamics. However, whether this dominance will persist in the future remains uncertain. Here we combine atmospheric transport modeling with factorial simulations to assess and attribute future changes in the CO2 seasonal cycle through 2100. We show that the dominant drivers of these changes shift fundamentally across scenarios. Under the high-emission scenario (SSP5-8.5), strengthening land sinks dominate and amplify CO2 seasonal variability, preserving ground-based observations as a reliable terrestrial proxy. In contrast, under the low-emission scenario (SSP1-2.6), CO2 seasonal amplitude declines widely, driven primarily by reduced fossil fuel emissions and their dampened seasonality. Consequently, established ground-based CO2 observations may no longer reliably track terrestrial carbon dynamics under mitigation pathways, underscoring the need for new approaches for monitoring and climate policy verification.
title_zh: 缓解情景下，化石燃料排放主导北半球二氧化碳季节性循环趋势
abstract_zh: 北半球大气二氧化碳季节循环的变化历史上一直由陆地生态系统主导，这使得地面观测成为陆地碳动态的可靠代表。然而，这种主导地位是否会在未来持续存在仍存在不确定性。在这里，我们将大气传输模型与因子模拟相结合，以评估和归因 2100 年二氧化碳季节性循环的未来变化。我们表明，这些变化的主要驱动因素在不同情景下发生了根本性的变化。在高排放情景（SSP5-8.5）下，加强土地汇主导并放大二氧化碳季节变化，保留地面观测作为可靠的陆地代理。相比之下，在低排放情景（SSP1-2.6）下，二氧化碳季节性幅度大幅下降，这主要是由于化石燃料排放量减少及其季节性减弱所致。因此，现有的地面二氧化碳观测可能不再可靠地跟踪缓解路径下的陆地碳动态，这凸显了对监测和气候政策验证新方法的需要。

title: Designing and mapping cascade catalysis pathway for balanced polysulfide conversion in Li-S batteries
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Lithium–sulfur batteries are fundamentally constrained by the sluggish 16-electron sulfur reduction reaction. Electrocatalytic sulfur reduction reaction is inherently complex, involving multiple lithium polysulfide intermediates (Li2Sn, n = 2–8), each with distinct adsorption and activation requirements, leading to unbalanced polysulfide conversion and severe shuttle effect. Although cascade catalysis has been proposed as a potential solution, the precise pathway and its mechanistic role in regulating polysulfide conversion remain elusive. Here we elucidate and experimentally validate the complete cascade pathway of sulfur reduction on Fe,N,S-codoped holey graphene as a model catalyst. Density functional theory reveals that Fe sites preferentially bind and activate long-chain polysulfides, while N,S-C sites accelerate the conversion of Li2S4 to Li2S2/Li2S. Such site-specific synergy balances sulfur reduction kinetics and suppresses polysulfide accumulation. Combined kinetic analysis and operando Raman spectroscopy directly reveal how synergistic cascade catalysis governs the reaction pathway, modulates key intermediates, and enables balanced polysulfide conversion. Together, these results establish cascade catalysis as a mechanism-driven design strategy for lithium–sulfur battery electrodes, where regulation of the reaction pathway suppresses polysulfide shuttling and enables enhanced cycling stability.
title_zh: 设计和绘制锂硫电池平衡多硫化物转化的级联催化途径
abstract_zh: 锂硫电池从根本上受到缓慢的16电子硫还原反应的限制。电催化硫还原反应本质上是复杂的，涉及多种多硫化锂中间体（Li2Sn，n = 2-8），每种中间体都有不同的吸附和活化要求，导致多硫化物转化不平衡和严重的穿梭效应。尽管级联催化已被认为是一种潜在的解决方案，但其在调节多硫化物转化中的精确途径及其机制作用仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们阐明并通过实验验证了 Fe,N,S 共掺杂多孔石墨烯作为模型催化剂的硫还原的完整级联途径。密度泛函理论表明，Fe 位点优先结合并激活长链多硫化物，而 N,S-C 位点则加速 Li2S4 向 Li2S2/Li2S 的转化。这种位点特异性协同作用平衡硫还原动力学并抑制多硫化物积累。结合动力学分析和操作拉曼光谱直接揭示协同级联催化如何控制反应途径、调节关键中间体并实现平衡的多硫化物转化。总之，这些结果将级联催化确立为锂硫电池电极的机制驱动设计策略，其中反应途径的调节抑制多硫化物穿梭并增强循环稳定性。

title: Molecular bridge engineering in covalent organic frameworks for enhanced electronic transport
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Conductive two-dimensional covalent organic frameworks (2D COFs) possess intrinsic π–conjugation and long-range order, yet their electrical performance in thin-film devices remains constrained by grain boundaries and amorphous regions that interrupt charge transport. Here we report a simple and scalable strategy to overcome these limitations by bridging polycrystalline COF domains with molecularly dispersed conjugated polymers (CPs). Guided by electronic alignment, geometric compatibility, and chain-length criteria, we identify COF–CP combinations that exhibit markedly enhanced conductivity when assembled into heterostructures. By demonstrating that electrical property enhancement occurs only below the CP crystallization threshold, we show that bridging CPs require short-range ordered or near-amorphous configurations to effectively span COF grains and establish continuous transport pathways. This approach is compatible with wafer-scale fabrication and enables ppb-level NO2 sensing by coupling COF porosity with CP-mediated charge transport. Our results establish a rational polymer-bridging strategy for COF-based electronic materials and identify key design parameters for its extension to other COF–CP systems.
title_zh: 用于增强电子传输的共价有机框架中的分子桥工程
abstract_zh: 导电二维共价有机框架（2D COF）具有固有的π共轭和长程有序，但它们在薄膜器件中的电性能仍然受到晶界和中断电荷传输的非晶区域的限制。在这里，我们报告了一种简单且可扩展的策略，通过将多晶 COF 域与分子分散的共轭聚合物 (CP) 桥接来克服这些限制。在电子排列、几何兼容性和链长标准的指导下，我们确定了当组装成异质结构时表现出显着增强的电导率的COF-CP组合。通过证明电性能增强仅发生在低于 CP 结晶阈值时，我们表明桥接 CP 需要短程有序或近非晶构型才能有效跨越 COF 晶粒并建立连续的传输路径。该方法与晶圆级制造兼容，并通过将 COF 孔隙率与 CP 介导的电荷传输耦合来实现 ppb 级 NO2 传感。我们的研究结果为基于 COF 的电子材料建立了合理的聚合物桥接策略，并确定了将其扩展到其他 COF-CP 系统的关键设计参数。

title: STARE: a semiconductor-integrated transmit-array architecture for 6G beamforming
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) are considered a key technology for 6G, but existing implementations based on liquid crystals, PIN diodes, or varactors are limited by slow response, high loss, and costly integration. This study presents the first RIS system directly realized using a standard semiconductor process. The proposed architecture, termed STARE (Semiconductor Transmit Array with Reconfigurable Elements), integrates a custom-designed Selective Overlap Diode (SOD) into high-resistivity silicon, enabling tunable ON resistance and OFF capacitance while maintaining low power operation. A vialess transmit-type unit cell employing magnetic coupling eliminates the need for through silicon vias, thereby simplifying fabrication and reducing substrate losses. Experimental validation demonstrates 180° phase control and beam steering from −45° to +45° at 15.5 GHz. These results establish STARE as the first semiconductor-foundry-manufacturable RIS, bridging device-level fabrication with system-level beamforming and providing a scalable, energy-efficient, and cost-effective solution for future wireless systems.
title_zh: STARE：用于 6G 波束成形的半导体集成发射阵列架构
abstract_zh: 可重构智能表面 (RIS) 被认为是 6G 的关键技术，但基于液晶、PIN 二极管或变容二极管的现有实现受到响应慢、损耗高和集成成本高等限制。这项研究提出了第一个使用标准半导体工艺直接实现的 RIS 系统。所提出的架构称为 STARE（具有可重新配置元件的半导体发射阵列），将定制设计的选择性重叠二极管 (SOD) 集成到高电阻率硅中，从而实现可调导通电阻和关断电容，同时保持低功耗运行。采用磁耦合的无通孔传输型单元消除了对硅通孔的需要，从而简化了制造并减少了衬底损耗。实验验证表明，在 15.5 GHz 时可实现 -45° 至 +45° 的 180° 相位控制和波束控制。这些结果使 STARE 成为第一个可通过半导体代工制造的 RIS，将器件级制造与系统级波束成形连接起来，并为未来的无线系统提供可扩展、节能且经济高效的解决方案。

title: Halide-site-substituting spacer creates quasi-two-dimensional perovskites for vapour-deposited light-emitting diodes
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Vapour deposition offers a scalable and industry-compatible route for perovskite light-emitting diodes, yet the process remains challenging owing to kinetically driven crystallization that produces mixed-dimensional phases and nanoscale heterogeneity. In particular, the lack of thermodynamic control leads to phase-disordered nanostructures, broadened energy landscapes and limited device efficiency. Here we report a thermodynamically guided vapour-phase synthesis of X-type quasi-two-dimensional perovskites, (CsPbBr3)n−1Cs2PbBr2X2, with controlled nanoscale phase distribution and interfacial coherence. By introducing a halide-site-substituting organic spacer molecule that covalently binds to Pb2+ during in situ deposition, we achieve selective crystallization of quasi-two-dimensional phases with high phase purity. A self-assembled hetero-scaffold of LiF and spacer molecule acts as a nanoscale growth template, promoting spatially uniform nucleation and minimizing phase segregation. Multimodal structural and spectroscopic analyses reveal dimensionally and spatially homogeneous films with high photoluminescence quantum yield (>85%) and reduced trap densities, enabling efficient exciton confinement and narrow emission. The resulting perovskite light-emitting diodes achieve an external quantum efficiency of 21.9%, an electroluminescence linewidth of 78.5 meV and operational stability exceeding 1,500 min, with scalable pixel arrays demonstrated. These results provide a scalable route to high-efficiency vapour-deposited perovskite optoelectronics.
title_zh: 卤化物位点取代间隔物为气相沉积发光二极管产生准二维钙钛矿
abstract_zh: 气相沉积为钙钛矿发光二极管提供了一种可扩展且工业兼容的途径，但由于动力学驱动的结晶会产生混合维相和纳米级异质性，因此该过程仍然具有挑战性。特别是，缺乏热力学控制会导致纳米结构相无序、能源格局扩大和装置效率有限。在这里，我们报告了 X 型准二维钙钛矿 (CsPbBr3)n−1Cs2PbBr2X2 的热力学引导气相合成，具有受控的纳米级相分布和界面相干性。通过引入在原位沉积过程中与 Pb2+ 共价结合的卤化物位点取代有机间隔分子，我们实现了高相纯度的准二维相的选择性结晶。 LiF 和间隔分子的自组装异质支架充当纳米级生长模板，促进空间均匀成核并最大限度地减少相分离。多模态结构和光谱分析揭示了尺寸和空间均匀的薄膜，具有高光致发光量子产率（> 85％）和降低的陷阱密度，从而实现有效的激子限制和窄发射。所得钙钛矿发光二极管的外量子效率为 21.9%，电致发光线宽为 78.5 meV，工作稳定性超过 1,500 分钟，并具有可扩展的像素阵列。这些结果为高效气相沉积钙钛矿光电器件提供了一条可扩展的途径。

title: Voltage imaging of CA1 pyramidal cells and SST+ interneurons reveals stability and plasticity mechanisms of spatial firing
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Hippocampal place cells (PCs) are important for spatial coding and episodic memory. PCs’ representations are modulated upon transitioning between environments (global remapping) but also change with repeated exposure to familiar spaces (representational drift). To gain insights into the mechanistic basis for this unique balance between circuit plasticity and stability, we used voltage imaging to longitudinally record the subthreshold and spiking activity of pyramidal neurons (PNs) and somatostatin-positive interneurons (SSTs) within mouse hippocampal CA1 during virtual navigation. A fraction of cells from both populations showed spatial tuning, and many SSTs were speed-tuned or fired uniformly across space. Intracellular recordings revealed increased theta power and asymmetric ramp-like depolarization in PN place fields, while SSTs exhibited symmetric depolarization with no theta increase. Longitudinal recordings across weeks demonstrated representational drifts in both populations, although SSTs exhibited remarkably stable firing and subthreshold properties. Transition to a novel environment induced remapping in both populations, accompanied by an increase in SST activity and a reduction in PN activity. These results provide insights into how hippocampal circuits balance representational stability with experience-dependent plasticity.
title_zh: CA1 锥体细胞和 SST+ 中间神经元的电压成像揭示了空间放电的稳定性和可塑性机制
abstract_zh: 海马位置细胞（PC）对于空间编码和情景记忆很重要。 PC 的表征会随着环境之间的转换而变化（全局重新映射），但也会随着反复暴露于熟悉的空间而发生变化（表征漂移）。为了深入了解电路可塑性和稳定性之间这种独特平衡的机制基础，我们使用电压成像纵向记录虚拟导航期间小鼠海马 CA1 内锥体神经元 (PN) 和生长抑素阳性中间神经元 (SST) 的阈下和尖峰活动。两个群体中的一小部分细胞都表现出空间调谐，并且许多 SST 在空间上进行了速度调谐或均匀发射。细胞内记录显示 PN 场中 θ 功率增加和不对称斜坡状去极化，而 SST 表现出对称去极化，而 θ 没有增加。尽管海表温度表现出非常稳定的放电和阈下特性，但数周的纵向记录表明两个群体的代表性漂移。向新环境的过渡会引起两个种群的重新定位，同时伴随着 SST 活性的增加和 PN 活性的减少。这些结果提供了关于海马回路如何平衡表征稳定性与经验依赖性可塑性的见解。

title: RNF2 mediates H2A ubiquitination to promote colitis via suppressing monocyte-macrophage transition in mice
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Monocyte-macrophage transition is dysregulated in inflammatory bowel disease. While polycomb repressive complexes are crucial for maintaining cellular identity, their specific roles in colitis are poorly defined. Here, we show that Ring finger protein 2, a core catalytic subunit of polycomb repressive complex 1, regulates the monocyte-macrophage transition during colitis. It is highly expressed in the immature colon and circulating monocytes during ulcerative colitis. And mice with myeloid-specific deficiency exhibited attenuated experimental colitis, restored monocyte/macrophage balance, and improved anti-tumor necrosis factor alpha efficacy. Mechanistically, Ring finger protein 2 represses Runt-related transcription factor 3 expression via histone H2A lysine 119 monoubiquitination. This disrupts the inhibition of the recombination signal-binding protein for the immunoglobulin kappa J region, the central activator of the Notch pathway, thereby exacerbating inflammation. Silencing of the axis markedly inhibited proinflammatory responses, regulating monocyte-macrophage transition. These findings reveal that Ring finger protein 2 disrupts the monocyte-macrophage transition during colitis, offering insights into colitis treatments.
title_zh: RNF2介导H2A泛素化，通过抑制小鼠单核细胞-巨噬细胞转变促进结肠炎
abstract_zh: 单核细胞-巨噬细胞转变在炎症性肠病中失调。虽然多梳抑制复合物对于维持细胞特性至关重要，但它们在结肠炎中的具体作用尚不清楚。在这里，我们发现环指蛋白 2（多梳抑制复合物 1 的核心催化亚基）在结肠炎期间调节单核细胞-巨噬细胞转变。在溃疡性结肠炎期间，它在未成熟结肠和循环单核细胞中高度表达。患有骨髓特异性缺陷的小鼠表现出实验性结肠炎减弱，恢复单核细胞/巨噬细胞平衡，并提高抗肿瘤坏死因子α功效。从机制上讲，环指蛋白 2 通过组蛋白 H2A 赖氨酸 119 单泛素化抑制 Runt 相关转录因子 3 的表达。这破坏了对免疫球蛋白 kappa J 区（Notch 通路的中心激活剂）重组信号结合蛋白的抑制，从而加剧炎症。轴的沉默显着抑制促炎反应，调节单核细胞-巨噬细胞转变。这些发现表明，无名指蛋白 2 会破坏结肠炎期间的单核细胞-巨噬细胞转变，为结肠炎治疗提供了见解。

title: Publisher Correction: Divergent multifunctional P450s-empowered biosynthesis of bioactive tripterifordin and cryptic atiserenoids in Aconitum implies convergent evolution

title_zh: 出版商更正：乌头中生物活性雷公藤多苷和神秘阿塞烯类化合物的不同多功能 P450 授权生物合成意味着趋同进化

title: Heat-triggered phospholipid flipping stabilizes plasma membrane fluidity
source: Nature
abstract: Cells must rapidly counteract heat stress-induced hyperfluidization of the plasma membrane to prevent membrane damage1,2, yet how cells achieve such early protection remains unknown. Here we show that in rice (Oryza sativa), the P4-ATPase OsALA5, together with its β-subunit OsALIS2, mediates a heat-responsive flipping of saturated phosphatidylcholines that rapidly stabilizes plasma membrane fluidity. Using leaflet-resolved lipidomics and complementary transport assays, we demonstrate that heat exposure induces a minute-timescale shift in OsALA5 transport activity that leads to selective enrichment of saturated phosphatidylcholines in the cytoplasmic plasma membrane leaflet. This OsALA5-mediated saturated phosphatidylcholine flipping prevents plasma membrane hyperfluidization upon heat stress, thus mitigating ion leakage and cell death. Our analyses of OsALA5 orthologues in Arabidopsis thaliana and yeast support functional conservation of a rapid heat-associated response within a subset of plasma membrane-localized, phosphatidylcholine-transporting P4-ATPases. We identified a rare haplotype of OsALA5 that confers both heat tolerance and yield stability in multi-year, multi-location field trials. Thus, beyond identifying this P4-ATPase-mediated flipping of saturated phosphatidylcholines in response to heat stress and providing genetic resources to advance breeding of heat-tolerant crops, our study reveals how cells counteract heat stress-driven plasma membrane hyperfluidization at an earlier stage than the previously known transcription-dependent lipid remodelling response.
title_zh: 热触发的磷脂翻转稳定质膜流动性
abstract_zh: 细胞必须快速抵消热应激引起的质膜超流化，以防止膜损伤1,2，但细胞如何实现这种早期保护仍然未知。在这里，我们表明，在水稻（Oryza sativa）中，P4-ATP酶 OsALA5 及其 β-亚基 OsALIS2 介导饱和磷脂酰胆碱的热响应翻转，从而快速稳定质膜流动性。使用小叶解析脂质组学和补充转运测定，我们证明热暴露会诱导 OsALA5 转运活性发生微小时间尺度的变化，从而导致细胞质质膜小叶中饱和磷脂酰胆碱的选择性富集。这种 OsALA5 介导的饱和磷脂酰胆碱翻转可防止热应激时质膜超流化，从而减轻离子泄漏和细胞死亡。我们对拟南芥和酵母中 OsALA5 直系同源物的分析支持质膜定位的磷脂酰胆碱转运 P4-ATP 酶子集中快速热相关反应的功能保守。我们发现了 OsALA5 的一种罕见单倍型，它在多年、多地点的田间试验中具有耐热性和产量稳定性。 Thus, beyond identifying this P4-ATPase-mediated flipping of saturated phosphatidylcholines in response to heat stress and providing genetic resources to advance breeding of heat-tolerant crops, our study reveals how cells counteract heat stress-driven plasma membrane hyperfluidization at an earlier stage than the previously known transcription-dependent lipid remodelling response.

title: Cancer Research UK bets on Manchester with £6-million funding boost
