title_zh: 英国癌症研究中心斥资 600 万英镑押注曼彻斯特
abstract_zh: 这项投资提供了一个“特殊机会”，使英国曼彻斯特癌症研究所成为新兴肿瘤治疗领域的世界领导者。这项投资提供了一个“特殊机会”，使英国曼彻斯特癌症研究所成为新兴肿瘤治疗领域的世界领导者。

title: Portable, real-time 3D ultrasound for operator-independent breast imaging
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Breast cancer screening and longitudinal monitoring require imaging technologies that are portable, operator-independent, and suitable for frequent use, a capability not fully met by mammography or conventional ultrasound. We present a three-dimensional (3D) portable ultrasound system for real-time examination (3D PURE) that overcomes key limitations in volumetric breast imaging through advances in transducer design, acoustic materials, and adaptive beamforming. A box-array design incorporating a corner-gap offset geometry suppresses peak crosstalk (by 3.73 dB at the corner-most element), prevents preamplifier saturation, and supports higher transmit voltages (up to 24 V). A custom flowable backing layer (impedance 6.12 MRayl; attenuation 7.56 dB mm−1 MHz−1) integrates around fragile wirebonds, reduces inter-element crosstalk by ~4.5 dB throughout the array, and improves axial and lateral/elevational resolutions by ~200 µm and ~70 µm, respectively. Layered Aberration-Correction Reconstruction (LACR), an adaptive 3D beamformer, compensates for heterogeneous speed-of-sound (SoS) in the breast, reducing depth localization error by 2 mm and aberration defocusing by 70 µm on average at a 5 cm depth. Nine of the ten participants in an in vitro study showed improved microtarget detection efficiency with 3D PURE relative to a conventional 2D system (p = 0.0215), analogous to detection of microcalcifications. These results, combined with in vivo imaging validation of various phenotypes, highlight the potential of 3D PURE for reliable breast imaging. Furthermore, a vision-guided computer interface, MyFUS, ensures self-guided, user-friendly, and operator-independent probe positioning for longitudinal monitoring.
title_zh: 便携式实时 3D 超声，无需操作员即可进行乳腺成像
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌筛查和纵向监测需要便携式、独立于操作员且适合频繁使用的成像技术，而乳房X线照相术或传统超声无法完全满足这一能力。我们提出了一种用于实时检查的三维 (3D) 便携式超声系统 (3D PURE)，通过换能器设计、声学材料和自适应波束形成方面的进步，克服了体积乳腺成像的关键限制。盒式阵列设计采用角间隙偏移几何结构，可抑制峰值串扰（最角元件处的峰值串扰为 3.73 dB），防止前置放大器饱和，并支持更高的发射电压（高达 24 V）。定制的可流动背衬层（阻抗 6.12 MRayl；衰减 7.56 dB mm−1 MHz−1）集成在脆弱的焊线周围，将整个阵列的元件间串扰减少约 4.5 dB，并将轴向和横向/仰角分辨率分别提高约 200 µm 和约 70 µm。分层像差校正重建 (LACR) 是一种自适应 3D 波束形成器，可补偿乳房中的异质声速 (SoS)，在 5 厘米深度处将深度定位误差平均减少 2 毫米，像差散焦平均减少 70 微米。一项体外研究中的 10 名参与者中有 9 名表明，相对于传统 2D 系统，3D PURE 提高了微目标检测效率 (p = 0.0215)，类似于微钙化的检测。这些结果与各种表型的体内成像验证相结合，凸显了 3D PURE 在可靠乳腺成像方面的潜力。此外，视觉引导补偿

title: Global inequality in roadkill burden concentrates collision risk on threatened species in low- and middle-income countries
source: Scientific community and society : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Global development relies on vast and expanding road networks, yet the global distribution of the wildlife mortality they cause remains poorly quantified. Here we show, using researcher-led surveys, global citizen-science records and a high-resolution national dataset for China, that wildlife-vehicle collisions disproportionately burden biodiversity in low- and middle-income countries. After standardising for species pools and sampling effort, low- and middle-income countries bear a heavier roadkill burden than high-income countries, with the strongest disparities reaching 2–4-fold for threatened vertebrates but much weaker contrasts for non-threatened species. This reflects elevated collision rates among threatened fauna rather than a broader list of affected species. In China, the same pattern unfolds along a land-use intensity gradient: transformed landscapes elevate risk for common generalists while progressively filtering threatened taxa from the roadscape. Overall, expanding transport networks concentrate contemporary collision burden on threatened biodiversity in low- and middle-income countries.
title_zh: 全球道路死亡负担的不平等将碰撞风险集中在低收入和中等收入国家的受威胁物种身上
abstract_zh: 全球发展依赖于庞大且不断扩大的道路网络，但其造成的野生动物死亡的全球分布仍难以量化。在这里，我们利用研究人员主导的调查、全球公民科学记录和中国高分辨率国家数据集表明，野生动物与车辆的碰撞给低收入和中等收入国家的生物多样性造成了不成比例的负担。在对物种库和抽样工作进行标准化后，低收入和中等收入国家比高收入国家承受着更重的道路死亡负担，受威胁脊椎动物的最大差距达到 2-4 倍，但非受威胁物种的差距要弱得多。这反映了受威胁动物群之间的碰撞率上升，而不是更广泛的受影响物种。在中国，同样的模式沿着土地利用强度梯度展开：景观的改变提高了普通通才的风险，同时逐渐从道路景观中过滤掉受威胁的类群。总体而言，不断扩大的交通网络将当代碰撞负担集中在低收入和中等收入国家受威胁的生物多样性上。

title: Radical-omics reveals the hydrogen-abstraction pathway of isoprene oxidation
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Isoprene is the most abundant biogenic volatile organic compound (BVOC) and has far-reaching impacts on secondary organic aerosol (SOA) formation globally. Its atmospheric oxidation produces diverse isomeric radicals that drive subsequent chain propagation and mechanistic branching. However, high-throughput experimental characterization of these isomeric-resolved radicals remains unavailable, leaving critical gaps in the underlying molecular mechanisms. Here we establish a radical-omics approach for isomer-specific identification and detection of hundreds of radical species generated during VOCs oxidation. Applied to OH-initiated isoprene oxidation, this method enables experimental quantification of four OH-added allylic radicals and determination of their branching ratios. We further found hydrogen-abstraction to be an unexpectedly important pathway, contributing up to 8.78 ± 3.96% of total branching. Incorporating the updated mechanism into a global chemical transport model shows that this pathway contributes up to 13.5% of isoprene-derived low-volatility SOA over tropical rainforests. These results provide an experimental foundation for radical screening and targeted mechanistic validation, revealing hidden pathways in complex atmospheric conditions.
title_zh: 自由基组学揭示异戊二烯氧化的夺氢途径
abstract_zh: 异戊二烯是最丰富的生物挥发性有机化合物（BVOC），对全球二次有机气溶胶（SOA）的形成具有深远影响。它的大气氧化产生多种异构自由基，驱动随后的链增长和机械支化。然而，这些异构体分解自由基的高通量实验表征仍然无法实现，从而在潜在的分子机制中留下了关键的空白。在这里，我们建立了一种自由基组学方法，用于异构体特异性鉴定和检测 VOC 氧化过程中产生的数百种自由基物质。该方法应用于 OH 引发的异戊二烯氧化，能够对四个 OH 添加的烯丙基进行实验定量并测定其支化比。我们进一步发现氢抽象是一个意想不到的重要途径，占总支化的 8.78 ± 3.96%。将更新的机制纳入全球化学品传输模型表明，该途径在热带雨林中贡献了高达 13.5% 的异戊二烯衍生的低挥发性 SOA。这些结果为彻底筛选和有针对性的机制验证提供了实验基础，揭示了复杂大气条件下隐藏的途径。

title: Tectonically driven integration of the 4.8 Ma Colorado River USA tracked with detrital sanidine and fish genetics
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The development of the continental-scale Colorado River system, western USA, from 8 to 4.8 Ma, is revealed using 60-40 Ma detrital sanidine tracer grains and fish phylogeny. Here we show that precursor paleoriver segments became integrated north to south as traced by 60-40 Ma sand grains that were derived from the north and sequentially appeared in the 25-8 Ma Browns Park Formation of Utah, 7-6 Ma upper Bidahochi Formation of Arizona, and 4.8 Ma Bouse Formation of the lower Colorado River and proto Gulf of California. This timing is mimicked by molecular clock estimates of divergence times among fish lineages. River integration was a response to headwater uplifts in the Yellowstone hotspot track and Rocky Mountains. 40Ar/39Ar ages refine the timing for mantle-drips that caused subsidence, then uplift, of depositional basins that influenced the integration pathway and tempo. The ~ 3-million-year timescale suggests that multiscale mantle-driven uplift, rather than lake spillover, was the primary driver for integration of the proto-Colorado River through Grand Canyon.
title_zh: 构造驱动的美国 4.8 Ma 科罗拉多河整合与碎屑沙尼丁和鱼类遗传学追踪
abstract_zh: 使用 60-40 Ma 碎屑 Sanidine 示踪颗粒和鱼类系统发育揭示了美国西部大陆规模的科罗拉多河系统从 8 Ma 到 4.8 Ma 的发展。在这里，我们发现前身古河段从北向南一体化，由来自北方的 60-40 Ma 沙粒追踪，这些沙粒依次出现在犹他州 25-8 Ma Browns Park 地层、亚利桑那州 7-6 Ma 上 Bidahochi 地层以及科罗拉多河下游和原始加利福尼亚湾的 4.8 Ma Bouse 地层。这个时间是通过分子钟估计鱼类谱系之间的分化时间来模仿的。河流整合是对黄石热点路线和落基山脉源头抬升的回应。 40Ar/39Ar年龄完善了地幔滴水的时间，地幔滴水导致沉积盆地沉降，然后抬升，从而影响了整合路径和速度。大约 300 万年的时间尺度表明，多尺度地幔驱动的隆起，而不是湖泊溢出，是原始科罗拉多河通过大峡谷整合的主要驱动力。

title: Svalbard-barents ice sheet instability enhanced delivery of reactive iron to the ocean
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Iron (Fe) plays a key role in marine environments as a bio-limiting nutrient and a control on sedimentary burial of carbon and other nutrients. Sensitive glacial systems provide an important delivery mechanism for Fe to the ocean, but it is unknown how these glacial sources will change as ice retreats. Sedimentary records from the Yermak Plateau, proximal to the Svalbard-Barents Ice Sheet provide an opportunity to investigate how past glacial instability may have affected bioavailable iron delivery. Here we find that over the past 135 ka, pulsed reactive Fe export to the Yermak Plateau occurred at least 5 times, during intervals of ice sheet retreat or advance. Fe-rich layers preserve high contents of reactive Fe phases, some of which were likely bioavailable at the time of deposition. Glacial Fe from Svalbard may have been delivered either directly by meltwater plumes or through remobilization of Fe deposited in fjord and shelf sediments. The delivery of reactive Fe hundreds of kilometers offshore during these events indicates that ice sheet instability in modern settings could perturb high latitude nutrient cycles.
title_zh: 斯瓦尔巴-巴伦支海冰盖的不稳定性增强了活性铁向海洋的输送
abstract_zh: 铁 (Fe) 作为生物限制营养素以及对碳和其他营养素沉积埋藏的控制剂，在海洋环境中发挥着关键作用。敏感的冰川系统为铁向海洋提供了重要的输送机制，但目前尚不清楚随着冰的消退，这些冰川来源将如何变化。靠近斯瓦尔巴-巴伦支海冰盖的叶尔马克高原的沉积记录为研究过去的冰川不稳定可能如何影响生物可利用的铁输送提供了机会。在这里我们发现，在过去的 135 ka 中，在冰盖退缩或前进的间隔期间，向叶尔马克高原的脉冲活性铁输出至少发生了 5 次。富铁层保留了高含量的活性铁相，其中一些在沉积时可能是生物可利用的。斯瓦尔巴群岛的冰川铁可能直接通过融水羽流输送，或者通过沉积在峡湾和陆架沉积物中的铁的再流动输送。在这些事件期间，活性铁被输送到近海数百公里处，这表明现代环境中冰盖的不稳定性可能会扰乱高纬度的营养循环。

title: Absolute chronology of the Early Palaeolithic Karatau Culture in Central Asia
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Central Asia represents a key region for our understanding of early human dispersal patterns, because it served as a migration corridor that linked the Levant and southern Caucasus with Northeast Asia. However, no Early Palaeolithic sites in Central Asia are anchored with reliable age constraints, including the thick loess-palaeosol sections in Tajikistan that recorded early human activities and environmental changes over multiple glacial-interglacial cycles. This lack of absolute age constraints is presently a key factor limiting our understanding of the early human occupation history of this region. Here, we provide a comprehensive description and an absolute chronological framework for the Early Palaeolithic Karatau Culture; defined by the rich lithic assemblages found in palaeosols in the Khovaling Loess Plateau, Tajikistan. Age constraints are provided through multi-method analysis of three loess-palaeosol sections in the Khovaling Loess Plateau, combining luminescence ages, cosmogenic 26Al-10Be concentrations, and magnetostratigraphic boundaries into a probabilistic inverse age-depth model. This model shows that the Karatau Culture flourished with the onset of Marine Isotope Stage 15, thrived during Marine Isotope Stage 13 and 11, but disappeared around onset of Marine Isotope Stage 10. We frame the archaeological occupations within local and regional ecological settings to better understand the drivers of Pleistocene human migrations in Central Asia.
title_zh: 中亚旧石器时代早期卡拉陶文化的绝对年代学
abstract_zh: 中亚是我们了解早期人类扩散模式的关键地区，因为它是连接黎凡特和南高加索与东北亚的移民走廊。然而，中亚的早期旧石器时代遗址没有可靠的年龄限制，包括塔吉克斯坦厚厚的黄土-古土壤部分，记录了早期人类活动和多个冰期-间冰期周期的环境变化。目前，缺乏绝对年龄限制是限制我们了解该地区早期人类占领历史的一个关键因素。在这里，我们为旧石器时代早期卡拉陶文化提供了全面的描述和绝对的年代框架；塔吉克斯坦霍瓦林黄土高原的古土壤中发现了丰富的石器组合。通过对Khovaling黄土高原的三个黄土-古土壤剖面进行多方法分析，将发光年龄、宇宙成因26Al-10Be浓度和磁性地层边界结合成概率反年龄-深度模型，提供了年龄约束。该模型显示，卡拉陶文化随着海洋同位素第 15 阶段的开始而繁荣，在海洋同位素第 13 和第 11 阶段开始时蓬勃发展，但在海洋同位素第 10 阶段开始时消失。我们将考古活动置于当地和区域生态环境中，以更好地了解中亚更新世人类迁徙的驱动因素。

title: Molecular basis for depsipeptide HDAC inhibitor combinatorial biosynthesis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Polyketides and nonribosomal peptides are important natural product classes with wide-ranging medical and agricultural applications. The analogous enzymatic logic employed by bacterial modular polyketide synthases (PKSs) and nonribosomal peptide synthetases (NRPSs) enables the assembly of hybrid products. One important group of polyketide-nonribosomal peptide hybrids is exemplified by the HDAC-targeting drug romidepsin. This group is assembled by combinatorial biosynthesis involving fusion of a conserved Zn2+-binding pharmacophore to a variable peptide-based cap. Here, we use gene proximity searching to identify the FR-901375 biosynthetic gene cluster in Pseudomonas chlororaphis subsp. piscium DSM 21509. Comparison of the PKS-NRPS encoded by this gene cluster with those assembling related depsipeptide HDAC inhibitors suggests an unusual subunit docking modality enables interaction between the conserved pharmacophore and variable cap biosynthetic machineries. This hypothesis is validated using crosstalk assays, mutagenesis, AlphaFold predictions, and carbene footprinting, providing insight into the evolution of mechanisms for hybrid polyketide-nonribosomal peptide combinatorial biosynthesis.
title_zh: 缩酚肽 HDAC 抑制剂组合生物合成的分子基础
abstract_zh: 聚酮化合物和非核糖体肽是重要的天然产物类别，具有广泛的医学和农业应用。细菌模块化聚酮合酶（PKS）和非核糖体肽合成酶（NRPS）采用类似的酶逻辑，能够组装混合产品。一组重要的聚酮化合物-非核糖体肽杂合体的例子是 HDAC 靶向药物罗米地辛。该基团通过组合生物合成组装而成，涉及保守的 Zn2+ 结合药效团与可变的基于肽的帽的融合。在这里，我们使用基因邻近搜索来识别绿针假单胞菌亚种中的 FR-901375 生物合成基因簇。 piscium DSM 21509。将该基因簇编码的 PKS-NRPS 与那些组装相关缩酚肽 HDAC 抑制剂的比较表明，一种不寻常的亚基对接方式能够实现保守药效团和可变帽生物合成机器之间的相互作用。该假设通过串扰测定、诱变、AlphaFold 预测和卡宾足迹法得到验证，为杂合聚酮化合物-非核糖体肽组合生物合成机制的演变提供了深入的见解。

title: Achieving near-theoretical strength and high elasticity in micrometer scale TiB2 ceramics
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Achieving near-theoretical strength and elastic limits in crystalline solids remains challenging, yet defect sensitivity typically restricts such behavior to nanometer scale specimens. Here we report experimental evidence of near-theoretical strength and large elastic tensile strains in micrometer scale TiB2 ceramics, produced in situ by eutectic solidification in steel. In situ bending of crystallographically oriented cantilevers, fixed end beams and C-shaped structures, combined with specimen specific finite element analysis, reveals tensile side stresses of tens of gigapascals and elastic strains up to 9%. Direct microscale tension shows that a large gauge volume exceeding 4 μm3 sustains nearly uniform tensile stress of ~13 GPa without fracture before grip edge failure, providing a conservative lower bound tensile benchmark, while micropillar compression confirms high stress bearing capability. These results establish eutectic solidification as a scalable pathway to suppress strength limiting defects over micrometer scale volumes, extending near-theoretical ceramic strength beyond the nanoscale and enabling robust microarchitected components.
title_zh: 微米级 TiB2 陶瓷实现接近理论的强度和高弹性
abstract_zh: 在结晶固体中实现接近理论的强度和弹性极限仍然具有挑战性，但缺陷敏感性通常将这种行为限制在纳米级样品上。在这里，我们报告了微米级 TiB2 陶瓷接近理论强度和大弹性拉伸应变的实验证据，这些陶瓷是通过钢中共晶凝固原位产生的。晶体定向悬臂、固定端梁和 C 形结构的原位弯曲，结合样本特定的有限元分析，揭示了数十千兆帕的拉伸侧应力和高达 9% 的弹性应变。直接微尺度拉伸表明，超过 4 μm3 的大规格体积可维持约 13 GPa 的几乎均匀拉伸应力，在夹边失效之前不会断裂，提供保守的下限拉伸基准，而微柱压缩则证实了高应力承受能力。这些结果将共晶凝固确立为一种可扩展的途径，可抑制微米级体积上的强度限制缺陷，将接近理论的陶瓷强度扩展到纳米级之外，并实现坚固的微结构组件。

title: Changes in El Niño–Southern Oscillation and global frequency entrainment
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The El Niño–Southern Oscillation (ENSO) periodicity governs the recurrence of its warm and cold phases, shaping the climate variability and the frequency of extremes, yet remains poorly constrained in climate model projections. Here we assess, using coordinated multi-model large-ensemble simulations, the forced modulation of ENSO periodicity from the last millennium to the future and its global imprint. ENSO periodicity tends to shorten under future warming, and this periodicity shift extends to tropical climate modes and propagates globally through teleconnections, a phenomenon we refer to as ENSO frequency entrainment. The frequency entrainment appears to be ubiquitous, evident in forced responses in last-millennium simulations and under nonstationary, nonmonotonic CO2 forcing, as well as in periodicity modulation driven by internal multi-decadal variability. Changes in future ENSO periodicity may alter the frequency of local climatic events globally, potentially favoring more frequent extreme events.
title_zh: 厄尔尼诺-南方涛动的变化和全球频率夹带
abstract_zh: 厄尔尼诺-南方涛动（ENSO）的周期性控制着其暖期和冷期的重现，从而影响气候变化和极端事件的频率，但在气候模型预测中仍然受到很少的限制。在这里，我们使用协调的多模型大型集合模拟来评估 ENSO 周期性从上个千年到未来的强制调制及其全球印记。在未来变暖的情况下，ENSO 的周期性往往会缩短，这种周期性变化会延伸到热带气候模式，并通过遥相关在全球范围内传播，我们将这种现象称为 ENSO 频率夹带。频率夹带似乎无处不在，这在上个千年模拟中的受迫响应和非平稳、非单调二氧化碳强迫下以及由内部数十年变化驱动的周期性调制中很明显。未来 ENSO 周期性的变化可能会改变全球局部气候事件的频率，可能有利于极端事件的发生。

title: Toughening elastomer via sequentially activated multi-pathway energy dissipation
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Auxiliary energy dissipation pathways have been incorporated into elastomer design to enhance the toughness. However, most strategies involving multiple pathways rely on non-synergistic dissipation that ceases to function once structural evolution occurs. Herein, we report a strategy to toughen elastomer via sequentially activated multi-pathway energy dissipation, simultaneously integrating mechanically interlocked networks (MINs), scissile mechanophore, and woven networks within a single polymer. A rotaxane crosslinker is applied to construct MINs in polyurethane as the primary energy dissipation pathway. After the sliding motion of the rotaxane crosslinkers reaches its maximal extent, the truxinate mechanophore embedded in rotaxane’s macrocycle undergoes sacrificial scission as the secondary pathway. Subsequently, the linear chain produced by cleavage of the rotaxane’s macrocycle inherently entangles with the axle chain, resulting in woven networks as the tertiary energy dissipation pathway. This strategy substantially enhances the toughness and clarifies how mechanophore activation interacts with supramolecular architecture in polymeric materials.
title_zh: 通过顺序激活的多途径能量耗散增韧弹性体
abstract_zh: 辅助能量耗散路径已纳入弹性体设计中，以增强韧性。然而，大多数涉及多种途径的策略都依赖于非协同耗散，一旦结构进化发生，这种耗散就会停止发挥作用。在此，我们报告了一种通过顺序激活的多路径能量耗散来增韧弹性体的策略，同时将机械联锁网络（MIN）、可裂变机械团和编织网络集成在单个聚合物中。轮烷交联剂用于在聚氨酯中构建 MIN，作为主要的能量耗散途径。当轮烷交联剂的滑动达到最大程度后，嵌入轮烷大环中的truxinate机械载体经历牺牲断裂作为第二途径。随后，轮烷大环裂解产生的线性链与轴链固有地缠结，形成编织网络作为三级能量耗散路径。这种策略大大增强了韧性，并阐明了力团激活如何与聚合物材料中的超分子结构相互作用。

title: Vegetation browning patterns under compound soil and atmospheric dryness in northern permafrost ecosystems
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Significant changes in vegetation greenness and browning have been observed across the northern permafrost zone, with important implications for ecosystem functioning and carbon uptake. While recent research has improved our understanding of the drivers of greening, the processes behind browning – especially the low-stature shrubs and herbaceous vegetation, which is more directly exposed to soil and atmospheric moisture deficits – remain less clear. To characterize browning patterns, we integrate multiple remote sensing datasets – including normalized difference vegetation index (NDVI), solar-induced chlorophyll fluorescence (SIF), and foliar chlorophyll concentration (FCC) – with gross primary productivity (GPP) simulations from CMIP6 Earth system models (ESM). We identify significant browning trends (−0.033 to − 0.025 decade-1, from MODIS NDVI) from 2001 to 2018, affecting approximately 20 % (~600,000 km2) of the study region. Browning is primarily modulated by compound soil and atmospheric dryness, reflected by declining soil moisture concurrent with increasing vapor pressure deficit. We further show that regional warming and changes in precipitation, together with permafrost-related constraints on infiltration and storage, modulate the spatial heterogeneity of compound dryness. CMIP6 projections suggest that compound dryness is likely to persist or intensify in permafrost ecosystems, implying continued risk of productivity loss, especially when combined with pulse disturbances such as wildfires.
title_zh: 北方多年冻土生态系统复合土壤和大气干燥条件下的植被褐化模式
abstract_zh: 在北部永久冻土带观察到植被绿度和褐变的显着变化，对生态系统功能和碳吸收产生重要影响。虽然最近的研究提高了我们对绿化驱动因素的理解，但褐变背后的过程——尤其是更直接暴露于土壤和大气水分不足的低矮灌木和草本植被——仍然不太清楚。为了表征褐变模式，我们将多个遥感数据集（包括归一化植被指数 (NDVI)、太阳诱导叶绿素荧光 (SIF) 和叶绿素浓度 (FCC)）与 CMIP6 地球系统模型 (ESM) 的总初级生产力 (GPP) 模拟相结合。我们确定了 2001 年至 2018 年显着的褐变趋势（−0.033 至 − 0.025 decade-1，来自 MODIS NDVI），影响了研究区域约 20%（约 600,000 平方公里）。褐变主要受复合土壤和大气干燥的调节，反映在土壤湿度下降和蒸气压不足增加的同时。我们进一步表明，区域变暖和降水变化，以及与永久冻土相关的渗透和储存限制，调节了复合干旱的空间异质性。 CMIP6 预测表明，永久冻土生态系统中的复合干旱可能持续或加剧，这意味着生产力损失的风险持续存在，特别是与野火等脉冲干扰相结合时。

title: Rotational observation of kinetically hindered neutral radical pairs
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Probing the molecular structure of radical pairs has remained challenging because of their short lifetimes. Here we use the persistent nitroxyl radical 2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidin-1-oxyl (TEMPO) as model system, reporting the rotational characterization of its radical pairs in a supersonic molecular jet. The experiment employs isotopic-sensitive high-resolution microwave spectroscopy, revealing two distinct neutral pairing patterns avoiding electron transfer. In each radical pair the nitroxyl molecules establish non-covalent van der Waals interactions with N···O distances of 3.38 and 4.93 Å, respectively, as confirmed by 18O-labeling experiments. The absence of electron spin hyperfine effects is consistent with quantum mechanical density functional predictions favoring an unexpected open-shell singlet. These results starkly contrast with predictions for the dimethyl nitroxyl radical dimer, which undergoes a spontaneous hydrogen transfer to closed-shell species and confirms the kinetically hindered or frustrated character of the TEMPO dimer. The experiment thus provides a direct molecular-level picture of neutral radical pairs in isolation and open avenues for exploring the quantum structure and reactivity of correlated radical species.
title_zh: 动力学受阻中性自由基对的旋转观察
abstract_zh: 由于自由基对的寿命较短，探测自由基对的分子结构仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们使用持久性硝酰自由基 2,2,6,6-四甲基哌啶-1-氧基 (TEMPO) 作为模型系统，报告其自由基对在超音速分子射流中的旋转特征。该实验采用同位素敏感的高分辨率微波光谱，揭示了两种不同的中性配对模式，避免了电子转移。在每个自由基对中，硝酰基分子建立非共价范德华相互作用，N·O 距离分别为 3.38 和 4.93 Å，经 18O 标记实验证实。电子自旋超精细效应的缺失与量子力学密度泛函预测一致，有利于意想不到的开壳层单线态。这些结果与二甲基硝酰基自由基二聚体的预测形成鲜明对比，二甲基硝酰基自由基二聚体经历自发氢转移至闭壳物种，并证实了 TEMPO 二聚体的动力学受阻或受阻特征。因此，该实验提供了孤立的中性自由基对的直接分子水平图像，并为探索相关自由基物种的量子结构和反应性提供了开放的途径。

title: A molten salt metal-air electrolyzer for recycling superalloy
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Recovering critical strategic metals from superalloy scraps is indispensable to sustaining the materials supply chain. However, the excellent physicochemical properties of superalloy make them difficult to dissolve and separate, thereby hindering their recycling and reutilization. Here, we design a molten salt metal–air electrolyzer (MMAE) that synergistically oxidizes and pulverizes scraps, which generates oxide powders that can be easily dissolved and separated for all element recovery. The corrosivity of molten chloride and electrochemical polarization can convert scraps at the anode into soluble metal chlorides, while oxygen is reduced to O2- in the form of soluble CaO. Subsequently, the soluble metal cations encounter O2- in molten CaCl2-NaCl to precipitate as insoluble oxides. The MMAE constructs two dynamic metal/metal chloride and oxygen/CaO interfaces, achieving a high dissolution rate of 0.290 g/(cm2∙h). Subsequent roasting process preferentially extracts rhenium (Re) with a recovery efficiency of 90.46%, followed by selective separation and recovery of other metals with a recovery efficiency of >93% under low acid consumption. Life cycle assessment analysis shows its low energy consumption and environmental impact. Overall, the MMAE is a general method to recover a range of superalloy scraps, opening up an effective pathway for advancing sustainable metal recycling.
title_zh: 一种回收高温合金的熔盐金属-空气电解槽
abstract_zh: 从高温合金废料中回收关键战略金属对于维持材料供应链至关重要。然而，高温合金优异的物理化学性能使其难以溶解和分离，从而阻碍了其回收和再利用。在这里，我们设计了一种熔盐金属空气电解槽（MMAE），它可以协同氧化和粉碎废料，生成易于溶解和分离的氧化物粉末，以实现所有元素的回收。熔融氯化物的腐蚀性和电化学极化可以将阳极处的废料转化为可溶性金属氯化物，同时氧气以可溶性CaO的形式被还原为O2-。随后，可溶性金属阳离子遇到熔融CaCl2-NaCl中的O2-，沉淀为不溶性氧化物。 MMAE 构建了两个动态金属/金属氯化物和氧/CaO 界面，实现了 0.290 g/(cm2∙h) 的高溶解速率。随后的焙烧过程优先提取铼（Re），回收率达到90.46%，然后选择性分离回收其他金属，在低酸消耗下回收率>93%。生命周期评估分析显示其能耗低、环境影响低。总体而言，MMAE 是回收一系列高温合金废料的通用方法，为推进可持续金属回收开辟了有效途径。

title: Few-atom-thick silver films for enhanced nanoscale nonlinear optics
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The inherently weak nonlinear optical response of bulk materials remains a fundamental limitation in advancing photonic technologies. Nanophotonics addresses this challenge by tailoring the size and morphology of nanostructures to manipulate the optical near field, thus modulating the nonlinear response. Here, we explore a complementary strategy based on engineering the electronic band structure in the mesoscopic regime to enhance optical nonlinearities. Specifically, we demonstrate an increase in second-harmonic generation (SHG) from crystalline silver films as their thickness is reduced down to just a few atomic monolayers. Operating at the boundary between bulk and two-dimensional systems, these ultra-thin films exhibit a pronounced enhancement of SHG with decreasing thickness. This enhancement stems from quantum confinement effects that modify the interaction between electronic states and incident light, which we explain based on quantum-mechanical calculation. Our atomically-thin crystalline silver films provide a new means to overcome the small interaction volumes inherent to nanophotonic platforms, enabling efficient nanoscale nonlinear optics with potential applications in photonics, sensing, and quantum technologies.
title_zh: 用于增强纳米级非线性光学的少原子厚银膜
abstract_zh: 块体材料固有的弱非线性光学响应仍然是推进光子技术的基本限制。纳米光子学通过调整纳米结构的尺寸和形态来操纵光学近场，从而调制非线性响应来解决这一挑战。在这里，我们探索了一种基于介观范围内的电子能带结构工程的补充策略，以增强光学非线性。具体来说，我们证明了当晶体银薄膜的厚度减小到只有几个原子单层时，二次谐波产生（SHG）会增加。这些超薄膜在块体和二维系统之间的边界上工作，随着厚度的减小，二次谐波显着增强。这种增强源于量子限制效应，它改变了电子态和入射光之间的相互作用，我们根据量子力学计算来解释这一点。我们的原子级薄晶体银薄膜提供了一种新方法来克服纳米光子平台固有的小相互作用体积，从而实现高效的纳米级非线性光学，并在光子学、传感和量子技术中具有潜在的应用。

title: Ultralong, spin-photon fibres enable polarization-enhanced wearable sensing
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Photon-in-textile offers transformative potential for wearable sensing, yet persistent challenges in signal overlap, coupling, and quality degradation in dynamic, multivariate environments limit their efficacy. A new polarization-enhanced sensing technology, enabled by a spin fibre-textile capable of efficient decoupling between multivariable interference, is presented. We develop a discrete helix anchoring strategy that autonomously embeds circularly polarized materials within fibres during extrusion, yielding kilometer-scale spin-photon fibres—exceeding 1300 m in continuous length. More importantly, the resulting core-sheath beaded fibres exhibit a luminescence asymmetry factor of 0.41. The fibre-woven fabrics are then produced, allowing for dynamic, real-time signal acquisition by our developed polarization-enhanced sensing approach—that is, distinguishing spin light from surrounding optical fields—achieving signal segmentation and noise suppression at source with 92.63% signal entropy reduction in dynamic scenarios. This spin-photon-digital signal conversion system realizes a superior normalized signal-to-noise ratio of 1.0 (noiseless), thereby enabling multi-dimensional robotic control with 100% sensing accuracy under interference. Furthermore, we demonstrate the scalability and compatibility of this technology in polarization-based image processing, target recognition, and virtual reality. This work offers an innovative solution for robust, embedded intelligence in soft robotics and human-machine symbiosis.
title_zh: 超长自旋光子光纤可实现偏振增强的可穿戴传感
abstract_zh: 纺织品中的光子为可穿戴传感提供了变革潜力，但动态多变量环境中信号重叠、耦合和质量下降方面持续存在的挑战限制了其功效。提出了一种新的偏振增强传感技术，该技术由能够有效解耦多变量干扰的纺丝纤维纺织品实现。我们开发了一种离散螺旋锚定策略，在挤出过程中自动将圆偏振材料嵌入纤维内，产生公里级的自旋光子纤维——连续长度超过 1300 m。更重要的是，所得的芯鞘珠状纤维的发光不对称系数为0.41。然后生产出纤维编织物，通过我们开发的偏振增强传感方法实现动态、实时信号采集，即将自旋光与周围光场区分开来，在源头实现信号分割和噪声抑制，动态场景下信号熵降低 92.63%。该自旋光子数字信号转换系统实现了1.0（无噪声）的卓越归一化信噪比，从而实现了干扰下100%传感精度的多维机器人控制。此外，我们还展示了该技术在基于偏振的图像处理、目标识别和虚拟现实中的可扩展性和兼容性。这项工作为软机器人和人机共生中强大的嵌入式智能提供了创新的解决方案。

title: Coexistence of percolative and quantum-confined charge orders in marginally twisted TiSe2/NbSe2 heterostructure
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: In homo- or hetero-interface of two dimensional materials, beyond the rigid moiré patterns, the marginal twisting ensures local commensurate stacking registry via reconstruction and thus introduces versatile structural subtleties into the many-body interplay, enabling the coexistence and tessellation of multiple domain-specific emergent states. In this work, we demonstrate that monolayer 1T-TiSe2 epitaxially grown on 2H-NbSe2 undergoes spontaneous moiré reconstruction, therein developing distinct charge density wave configurations dictated by stacking orientation. In parallel-stacked regions, the native 2×2 charge order of TiSe2 persists but experiences domain-selective modulation. Antiparallel-stacked systems host distinctive \(\sqrt{3}\times \sqrt{3}\) and 2×1 charge orders which exhibit intertwined phenomena unveiled by scanning tunneling microscopy—including bias-toggled negative differential conductance, competitive inter-order penetration, and defect-mediated local ordering reconstitution. These observations coalesce into a unified paradigm, where the \(\sqrt{3}\times \sqrt{3}\) charge order is quantum confined and isolated in single domain, while the 2×1 charge order permeates across domains, forming a percolative network. Our results demonstrate that the marginal-twist moiré reconstruction is a designer platform to generate rich emergent charge density wave landscapes, which also serves as a nanoscale testbed to decipher their disparate microscopic nature.
title_zh: 边缘扭曲 TiSe2/NbSe2 异质结构中渗流电荷序和量子限制电荷序的共存
abstract_zh: 在二维材料的同质或异质界面中，除了严格的莫尔图案之外，边缘扭曲通过重建确保局部相称的堆叠配准，从而将多功能的结构微妙性引入多体相互作用中，从而实现多个特定领域的紧急状态的共存和镶嵌。在这项工作中，我们证明了在 2H-NbSe2 上外延生长的单层 1T-TiSe2 经历自发莫尔重构，其中形成由堆叠方向决定的不同电荷密度波配置。在平行堆叠区域中，TiSe2 的原生 2×2 电荷顺序仍然存在，但经历了域选择性调制。反平行堆叠系统具有独特的 \(\sqrt{3}\times \sqrt{3}\) 和 2×1 电荷序，这些电荷序表现出扫描隧道显微镜揭示的交织现象，包括偏置切换负微分电导、竞争性序间渗透和缺陷介导的局部有序重构。这些观察结果合并成一个统一的范式，其中 \(\sqrt{3}\times \sqrt{3}\) 电荷顺序在单域中受到量子限制和隔离，而 2×1 电荷顺序渗透到各个域，形成渗透网络。我们的结果表明，边缘扭曲莫尔重构是一个设计平台，可以生成丰富的新兴电荷密度波景观，它也可以作为纳米级测试平台来破译它们不同的微观性质。

title: High-rate single-crystalline Li-rich layered oxide with diversified surface-phase cation ordering for Li-ion batteries
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Advanced lithium-ion batteries require fast-charging high-energy-density electrodes. Li- and Mn-rich layered positive electrodes can offer higher capacity (>280 mAh g−1) and higher specific energy (>1000 Wh kg−1) than Ni-rich chemistries, yet it is challenging to produce volumetric-energy-dense Li-rich single crystals. Another concern is the rate performance. Li-rich layered oxides have long been considered to have poor rate capability, not to mention their single-crystal version. Here we report high-rate single-crystal Li-rich layered oxides with fast rechargeability. 0.2 C-discharge capacity of 248 mAh g−1at 5 C fast-charging as well as 5 C fast-discharging capacity of 179 mAh g−1 are demonstrated. We prove that the fast rechargeability can be resolved by a complex cation ordering of coherent layered-, cation mixed-, rock salt-, and spinel-type structure. The highly conductive and electrochemically active surface phases can buffer Li+ concentration gradients and enable deeper bulk lithiation. The single-crystal morphology and redesigned surface phase ensure mechanical and structural stability over cycling, improving capacity retention to 94.5% over 150 cycles at 0.5 C-rate. This work uncovers the intrinsic high-rate performance of single-crystal Li-rich layered oxides and calls attention to think about the fast-charging potential of positive electrodes with coarse microstructure.
title_zh: 用于锂离子电池的具有多样化表面相阳离子排序的高倍率单晶富锂层状氧化物
abstract_zh: 先进的锂离子电池需要快速充电的高能量密度电极。与富镍化学物质相比，富锂和富锰的层状正极可以提供更高的容量（>280 mAh g−1）和更高的比能（>1000 Wh kg−1），但生产体积能量密度高的富锂单晶具有挑战性。另一个问题是利率表现。长期以来，富锂层状氧化物一直被认为具有较差的倍率性能，更不用说它们的单晶版本了。在这里，我们报道了具有快速充电能力的高倍率单晶富锂层状氧化物。展示了 5 C 快速充电时 248 mAh g−1 的 0.2 C 放电容量以及 179 mAh g−1 的 5 C 快速放电容量。我们证明，快速可充电性可以通过相干层状、阳离子混合、岩盐和尖晶石型结构的复杂阳离子排序来解决。高导电性和电化学活性的表面相可以缓冲Li+浓度梯度并实现更深的本体锂化。单晶形态和重新设计的表面相确保了循环过程中的机械和结构稳定性，在 0.5 C 倍率下将容量保持率提高到 150 次循环后的 94.5%。这项工作揭示了单晶富锂层状氧化物的固有高倍率性能，并引起人们对粗微结构正极的快速充电潜力的思考。

title: Graphitizable pitch from pine resin enables bulk graphite from terpenes
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Graphitization of biomass-derived carbon is fundamentally constrained by the absence of molecular architectures capable of forming a mesophase during carbonization. Unlike petroleum-derived pitches, most biomass precursors lack sufficient aromatic condensation and therefore fail to undergo liquid-phase graphitization. Here we demonstrate a chemically guided strategy to convert terpene-based biomass into a true graphitizable pitch through deliberate molecular restructuring. Pine-resin–derived terpenes are sequentially transformed via deoxygenation–aromatization and controlled oligomerisation, yielding an aromatic pitch with intrinsically low heteroatom content. Thermal analysis and polarized optical microscopy provide evidence of thermoplastic behavior and mesophase formation during heating. Upon high-temperature treatment, the resulting pitch yields graphite with crystallinity comparable to natural graphite. This work establishes a molecular design principle for constructing graphitizable pitches from biomass-derived feedstocks.
title_zh: 来自松树脂的可石墨化沥青使萜烯成为块状石墨
abstract_zh: 生物质衍生碳的石墨化从根本上受到碳化过程中缺乏能够形成中间相的分子结构的限制。与石油衍生的沥青不同，大多数生物质前体缺乏足够的芳族缩合，因此无法进行液相石墨化。在这里，我们展示了一种化学引导策略，通过有意的分子重组将基于萜烯的生物质转化为真正的可石墨化沥青。松树树脂衍生的萜烯通过脱氧-芳构化和受控低聚依次转化，产生本质上杂原子含量较低的芳香沥青。热分析和偏光光学显微镜提供了加热过程中热塑性行为和中间相形成的证据。经过高温处理，所得沥青产生结晶度与天然石墨相当的石墨。这项工作建立了从生物质衍生原料构建可石墨化沥青的分子设计原理。

title: Targeting rapidly cycling receptors CD2 and CD7 increases nanoparticle delivery to primary CD4+ T cells
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: T cells are critically important to many diseases but are traditionally difficult to transfect. We hypothesise that the delivery of therapeutic cargo to T cells can be improved by targeting nanoparticles to surface receptors that undergo rapid receptor-mediated endocytosis. Using an internalisation assay that labelled intracellular and surface proteins with different fluorophores, we find that CD2 and CD7 exhibit significantly higher internalisation than other T cell receptors, such as CD3 or CD4. Targeting CD2 and CD7 improves nanoparticle internalisation by non-stimulated, primary CD4+ T cells and enhances the specificity of association to CD4+ T cells. Similarly, functionalising mRNA-lipid nanoparticles with antibodies targeting CD2 or CD7 enhances mRNA delivery to CD4+ T cells in vitro. Importantly, targeting CD2 or CD7 enables efficient lipid nanoparticle-mediated delivery of mRNA to T cells in blood and lymphoid tissue in vivo, demonstrating that targeting T cell receptor endocytosis can enhance nanoparticle-mediated drug delivery to T cells.
title_zh: 靶向快速循环受体 CD2 和 CD7 增加纳米颗粒向原代 CD4+ T 细胞的递送
abstract_zh: T 细胞对许多疾病至关重要，但传统上很难转染。我们假设，通过将纳米颗粒靶向经历快速受体介导的内吞作用的表面受体，可以改善治疗药物向 T 细胞的递送。使用用不同荧光团标记细胞内和表面蛋白的内化测定，我们发现 CD2 和 CD7 表现出比其他 T 细胞受体（例如 CD3 或 CD4）显着更高的内化。靶向 CD2 和 CD7 可改善未刺激的原代 CD4+ T 细胞对纳米颗粒的内化，并增强与 CD4+ T 细胞关联的特异性。同样，用靶向 CD2 或 CD7 的抗体功能化 mRNA-脂质纳米颗粒可增强体外 mRNA 向 CD4+ T 细胞的递送。重要的是，靶向 CD2 或 CD7 能够有效地将脂质纳米颗粒介导的 mRNA 递送至体内血液和淋巴组织中的 T 细胞，这表明靶向 T 细胞受体内吞作用可以增强纳米颗粒介导的药物递送至 T 细胞。

title: The Riemann Hypothesis manifested in dynamical quantum phase transitions
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The Riemann Hypothesis (RH), one of the most profound unsolved problems in mathematics, concerns the nontrivial zeros of the Riemann zeta function. Linking these zeros to physical phenomena offers new perspectives on their origin and verification. Here we establish a direct correspondence between these zeros and dynamical quantum phase transitions in two complementary engineered quantum many-body systems, characterized by the average accumulated phase factor and the Loschmidt amplitude, respectively. This precise correspondence recasts the RH as the occurrence of phase transitions at a unique temperature and identifies it as a previously unknown transition mechanism. We demonstrate this correspondence in a proof-of-principle experiment on a quantum processor. Moreover, we propose a quantum computational framework that implements both systems with polynomial resources, suggesting quantum advantage in probing the hypothesis. Our work bridges nonequilibrium quantum dynamics and number theory, positioning quantum computing as a powerful platform for exploring mathematical conjectures, phase transitions and beyond.
title_zh: 黎曼猜想在动态量子相变中的体现
abstract_zh: 黎曼假设 (RH) 是数学中最深刻的未解决问题之一，涉及黎曼 zeta 函数的非平凡零点。将这些零与物理现象联系起来，为它们的起源和验证提供了新的视角。在这里，我们在两个互补工程量子多体系统中建立了这些零点和动态量子相变之间的直接对应关系，分别以平均累积相位因子和洛施密特振幅为特征。这种精确的对应关系将 RH 重新定义为在特定温度下发生相变，并将其识别为以前未知的转变机制。我们在量子处理器的原理验证实验中证明了这种对应关系。此外，我们提出了一个量子计算框架，该框架使用多项式资源来实现这两个系统，这表明在探索假设方面具有量子优势。我们的工作连接了非平衡量子动力​​学和数论，将量子计算定位为探索数学猜想、相变等的强大平台。

title: Bio-integrated μBots with overtone ultrawideband magnetoelectric antennas for wireless telemetry
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Implantable and wearable devices require antennas that are both miniaturized and efficient, yet conventional designs are constrained by narrow bandwidth and orientation sensitivity. We report overtone ultrawideband magnetoelectric (OUWB-ME) antennas that exploit higher-order acoustic modes in polished silicon substrates to achieve a 22.6-gigahertz −10-decibel bandwidth and overtone capability in the 3- to 4-gigahertz range. Packaged into “μBots,” these magnetoelectric heterostructures bonded with silver nanoparticle inks maintain stable operation under biological loading. In vitro assays confirm the biocompatibility of aluminum nitride and the protective role of parylene encapsulation for iron-gallium. Ex vivo rat and human tissues reshape transmission and reflection spectra, with reproducible frequency windows near 3.3 and 3.9 gigahertz. μBots enable real-time audiovisual telemetry using software-defined radios and exhibit compatibility with 7-tesla magnetic resonance imaging. By combining wideband response, robustness to misalignment, and biocompatible packaging, OUWB-ME μBots provide a scalable platform for wireless bio-integrated communication and telemetry.
title_zh: 具有泛音超宽带磁电天线的生物集成 μBot，用于无线遥测
abstract_zh: 植入式和可穿戴设备需要小型化且高效的天线，但传统设计受到窄带宽和方向敏感性的限制。我们报告了泛音超宽带磁电 (OUWB-ME) 天线，它利用抛光硅基板中的高阶声学模式来实现 22.6 GHz -10 分贝带宽和 3 至 4 GHz 范围内的泛音能力。这些与银纳米颗粒墨水结合的磁电异质结构被封装在“μBots”中，在生物负载下保持稳定运行。体外测定证实了氮化铝的生物相容性以及聚对二甲苯封装对铁镓的保护作用。离体大鼠和人体组织重塑透射和反射光谱，具有接近 3.3 和 3.9 GHz 的可重复频率窗口。 μBot 使用软件定义的无线电实现实时视听遥测，并表现出与 7 特斯拉磁共振成像的兼容性。通过结合宽带响应、对错位的鲁棒性和生物相容性封装，OUWB-ME μBot 为无线生物集成通信和遥测提供了一个可扩展的平台。

However, constructing robust heterojunctions and correlating site chemistry remain challenging. Here, we present a highly durable Nb

Synchrotron radiation core-level spectroscopy and scanning transmission electron microscopy resolved four distinct niobium (Nb) coordination environments within the heterojunction. Critically, by integrating a site-selective x-ray analysis (diffraction anomalous fine structure) with complementary synchrotron techniques, it was pinpointed that the Nb

title: Coordination of N2-fixing cell specialization and patterning in filamentous cyanobacteria by a uniquely structured σ factor
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Cell differentiation and Turing-like patterning are tightly associated in a group of filamentous cyanobacteria that differentiate specialized N
                    2
                    -fixing cells, called heterocysts. Based on systematic genetic analyses, in particular genome-wide identification of recognized promoters and assays with a reconstituted
                    Anabaena
                    transcription system in
                    Escherichia coli
                    , we established HetZ as the central activator of the gene regulatory network of heterocyst differentiation. Biochemical and cryo-EM analyses further established HetZ as a σ factor (σ
                    HetZ
                    ). Unique domain insertions in σ
                    HetZ
                    are involved in promoter DNA recognition-unwinding and interaction with the inhibitor PatU3. σ
                    HetZ
                    -PatU3 and the master regulator-diffusible inhibitor constitute the minimal core regulatory circuit (CRC) for cell fate determination and patterning. σ
                    HetZ
                    activates not only genes of the CRC but also downstream regulator/effector genes involved in morphological and functional development. The gene regulatory network and the structure–function relationship of σ
                    HetZ
                    depict how cell differentiation and patterning are coordinated in this group of multicellular cyanobacteria.

abstract_zh:
细胞分化和图灵样图案与一组丝状蓝细菌密切相关，这些丝状蓝细菌区分专门的N
                    2
                    -固定细胞，称为异形细胞。基于系统的遗传分析，特别是对公认的启动子进行全基因组鉴定，并使用重组的基因进行分析
                    鱼腥藻
                    转录系统在
                    大肠杆菌

                    赫兹

title: Spatiotemporal control of myoblast identity drives muscle diversity in the Drosophila leg
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Skeletal muscles exhibit notable morphological diversity, yet the developmental mechanisms specifying distinct identities are unclear. Using
                    Drosophila
                    leg muscles, we show that naïve mesodermal precursors undergo stepwise specification orchestrated by epithelial morphogens. Wg/Wnt1 and Dpp/BMP first restrict multipotent precursors into proximal and distal lineages. Within the distal lineage, successive fate bifurcations generate distinct muscle subtypes and a separate nonmuscle lineage of neuronal lamella cells. Focusing on one lineage, we demonstrate that Wg and Dpp act again to control the spatiotemporal deployment of transcription factors, ensuring that groups of myoblasts destined to fuse to produce a specific muscle share a coordinated transcriptional identity. Thus, epithelial morphogens not only pattern the epithelium but also synchronize myoblast specification, enabling the emergence of diverse muscles from syncytial fibers. Our findings provide a framework for the developmental and evolutionary origins of appendicular muscles and may help explain the selective vulnerability of specific muscles in muscular dystrophies.
title_zh: 成肌细胞身份的时空控制驱动果蝇腿部的肌肉多样性
abstract_zh:
骨骼肌表现出显着的形态多样性，但指定不同身份的发育机制尚不清楚。使用
                    果蝇
                    在腿部肌肉中，我们发现幼稚的中胚层前体经历了由上皮形态发生素精心策划的逐步规范。 Wg/Wnt1 和 Dpp/BMP 首先将多能前体限制为近端和远端谱系。在远端谱系中，连续的命运分叉产生不同的肌肉亚型和神经元板层细胞的单独的非肌肉谱系。着眼于一个谱系，我们证明 Wg 和 Dpp 再次发挥作用来控制转录因子的时空部署，确保注定要融合产生特定肌肉的成肌细胞群共享协调的转录身份。因此，上皮形态发生素不仅使上皮形成图案，而且使成肌细胞规范同步，从而使合胞体纤维能够出现不同的肌肉。我们的研究结果为四肢肌肉的发育和进化起源提供了一个框架，并可能有助于解释肌营养不良症中特定肌肉的选择性脆弱性。

title: Ultrafast photocurrent detection contradicts optical detection conclusions: Exciton diffusion contributes little to carbon nanotube device efficiency
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Many conclusions about energy conversion in next-generation photovoltaic devices are gleaned indirectly from optical measurements of exciton dynamics, not directly from photocurrent itself. This method is problematic because optical measurements report on all excitons, not just productive ones. Using a new ultrafast photocurrent spectrometer, we compare exciton dynamics of semiconducting carbon nanotubes measured in films to those measured in devices using photoabsorption- and photocurrent-detected transient and two-dimensional spectroscopies. We find that photoabsorption detection greatly overestimates the importance of long-lived excitons for photovoltaic device performance. Excitons diffuse across nanotubes for picoseconds, but we find that the photocurrent is mostly created by excitons that diffuse little before dissociating at the electron transfer interface within 30 femtoseconds of being created. Thus, scientific conclusions reached from optical-only studies bear little importance to the performance of these devices, calling into question the processes thought critical for efficient photoconversion. This study points to the necessity for directly measuring photocurrent-generating exciton dynamics, not surmising them from optical spectroscopy alone.
title_zh: 超快光电流检测与光学检测结论相矛盾：激子扩散对碳纳米管器件效率贡献甚微
abstract_zh: 关于下一代光伏器件中能量转换的许多结论是从激子动力学的光学测量中间接收集到的，而不是直接从光电流本身中收集到的。这种方法是有问题的，因为光学测量报告的是所有激子，而不仅仅是生产激子。使用新型超快光电流光谱仪，我们将薄膜中测量的半导体碳纳米管的激子动力学与使用光吸收和光电流检测瞬态和二维光谱的设备中测量的激子动力学进行了比较。我们发现光吸收检测大大高估了长寿命激子对于光伏器件性能的重要性。激子在纳米管上扩散皮秒，但我们发现光电流主要是由激子产生的，激子在产生后 30 飞秒内在电子转移界面解离之前几乎没有扩散。因此，仅从光学研究中得出的科学结论对这些设备的性能影响不大，这使人们对被认为对高效光转换至关重要的过程产生了质疑。这项研究指出了直接测量光电流产生的激子动力学的必要性，而不是仅通过光谱来推测它们。

title: Hierarchical microtopology and phase-specific delivery functionally restore ultralong nerve continuity across species
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Repairing ultralong peripheral nerve defects remains a major clinical challenge, primarily due to the requirement for regenerative platforms to be capable of integrating spatial guidance with temporally resolved biochemical cues. To address this, we developed a clinically translatable, fully synthetic nerve conduit that aligns with native regenerative principles through hierarchical microtopological engineering and phase-specific molecular delivery. This design creates a proregenerative microenvironment by synchronizing structural cues with repair cascades. The neuroanatomically inspired core mimics the endoneurium and perineurium, providing extensive cell-scale contact guidance for axonal alignment and fasciculation. A dual-layered sheath ensures mechanical integrity, metabolic permeability, and selective exclusion of fibrotic tissue. Tailored to align with distinct phases of nerve repair, the conduit enables sequential release of spermidine and ascorbic acid. Spermidine resolves early inflammation, priming the niche for ascorbic acid–mediated debris clearance, axonal elongation, and remyelination. In both rat (2 centimeters) and beagle (5 centimeters) models of critical-sized sciatic nerve defects, the conduit supports structural and functional regeneration comparable to autografts while yielding superior outcomes in motor coordination and suppression of autotomy. This strategy offers a scalable and mechanistically informed solution for repairing ultralong nerve injuries with high translational promise.
title_zh: 分层微拓扑和阶段​​特异性传递功能可恢复跨物种的超长神经连续性
abstract_zh: 修复超长周围神经缺陷仍然是一个重大的临床挑战，这主要是因为再生平台需要能够将空间引导与时间分辨的生化线索相结合。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种临床可翻译的、完全合成的神经导管，通过分层微拓扑工程和阶段特异性分子传递与天然再生原理保持一致。该设计通过将结构线索与修复级联同步来创建一个再生微环境。受神经解剖学启发的核心模仿神经内膜和神经束膜，为轴突排列和束颤提供广泛的细胞尺度接触指导。双层护套确保机械完整性、代谢渗透性和选择性排除纤维化组织。该导管专为适应神经修复的不同阶段而设计，能够顺序释放亚精胺和抗坏血酸。亚精胺可以解决早期炎症，启动抗坏血酸介导的碎片清除、轴突伸长和髓鞘再生的生态位。在大鼠（2 厘米）和小猎犬（5 厘米）的临界尺寸坐骨神经缺陷模型中，导管支持与自体移植相当的结构和功能再生，同时在运动协调和自切抑制方面产生优异的结果。该策略提供了一种可扩展且机械化的解决方案，用于修复超长神经损伤，具有很高的转化前景。

title: Tethered agonist– and GAIN domain–independent signaling of an adhesion GPCR
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
title_zh: 粘附 GPCR 的系留激动剂和 GAIN 结构域独立信号传导
abstract_zh:
在转染细胞中，粘附 G 蛋白偶联受体 (GPCR) 被嵌入其典型自蛋白水解 GAIN 结构域的束缚激动剂激活。然而，尚不清楚系留激动剂依赖性激活机制是否普遍介导粘附 GPCR 的生理功能。在这里，我们展示了 BAI3 的 G 蛋白信号传导（
                    Adgrb3
                    ），一种大脑特异性粘附 GPCR，对于控制轴突和树突生长以及促进突触形成的功能至关重要。此外，我们的信号转导测定证实，BAI3 的束缚激动剂的持续暴露会大量刺激（约 5 倍）其 GPCR 活性。然而，通过删除其细胞外结构域而产生的 BAI3 束缚激动剂的组成性暴露，阻断而不是激活 BAI3 调节轴突和树突生长以及促进突触形成的功能。此外，BAI3 束缚激动剂的失活突变或 BAI3 组成 GAIN 结构域的删除并没有明显损害 BAI3 的生理功能。因此，BAI3 的 GPCR 活性在功能上是必需的，而拴系激动剂介导的 GPCR 活性刺激则不是。

title: Rapid evolution of lncRNAs introduces novel regulatory inputs into ancestral cancer pathways
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
A substantial fraction of human long noncoding RNAs (lncRNAs) are lineage specific and increasingly implicated in cancer, yet the evolutionary origins of their oncogenic relevance remain unclear. It is unknown whether such roles arise through adaptive refinement or as incidental by-products of transcriptomic complexity under weak selection. Here, we show that newly evolved cancer-associated lncRNAs, predominantly of primate origin, arise through a stepwise process initiated by increased transcriptional activity. Once expression surpasses a threshold, these lncRNAs undergo sequence expansion, with 73.3% incorporating external or local genomic fragments, facilitating integration into deeply conserved cancer-related pathways. We validate this model through
                    MIR497HG
                    , which originated near a microRNA in the human-macaque ancestor, and subsequently expanded and integrated into the ancient AMPK (adenosine monophosphate–activated protein kinase)/ferroptosis network in humans, influencing oncogenesis. Collectively, our findings support a model in which weak selection permits neutral transcriptional innovations to persist and gradually infiltrate ancient regulatory architectures, consistent with constructive neutral evolution.
title_zh: lncRNA的快速进化为祖先癌症通路引入了新的调控输入
abstract_zh:
大部分人类长非编码 RNA (lncRNA) 具有谱系特异性，并且与癌症的关系越来越密切，但其致癌相关性的进化起源仍不清楚。目前尚不清楚这种作用是通过适应性精炼产生的，还是作为弱选择下转录组复杂性的偶然副产品。在这里，我们表明，新进化的癌症相关lncRNA（主要源自灵长类动物）是通过转录活性增加引发的逐步过程产生的。一旦表达超过阈值，这些 lncRNA 就会进行序列扩展，其中 73.3% 会整合外部或局部基因组片段，从而促进整合到深度保守的癌症相关通路中。我们通过以下方式验证该模型
                    米尔497HG
                    ，它起源于人类猕猴祖先的 microRNA 附近，随后扩展并整合到人类古老的 AMPK（腺苷一磷酸激活蛋白激酶）/铁死亡网络中，影响肿瘤发生。总的来说，我们的研究结果支持一个模型，在该模型中，弱选择允许中性转录创新持续存在并逐渐渗透到古老的调控架构中，这与建设性中性进化一致。

title: Unlocking the potential of high-dimensional quantum communication with scalable photonic entanglement in time and frequency
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: High-dimensional photonic entanglement holds substantial promise for advancing quantum communication, computation, and metrology. For example, large-alphabet quantum communication protocols are known to benefit from enhanced noise resilience and information capacity via multibit time-bin encoding. Yet, characterizing high-dimensional entangled states is challenging, as full-state tomography becomes prohibitively costly and often requires unrealizable measurements. Here, we demonstrate a scan-free method to characterize high-dimensional entanglement in the time-frequency domain. Our reconstruction achieves a record 5.70 ± 0.07 ebits and a fidelity of 65.4 ± 0.4% with the maximally entangled state of local dimension 1021, certifying the presence of 668-dimensional entanglement. We further prove the attainability of a secure key rate of 15.6 kilobits per second in a composable finite-size, entanglement-based protocol and show that in continuous operation, the setup can quickly approach asymptotic key rates. Using commercial telecom components and state-of-the-art low-jitter single-photon detectors, our scalable architecture offers a practical path toward high-rate, noise-resilient quantum communication test beds.
title_zh: 通过时间和频率上可扩展的光子纠缠释放高维量子通信的潜力
abstract_zh: 高维光子纠缠为推进量子通信、计算和计量学带来了巨大的希望。例如，众所周知，大字母量子通信协议可以通过多位时间仓编码受益于增强的噪声弹性和信息容量。然而，表征高维纠缠态具有挑战性，因为全态断层扫描变得非常昂贵，并且通常需要无法实现的测量。在这里，我们演示了一种无扫描方法来表征时频域中的高维纠缠。我们的重建达到了创纪录的 5.70 ± 0.07 ebits 和 65.4 ± 0.4% 的保真度，局部维度为 1021 的最大纠缠态，证明了 668 维纠缠的存在。我们进一步证明了在可组合​​的有限大小、基于纠缠的协议中可以实现每秒 15.6 kb 的安全密钥速率，并表明在连续操作中，该设置可以快速接近渐近密钥速率。我们的可扩展架构使用商用电信组件和最先进的低抖动单光子探测器，为实现高速、抗噪声量子通信测试台提供了一条实用途径。

title: Variations of global brain asymmetry are associated with aging and related diseases
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Lateralization is a hallmark of brain organization, yet the structural basis underlying this phenomenon remains a critical, unresolved question in cognitive and systems neuroscience. In this study, we applied multivariate machine learning techniques to investigate variations of global brain asymmetry and their associations with cognitive functions, aging, and aging-related diseases, using large-scale datasets. Our findings revealed substantial and previously unknown structural differences between the hemispheres, and established key associations between structural asymmetries and lateralized functions. At the population level, we identified unique aging trajectories of hemispheric differences and uncovered diagnosis-specific variations in patients with Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s disease, and in
                    APOE
                    ε4 carriers at genetic risk. Notably, we identified a “left hemi-aging” pattern that challenges the conventional “right hemi-aging” model. Together, these results advance our understanding of functional lateralization in the human brain and highlight the potential of global brain asymmetry as a biomarker for brain aging and related diseases.
title_zh: 全球大脑不对称性的变化与衰老和相关疾病有关
abstract_zh:
偏侧化是大脑组织的一个标志，但这种现象背后的结构基础仍然是认知和系统神经科学中一个关键的、尚未解决的问题。在这项研究中，我们应用多元机器学习技术，使用大规模数据集来研究全球大脑不对称性的变化及其与认知功能、衰老和衰老相关疾病的关联。我们的研究结果揭示了半球之间实质性的和以前未知的结构差异，并建立了结构不对称和侧化功能之间的关键关联。在人群层面，我们确定了大脑半球差异的独特衰老轨迹，并发现了阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病患者的诊断特异性差异，以及
                    APOE
                    具有遗传风险的ε4携带者。值得注意的是，我们发现了一种“左半脑衰老”模式，挑战了传统的“右半脑衰老”模型。总之，这些结果增进了我们对人脑功能偏侧化的理解，并强调了整体大脑不对称作为大脑衰老和相关疾病生物标志物的潜力。

title: Loss of O-antigen due to wbbL mutations is common and associated with increased mortality in Escherichia coli bloodstream infections
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Escherichia coli
                    bloodstream infections are common and associated with high mortality. A key feature of
                    E. coli
                    is the lipopolysaccharide (LPS) O-antigen, which contributes to immune evasion during invasive infection. We analyzed serial isolates from patients with relapsed
                    E. coli
                    bacteremia and identified frequent disruption of O-antigen synthesis due to mutations in
                    wbbL
                    , resulting in a rough LPS phenotype. Rough LPS isolates were more serum sensitive and less pathogenic in mice. Despite this apparent attenuation, 11 of 61 (18%)
                    E. coli
                    sequence type 131 bloodstream isolates in our cohort harbored disruptive
                    wbbL
                    mutations and were associated with significantly worse clinical outcomes, including septic shock and mortality. Using a murine model of recurrent bacteremia, we show that rough LPS isolates partially evade protective immunity generated against smooth LPS
                    E. coli
                    , highlighting the importance of host immune context in invasive disease.
title_zh: wbbL 突变导致 O 抗原丢失很常见，并且与大肠杆菌血流感染死亡率增加相关
abstract_zh:
大肠杆菌
                    血流感染很常见，死亡率很高。一个关键特征是
                    大肠杆菌
                    是脂多糖 (LPS) O 抗原，有助于侵袭性感染期间的免疫逃避。我们分析了复发患者的系列分离株
                    大肠杆菌
                    菌血症并发现由于基因突变导致 O 抗原合成频繁中断
                    西伯利亚
                    ，导致粗略的 LPS 表型。粗脂多糖分离物对小鼠的血清更敏感且致病性更小。尽管有这种明显的衰减，61 个中的 11 个 (18%)
                    大肠杆菌
                    我们队列中的 131 型血流分离株序列具有破坏性
                    西伯利亚
                    突变并与显着较差的临床结果相关，包括败血性休克和死亡率。使用复发性菌血症的小鼠模型，我们发现粗糙的 LPS 分离物部分逃避了针对平滑 LPS 产生的保护性免疫
                    大肠杆菌
                    ，强调了宿主免疫环境在侵袭性疾病中的重要性。

title: Ancient inversion polymorphisms are locally adaptive in a widespread butterfly species
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Divergent selection across species ranges does not always translate into observable morphological divergence. Genomic approaches agnostic to traits or groups of populations under selection can reveal cryptic genetic diversity and provide insights into the nature of local adaptation. Here, we use such an approach to investigate local adaptation in the zebra butterfly,
                    Heliconius charithonia
                    . This species is widely distributed across the Caribbean and adjacent North, Central and South America yet is morphologically and genetically homogeneous across its range. Genomic analyses, however, reveal three geographically restricted inversions that survived recent range expansions that explain genetic homogeneity in the rest of the genome. These inversions are ancient but not shared with related species. Their polymorphisms cannot be explained by accumulation of mutational load and are more likely maintained by divergent selection in heterogeneous environments. Our study emphasizes the power of genomic approaches for uncovering hidden diversity in morphologically homogeneous species and highlights the important role of chromosomal rearrangements in local adaptation.
title_zh: 古代倒位多态性在广泛分布的蝴蝶物种中具有局部适应性
abstract_zh:
跨物种范围的差异选择并不总是转化为可观察到的形态差异。与选择下的性状或种群群体无关的基因组方法可以揭示神秘的遗传多样性，并提供对局部适应本质的见解。在这里，我们使用这样的方法来研究斑马蝴蝶的局部适应，
                    查里索尼亚蛾
                    。该物种广泛分布在加勒比海以及邻近的北美洲、中美洲和南美洲，但在其分布范围内形态和遗传均相同。然而，基因组分析揭示了三个受地理限制的倒位，这些倒位在最近的范围扩展中幸存下来，这解释了基因组其余部分的遗传同质性。这些倒转是古老的，但不与相关物种共享。它们的多态性不能用突变负荷的积累来解释，而更可能是通过异质环境中的发散选择来维持的。我们的研究强调了基因组方法在揭示形态同质物种中隐藏的多样性方面的力量，并强调了染色体重排在局部适应中的重要作用。

title: Assisted evolution of corals and their symbionts enhances recruit heat tolerance but with complex outcomes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Heat-tolerant coral stock could supplement populations with tolerance-conferring alleles to combat rising sea surface temperatures and marine heat waves. We tested coral selective breeding and Symbiodiniaceae experimental evolution independently and in tandem as interventions for generating heat-tolerant stock. Broodstock from two sites were ranked using Symbiodiniaceae photochemical efficiency under rapid heat stress and crossed to produce offspring from heat-tolerant colonies (top 25th percentile) and control offspring. Offspring were inoculated with heat-evolved or wild-type symbionts and exposed to 28°C (ambient) or 32°C (elevated) for 2 months. Selective breeding using rapid assays enhanced Davies but not Moore Reef recruit survival and growth at 32°C, suggesting that this method does not universally generate heat-tolerant coral due to genetics, maternal effects, and/or acclimation. Heat-evolved symbionts enhanced survival and bleaching resilience at 32°C but reduced growth at 28°C. Combining interventions yielded additive benefits, no enhancement, or resulted in one intervention diminishing the other’s impact. These results demonstrate assisted evolution’s potential while cautioning against generalizing its outcomes.
title_zh: 珊瑚及其共生体的辅助进化增强了新成员的耐热性，但结果复杂
abstract_zh: 耐热珊瑚种群可以为种群补充具有耐受性的等位基因，以应对不断上升的海面温度和海洋热浪。我们独立和串联地测试了珊瑚选择性育种和共生科实验进化，作为产生耐热种群的干预措施。使用快速热应激下的共生科光化学效率对来自两个地点的亲鱼进行排名，并杂交以从耐热群体（前 25 个百分位）和对照后代中产生后代。后代接种热进化或野生型共生体，并暴露在 28°C（环境温度）或 32°C（高温）下 2 个月。使用快速分析的选择性育种增强了戴维斯珊瑚礁在 32°C 下的存活和生长，但没有增强摩尔礁新珊瑚的存活和生长，这表明由于遗传、母体效应和/或环境适应，这种方法不能普遍产生耐热珊瑚。热演化的共生体在 32°C 下增强了存活率和漂白恢复能力，但在 28°C 下生长却降低了。组合干预措施会产生附加效益，但不会增强效果，或者导致一种干预措施削弱了另一种干预措施的影响。这些结果证明了辅助进化的潜力，同时警告不要对其结果进行概括。

title: A unified ligand-dimensional design to halt cation migration in perovskite photovoltaics
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Organic cation migration, particularly that of formamidinium (FA
                    +
                    ), remains a major factor limiting the long-term stability of perovskite solar cells (PSCs). Low-dimensional/three-dimensional (LD/3D) heterojunctions have shown promise for mitigating this migration, yet systematic comparisons under a unified processing and scaffold framework are lacking. Here, we develop a family of pyridine-based ligands that enable the formation of structurally well-defined LD/3D heterojunctions spanning perovskite-related 2D, 1D, 1D intercalated, and 0D metal-halide motif architectures under identical processing. This platform reveals that the 2D/3D configuration uniquely couples geometric confinement with multidirectional hydrogen bonding to immobilize FA
                    +
                    and enhance carrier performance. Consequently, PSCs achieve a champion efficiency of 26.88% (certified 26.52%) and outstanding stability, retaining >91% initial efficiency after 1000 hours at 85°C/85% relative humidity and >94% after 2000 hours of maximum power point tracking. Large-area modules (900 square centimeters) deliver 20.25% efficiency (certified 17.75%) with negligible degradation over 4 months. This work establishes a ligand-based dimensional design platform for stable, scalable perovskite photovoltaics.
title_zh: 统一的配体尺寸设计可阻止钙钛矿光伏中的阳离子迁移
abstract_zh:
有机阳离子迁移，特别是甲脒 (FA
                    +
                    ），仍然是限制钙钛矿太阳能电池（PSC）长期稳定性的主要因素。低维/三维（LD/3D）异质结已显示出减轻这种迁移的希望，但缺乏统一处理和支架框架下的系统比较。在这里，我们开发了一系列基于吡啶的配体，能够在相同的处理下形成结构明确的 LD/3D 异质结，涵盖钙钛矿相关的 2D、1D、1D 插层和 0D 金属卤化物基序结构。该平台揭示了 2D/3D 配置独特地将几何限制与多向氢键结合以固定 FA
                    +
                    并增强载体性能。因此，PSC 实现了 26.88% 的冠军效率（经认证为 26.52%）和出色的稳定性，在 85°C/85% 相对湿度下运行 1000 小时后初始效率保持在 >91% 左右，在最大功率点跟踪 2000 小时后保持着 >94% 的初始效率。大面积模块（900 平方厘米）可提供 20.25% 的效率（认证为 17.75%），并且 4 个月内的性能下降可以忽略不计。这项工作为稳定、可扩展的钙钛矿光伏电池建立了一个基于配体的尺寸设计平台。

title: A transcription factor modulates dermal architecture to generate structural and pigment color diversity in lizards
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The way organisms perceive the world influences their evolution. Many animals detect ultraviolet (UV) light invisible to humans, creating sensory contexts that alter the selective landscape for coloration. Here, we dissected the molecular basis of a UV-reflecting color morph in common wall lizards, uncovering its association with a noncoding region upstream of the transcription factor
                    PAX7
                    . Our results suggest that variation at this locus alters dermal architecture by modifying the cellular composition, exposing structures within specialized cells that generate UV structural coloration. We further demonstrate that the
                    PAX7
                    locus acts epistatically on other color genes to suppress pigment deposition, revealing a genetic interaction between pigmentary and structural pathways that underlie color production. Across populations, the frequency of the UV morph was not predicted by environmental variation, arguing against climate-driven selection. Inferred frequencies of the UV-associated allele across sampled populations exhibited weaker spatial structure than expected from genome-wide variation, suggesting this polymorphism may be maintained by balancing selection. Our findings reveal mechanisms of phenotypic evolution beyond human perception and a genetic link between pigmentary and structural coloration.
title_zh: 转录因子调节真皮结构以产生蜥蜴的结构和色素颜色多样性
abstract_zh:
生物体感知世界的方式影响其进化。许多动物能够探测到人类看不见的紫外线，从而创造出改变选择性景观的感官环境。在这里，我们剖析了普通壁蜥蜴紫外线反射颜色变形的分子基础，揭示了它与转录因子上游非编码区域的关联
                    帕克斯7
                    。我们的结果表明，该位点的变异通过改变细胞组成、暴露产生紫外线结构着色的特殊细胞内的结构来改变真皮结构。我们进一步证明
                    帕克斯7
                    位点对其他颜色基因发挥上位作用，抑制色素沉积，揭示了颜色产生背后的色素和结构途径之间的遗传相互作用。在不同人群中，紫外线变形的频率并不是由环境变化预测的，这与气候驱动的选择相悖。样本群体中与紫外线相关的等位基因的推断频率表现出比全基因组变异预期更弱的空间结构，表明这种多态性可能通过平衡选择来维持。我们的研究结果揭示了超越人类感知的表型进化机制以及色素和结构着色之间的遗传联系。

title: Superstatistics approach to turbulent circulation fluctuations
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Recent investigations of turbulent circulation fluctuations have uncovered substantial insights into the statistical organization of flow structures and revealed unexpected geometric features of turbulent intermittency. Of particular interest here is the observation that circulation probability distribution functions admit a superstatistical representation, namely a description based on “ensembles of Boltzmann”Gibbs ensembles.” A fundamental phenomenological ingredient of this approach, which serves as a natural starting point for modeling, relies on the strong correlation between the dissipation field and the spatial distribution of elementary circulation-carrying structures, i.e., small-scale vortices. Within the language of superstatistics, this corresponds to characterizing circulation statistics through an appropriate choice of conditioned (Boltzmann-like) distributions and mixing distributions. We show that the superstatistical class of
                    
                      
                        q
                      
                    
                    -exponentials, known to have broad applicability in a wide range of multiscale and nonequilibrium systems, provides an accurate description of the observed circulation statistics in homogeneous and isotropic turbulence. This finding opens avenues for exploring the statistical structure of the turbulent cascade in the context of nonextensive statistical mechanics, rooted in the concept of nonadditive entropies.
title_zh: 湍流环流波动的超统计方法
abstract_zh:
最近对湍流环流波动的研究揭示了对流动结构的统计组织的重要见解，并揭示了湍流间歇性的意想不到的几何特征。这里特别有趣的是循环概率分布函数承认超统计表示，即基于“玻尔兹曼系综”吉布斯系综”的描述。这种方法的基本现象学成分是建模的自然起点，它依赖于耗散场与基本循环承载结构（即小尺度涡旋）的空间分布之间的强相关性。在超级统计学的语言中，这对应于通过适当选择条件（玻尔兹曼）分布和混合分布来表征循环统计。我们证明超统计类别
                    
                      
                        q
                      
                    
                    -众所周知，指数在各种多尺度和非平衡系统中具有广泛的适用性，可以准确描述均匀和各向同性湍流中观测到的环流统计数据。这一发现为在植根于非加性熵概念的非广延统计力学背景下探索湍流级联的统计结构开辟了道路。

title: Social and spatial affinity drive wound care in ants
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
In social animals, open wounds pose a risk not only for the injured individual but also for its wider social context, especially when the probability of infection transmission is high. To mitigate this danger, different strategies have evolved across species, with ants representing one of the few taxa beyond humans that engage in social wound care. Yet, who provides this care and what drives care provision remains unexplored. To answer these questions, we combined controlled injury experiments with automated behavioral tracking and simulations across six colonies of the ant
                    Camponotus fellah
                    . Our results demonstrate that caregivers are workers in a transitional state between nursing and foraging roles, characterized by elevated activity and broad nest coverage. Being in this transitional state, however, is required but not sufficient to explain the temporal dynamics of individual care provision. Instead, care provisioning is best explained by preinjury spatial overlap, encounter rates, and social interactions, which together constitute an affinity index that predicts both the frequency and duration of subsequent wound care events. We further show that the treatment of open wounds is not the result of a generalized increase in social behaviors directed to the injured ants but part of a care response toward injuries that also involves an increase in allogrooming. Taken together, our findings reveal the necessary conditions for an individual to act as a caregiver and highlight affinity-driven dyadic interactions as an underexplored mechanism for the behavioral coordination of social immunity strategies in decentralized caste-based insect societies.
title_zh: 社会和空间亲和力推动蚂蚁的伤口护理
abstract_zh:
在社会性动物中，开放性伤口不仅对受伤个体构成风险，而且对其更广泛的社会环境构成风险，特别是当感染传播的可能性很高时。为了减轻这种危险，不同物种进化出了不同的策略，蚂蚁是人类之外参与社会伤口护理的少数类群之一。然而，谁提供这种护理以及驱动护理提供的因素仍有待探索。为了回答这些问题，我们将受控损伤实验与六个蚂蚁群体的自动行为跟踪和模拟相结合
                    弓背蚁
                    。我们的研究结果表明，看护者是处于护理和觅食角色之间过渡状态的工人，其特点是活动量增加和巢穴覆盖范围广泛。然而，处于这种过渡状态是必要的，但不足以解释个人护理提供的时间动态。相反，护理供给最好通过受伤前的空间重叠、相遇率和社交互动来解释，它们共同构成了一个亲和力指数，可以预测随后伤口护理事件的频率和持续时间。我们进一步表明，开放性伤口的治疗并不是针对受伤蚂蚁的社会行为普遍增加的结果，而是对伤害的护理反应的一部分，这也涉及异体梳理的增加。总而言之，我们的研究结果揭示了个人充当照顾者的必要条件，并强调了亲和力驱动的二元互动作为一种尚未充分探索的机制

title: Pierre Chambon, a pioneer of molecular biology and gene regulation in eukaryotes
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The scientific world has lost one of its great architects with the passing of Pierre Chambon, a visionary French scientist, institution builder, and demanding yet inspiring mentor. He provided major insights into the fundamental mechanisms governing gene expression and hormonal regulation that transformed modern biology and medicine. In addition, he developed groundbreaking mouse genetic techniques, and established Strasbourg as a leading European center for life sciences research. His death on May 5, 2026, at the age of 95, marks the end of an extraordinary era in science, yet his intellectual legacy will continue to shape generations of researchers across the world.
title_zh: Pierre Chambon，真核生物分子生物学和基因调控领域的先驱
abstract_zh: 随着皮埃尔·尚邦 (Pierre Chambon) 的去世，科学界失去了一位伟大的建筑师。皮埃尔·尚邦是一位富有远见的法国科学家、机构建设者、要求严格但鼓舞人心的导师。他对基因表达和激素调节的基本机制提出了重要见解，从而改变了现代生物学和医学。此外，他还开发了突破性的小鼠遗传技术，并将斯特拉斯堡建成欧洲领先的生命科学研究中心。他于 2026 年 5 月 5 日去世，享年 95 岁，标志着科学领域一个非凡时代的结束，但他的学术遗产将继续影响世界各地几代研究人员。

title: Tetraphosphorylated phthalocyanine–based self-assembled monolayer stabilizes perovskite photovoltaics
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The self-assembled monolayer (SAM) has driven the rapid increase in the power conversion efficiency (PCE) of perovskite solar cells (PSCs). However, the operation stability of these PSCs under real conditions continues to be challenging. We developed an SAM based on phthalocyanine, which has a structurally robust framework with chemically stable bonds that enhance photostability. Tetraphosphorylation further enables the firmly locked phthalocyanine at the interface, which improves thermal stability, charge extraction, and assembly uniformity. Implementing this approach, a certified efficiency of 23.1% (stabilized 22.9%) for a perovskite solar module over a 20.3–square centimeter aperture area was achieved and the outdoor stability analysis was conducted following the ISOS-O-1 protocol, exhibiting no performance degradation throughout the entire outdoor aging test for 61 days, demonstrating reliable durability under real conditions.
title_zh: 基于四磷酸化酞菁的自组装单层稳定钙钛矿光伏电池
abstract_zh: 自组装单层（SAM）推动了钙钛矿太阳能电池（PSC）功率转换效率（PCE）的快速提高。然而，这些 PSC 在实际条件下的运行稳定性仍然面临挑战。我们开发了一种基于酞菁的 SAM，它具有结构坚固的框架和化学稳定的键，可增强光稳定性。四磷酸化进一步使酞菁牢固锁定在界面处，从而提高热稳定性、电荷提取和组装均匀性。采用这种方法，在20.3平方厘米孔径面积上的钙钛矿太阳能组件的认证效率达到了23.1%（稳定为22.9%），并且按照ISOS-O-1协议进行了户外稳定性分析，在整个61天的户外老化测试中没有表现出性能下降，证明了在实际条件下可靠的耐用性。

title: Ultralow-angle faults produce giant earthquakes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: What controls the occurrence of giant earthquakes remains a central question in seismology. We reveal a notably simple—but previously overlooked—relationship between earthquake size and fault dip in subduction zones. Global earthquake statistics show a robust dependence of earthquake size on fault dip, with the probability of extreme events peaking on ultralow-angle faults. Through three case studies, we demonstrate that earthquakes tend to grow larger when the fault geometry is aligned with the regional stress field. We further discuss how such favorable stress configurations are generated along subduction interfaces and emphasize the critical importance of monitoring the temporal evolution of stress in subduction zones to better forecast future megaearthquakes.
title_zh: 超低角度断层产生大地震
abstract_zh: 是什么控制着大地震的发生仍然是地震学的一个中心问题。我们揭示了地震规模和俯冲带断层倾角之间的一个非常简单但之前被忽视的关系。全球地震统计数据显示，地震规模对断层倾角有很强的依赖性，极端事件的概率在超低角度断层上达到峰值。通过三个案例研究，我们证明当断层几何形状与区域应力场一致时，地震往往会变得更大。我们进一步讨论了如何沿着俯冲界面产生这种有利的应力配置，并强调监测俯冲带应力的时间演化对于更好地预测未来特大地震的至关重要性。

title: Dual-mode analysis of ischemic stroke based on urine SERS spectra and carotid B-ultrasound
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Achieving noninvasive high-frequency monitoring of ischemic stroke (IS) remains a major clinical challenge for timely intervention and precise secondary prevention. Establishing precise correlations between patients’ systemic microscopic molecular fingerprints and localized macroscopic organ pathological events is essential to overcome the limitations of single-modal detection and enhance the efficacy of clinical risk assessment. However, because of the complexity of heterogeneous data, effectively integrating the cross-dimensional “molecular imaging” data remains a critical bottleneck in achieving this goal. Here, we present a proof-of-concept method to distinguish patients with confirmed IS from healthy controls (HCs) that used machine learning (ML)–based methods to surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy (SERS) of urine (one-dimensional) and carotid artery B-ultrasound imaging (CBI) (two-dimensional). In an exploratory cohort of 101 participants, this approach analyzed 10,100 SERS spectra and 481 CBI images, achieving 92% classification accuracy and an area under the curve (AUC) of 0.95. Furthermore, by combined SERS spectra and liquid chromatography–mass spectrometry technology, this study preliminarily explored the urinary biomarker differences between HC/IS groups. The multidimensional data fusion strategy proposed in this study effectively bridges the information gap between traditional molecular detection and clinical phenotypes by systematically correlating microfluidic biomarkers with macro-organ imaging features. This approach provides a previously unexplored, noninvasive, and highly accurate tool for risk stratification and clinical decision-making in classifying HC/IS groups.

title: Realization of strongly correlated 2D honeycomb boron
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Borophene, a two-dimensional (2D) boron sheet, has recently gained considerable attention as a postgraphene material owing to its unique properties, such as intrinsic metallic character, lightest element monolayer structure, and high-frequency phonons. These features, together with its theoretically predicted high density of states, make borophene an excellent platform for investigating various quantum phenomena. However, the realization of emergent phenomena is hindered by fabrication challenges and inherently weak electronic correlations within the
                    s
                    and
                    p
                    electron system. Here, we demonstrate a strongly correlated 2D electronic state derived from a honeycomb boron lattice exposed at the surface of ternary boride LaRh
                    3
                    B
                    2
                    . Using angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, we uncover the extended saddle-point van Hove singularity near the Fermi level, which is linked to the substantial lattice expansion and many-body interaction. Moreover, scanning tunneling microscopy reveals the electronic nematicity, which likely originates from the saddle-point instability. Our findings open a pathway to exploring the exotic correlated phenomena in boron-based 2D systems.

title: Safe, high-performance, moisture-activated batteries for powering next-generation Internet-of-Things devices
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Conventional batteries are heavy, nonconformal, and toxic, while energy harvesters offer low/variable power, rendering them unsuitable for emerging wearable, robotic, and other Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices. Here, we introduce a nontoxic, thin-film battery superior to several commercial batteries inspired by advances in water harvesting techniques. It scavenges ambient moisture to serve as its electrolyte, combining features of an energy harvester with attractive features of a battery (stable and high power). It functions in a wide range of environments and offers an open-circuit voltage of ~1.6 volts, specific capacity of ~52 milliampere-hours per gram, and specific energy of ~81 milliwatt-hours per gram. Unique pangolin skin–mimicking design imparts high flexibility, stretchability, and fill factor to the battery, ensuring conformability without compromising on capacity. Experimental and computer simulation studies reveal the distinctive materials and design features responsible for the battery’s impressive performance. Examples of a wireless wearable pulse oximeter and surveillance monitor with a unique kill switch that secures it from unauthorized access demonstrate the versatility of the battery to power various IoT devices.
title_zh: 安全、高性能、湿气激活电池，为下一代物联网设备供电
abstract_zh: 传统电池笨重、非保形且有毒，而能量采集器的功率低/可变，这使得它们不适合新兴的可穿戴设备、机器人和其他物联网 (IoT) 设备。在这里，我们介绍了一种无毒的薄膜电池，其性能优于几种商用电池，其灵感源自集水技术的进步。它清除周围的水分作为电解质，结合了能量收集器的特点和电池的吸引人的特点（稳定和高功率）。它可在多种环境下工作，开路电压约为 1.6 伏，比容量约为每克 52 毫安时，比能量约为每克 81 毫瓦时。独特的仿穿山甲皮肤设计赋予电池高灵活性、拉伸性和填充系数，确保舒适性而不影响容量。实验和计算机模拟研究揭示了电池令人印象深刻的性能的独特材料和设计特征。无线可穿戴脉搏血氧计和监控监视器的示例具有独特的终止开关，可确保其免受未经授权的访问，展示了电池为各种物联网设备供电的多功能性。

title: Large-area, photo-programmable 2D semiconductors with chromic molecular functionalization
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Reconfigurable electronics expands device functionality and promises previously unknown computing paradigms, as the channel layer characteristics can be dynamically controlled. Two-dimensional semiconductors coupled with photo-responsive chromic molecules offer a compelling route as atomically thin channels are highly sensitive to molecular conformation changes. However, most demonstrations have been limited to microscale single-flake devices, limiting scalability and technological relevance. Here, we report an optically reconfigurable platform integrating centimeter-scale monolayer WS
                    2
                    and WSe
                    2
                    with an azobenzene (Azo) overlayer. Wavelength-selective trans-cis Azo photoisomerization generates a reversible interfacial dipole that serves as an optical gate, enabling precise and uniform modulation of both electron and hole densities (~2.5 × 10
                    12
                    cm
                    −2
                    ) over large areas. This optical actuation further supports spatially programmable patterning of optoelectronic properties and delivers repeatable modulation across large transistor arrays. Together, these results establish a scalable smart materials platform for reconfigurable optoelectronics that is light-programmable.
