title: Catalytic Promiscuity and Cascade Reaction Mechanism of Ketosteroid Isomerases for Addition Reactions of Cyclic Enones
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Steroidal medicines are a vital class of pharmaceuticals, with their active ingredients primarily derived from natural steroids. A key step in their biosynthesis involves the isomerization of ∆5−3-ketosteroids to ∆4−3-ketosteroids, catalyzed by ketosteroid isomerase (KSI). In this study, we discover that KSI exhibits an unexpected catalytic promiscuity, efficiently converting cyclic enones into homo- and hetero-addition products. Crystal structures of KSI variants and mutagenesis reveal the homo-dimeric interface as another active center. Molecular dynamics simulations and quantum mechanics/molecular mechanics calculations suggest a cascade catalytic mechanism by a single enzyme, in which isomerization occurs in the monomeric pocket, while the addition reaction preferentially occurs at the homo-dimeric interface due to reduced steric hindrance. These results not only provide valuable insights into the catalytic diversity of KSIs, but also inspire further exploration of new-to-nature and diverse catalytic properties of enzymes, thus expanding their applications in biocatalysis and drug development.
title_zh: 酮类异构酶催化环烯酮加成反应的混杂和级联反应机制
abstract_zh: 类固醇药物是一类重要的药物，其活性成分主要来源于天然类固醇。其生物合成的一个关键步骤涉及在酮类固醇异构酶 (KSI) 的催化下，将 Δ5−3-酮类固醇异构化为 Δ4−3-酮类固醇。在这项研究中，我们发现 KSI 表现出意想不到的催化混杂性，能够有效地将环烯酮转化为同聚和杂加成产物。 KSI 变体和诱变的晶体结构揭示了同源二聚体界面作为另一个活性中心。分子动力学模拟和量子力学/分子力学计算表明单酶的级联催化机制，其中异构化发生在单体口袋中，而加成反应由于空间位阻的减少而优先发生在同二聚体界面上。这些结果不仅为KSI的催化多样性提供了有价值的见解，而且激发了对酶的新颖和多样化催化特性的进一步探索，从而扩大了它们在生物催化和药物开发中的应用。

title: Neutrino’s nursery found: the ‘Shadow Blaster’
source: Nature
abstract: A particle detected at the South Pole was born in a galaxy that churned out stars when the Universe was young. A particle detected at the South Pole was born in a galaxy that churned out stars when the Universe was young.
title_zh: 中微子的苗圃发现：“影子冲击波”
abstract_zh: 在南极检测到的粒子诞生于宇宙年轻时产生恒星的星系中。在南极检测到的粒子诞生于宇宙年轻时产生恒星的星系中。

title: Coaxially nested component with asymmetric fiber resonant cavity and separation membrane for gaseous and dissolved gases detection
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Dynamically, simultaneously and sensitively embedded or external detection of multi-component gaseous or dissolved phase gases in millilitre volumes is critical for many frontier applications. Raman spectroscopy based on a single-wavelength laser can achieve simultaneous detection of various gases (except noble gases), but it lacks sensitivity. Therefore, this paper firstly develops a theoretical framework for Raman signal generation within the fiber resonant cavity (FRC), and based on which, an asymmetric FRC is proposed to balance the laser power enhancement and the intracavity loss caused by a high-reflectivity input cavity mirror, enhancing the Raman signal intensity by 170 times when compared to only hollow-core fiber and 36 times to only geometry resonant cavity, achieving sensitive gas detection with a limit of detection (LOD) as low as 0.01 ppm*bar. Meanwhile, a coaxially nested component with FRC and separation membrane is proposed, which can enable approximate synchronization of liquid-gas separation and detection. This work provides an effective solution of measurement instruments to realize d high-precision detection of multi component gases in various states with gas consumption ranging from 0.3 mL to 2 mL, enabling further refinement of the associated generation and decomposition pathways of different gases, and the coaxially nested component also can be used in other scattering-based spectroscopic techniques (e.g., Brillouin spectroscopy) and absorption-based spectroscopic techniques.
title_zh: 具有不对称光纤谐振腔和分离膜的同轴嵌套组件，用于气体和溶解气体检测
abstract_zh: 动态、同时、灵敏地嵌入式或外部检测毫升体积的多组分气态或溶解相气体对于许多前沿应用至关重要。基于单波长激光的拉曼光谱可以实现多种气体（稀有气体除外）的同时检测，但缺乏灵敏度。因此，本文首先提出了光纤谐振腔（FRC）内拉曼信号产生的理论框架，并在此基础上提出了一种非对称FRC来平衡激光功率增强和高反射率输入腔镜引起的腔内损耗，拉曼信号强度比仅空心光纤增强了170倍，比仅几何谐振腔增强了36倍，实现了检测限（LOD）低至1000的敏感气体检测。 0.01 ppm*巴。同时，提出了一种带有FRC和分离膜的同轴嵌套组件，可以实现液气分离和检测的近似同步。这项工作提供了一种有效的测量仪器解决方案，以气体消耗量在0.3 mL至2 mL范围内实现对各种状态的多组分气体的高精度检测，从而能够进一步细化不同气体的相关生成和分解路径，并且同轴嵌套的组件也可用于其他基于散射的光谱技术（例如布里渊光谱）和基于吸收的光谱技术。

title: Ultra flash cold events under global warming
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: It is widely assumed that global warming will make winters milder and reduce extreme cold. However, this assumption is contradicted by the recurrence of flash cold (FC) events—sudden, violent temperature drops that can freeze energy grids and infrastructure within hours. The 2021 North America freeze, which caused over $20 billion in losses, stands as a stark warning. Here, we find that while the world warms, the fate of these ultra FC events is diverging: they are fading over Eurasia but significantly intensifying over North America. By tracking the spatiotemporal evolution of these ultra FC events and characterizing their dynamic environment, we reveal that this contrast is driven by specific atmospheric circulation regimes. In North America, increasingly frequent Alaska–Arctic anticyclonic anomalies funnel cold air directly southward. Conversely, weakened Ural–Arctic cyclonic anomalies are cutting off the cold supply. Crucially, current climate models fail to reproduce this intercontinental divergence. Simulations largely miss these specific circulation regimes, leading models to underestimate the ultra FC risk. Our results expose a regional warming paradox: specific atmospheric circulation anomalies can transiently overwhelm background warming, creating a critical blind spot for energy security.
title_zh: 全球变暖下的超闪寒事件
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为全球变暖将使冬季变得更加温和并减少极端寒冷。然而，这种假设与闪冷（FC）事件的反复发生相矛盾，骤冷（FC）事件是突然剧烈的气温下降，可以在数小时内冻结能源电网和基础设施。 2021 年北美的冰冻造成了超过 200 亿美元的损失，这是一个严厉的警告。在这里，我们发现，虽然世界变暖，但这些超级FC赛事的命运却出现了分歧：它们在欧亚大陆逐渐消失，但在北美却明显加剧。通过跟踪这些超FC事件的时空演化并表征其动态环境，我们揭示了这种对比是由特定的大气环流状况驱动的。在北美，越来越频繁的阿拉斯加-北极反气旋异常将冷空气直接向南输送。相反，乌拉尔-北极气旋异常的减弱正在切断冷源。至关重要的是，当前的气候模型无法重现这种洲际差异。模拟很大程度上忽略了这些特定的循环状况，导致模型低估了超 FC 风险。我们的研究结果揭示了一个区域变暖悖论：特定的大气环流异常可能会暂时压倒背景变暖，从而为能源安全造成关键盲点。

title: Glass-like anomalies and unconventional thermoelectric transport in chimney ladder crystals
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Nowotny chimney ladder crystals combine features of ordered crystals and amorphous solids, making them attractive thermoelectric materials because of their intrinsically low thermal conductivity. We investigate the intermetallic compound Ru2Sn3 and show that, despite its crystalline order, its heat capacity exhibits a boson-peak-like glassy anomaly at 8-14 K. Combining experiments with first-principles calculations and molecular dynamics simulations, we trace this behavior to low-energy optical phonons emerging from the chimney ladder structure. These modes strongly couple to acoustic phonons, producing hybridization and avoided crossings that reshape the vibrational spectrum and cause the hybridized acoustic branches to contribute directly to the anomaly. Thermoelectric measurements reveal additional glass-like signatures linked to these excitations, while the electrical resistivity displays an extended linear temperature dependence and an anomalously large quadratic contribution at low temperatures. A simple theoretical model based on electron scattering by overdamped phonons qualitatively accounts for these observations.
title_zh: 烟囱梯晶体中的玻璃状异常和非常规热电传输
abstract_zh: Nowotny 烟囱梯晶体结合了有序晶体和非晶固体的特征，由于其本质上的低导热性，使其成为有吸引力的热电材料。我们研究了金属间化合物 Ru2Sn3，结果表明，尽管具有晶序，但其热容在 8-14 K 时表现出玻色子峰状玻璃异常。结合实验与第一性原理计算和分子动力学模拟，我们将这种行为追溯到烟囱梯结构中出现的低能光学声子。这些模式与声学声子强烈耦合，产生杂交并避免交叉，从而重塑振动频谱并导致混合声学分支直接导致异常。热电测量揭示了与这些激发相关的附加玻璃状特征，而电阻率则显示出扩展的线性温度依赖性和低温下异常大的二次贡献。基于过阻尼声子电子散射的简单理论模型定性地解释了这些观察结果。

title: Programmable one-pot polymerase-mediated DNA synthesis via temperature control
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Polymerase-mediated DNA synthesis is fundamental to numerous biotechnology applications, but existing programmable synthesis methods depend on exchanging DNA building blocks, thereby increasing reagent use and complicating multistep workflows. Here, we introduce the TEmperature Mediated Primer Exchange Reaction (TEMPER), a programmable platform for arbitrary DNA synthesis that operates solely through temperature control without solution exchange. TEMPER uses hairpin DNA as temperature-responsive building blocks that define specific temperature range for DNA synthesis. The temperature range is determined by the length design of the hairpin, which regulates thermodynamic interactions between DNA molecules and allows selective and sequential DNA synthesis in one-pot. We validate its versatility by developing a DNA data storage writer, a colorimetric temperature indicator, and a temperature data logger, highlighting its broad potential in nanotechnology and biotechnology applications.
title_zh: 通过温度控制进行可编程一锅聚合酶介导的 DNA 合成
abstract_zh: 聚合酶介导的 DNA 合成是许多生物技术应用的基础，但现有的可编程合成方法依赖于交换 DNA 构建模块，从而增加了试剂的使用并使多步骤工作流程复杂化。在这里，我们介绍了 TEMperature 介导的引物交换反应 (TEMPER)，这是一个用于任意 DNA 合成的可编程平台，仅通过温度控制进行操作，无需溶液交换。 TEMPER 使用发夹 DNA 作为温度响应构建模块，定义 DNA 合成的特定温度范围。温度范围由发夹的长度设计决定，它调节 DNA 分子之间的热力学相互作用，并允许一锅选择性和顺序 DNA 合成。我们通过开发 DNA 数据存储写入器、比色温度指示器和温度数据记录器来验证其多功能性，突显其在纳米技术和生物技术应用中的广泛潜力。

title: Fluid-mediated nuclearity control in heterogeneous polyolefin catalysis
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The nuclearity of active sites in heterogeneous Ziegler-Natta catalysts fundamentally governs polyolefin microstructure, yet its dynamic regulation during polymerization remains challenging. Here, we report a liquid containing polymerization strategy that directs the formation of dinuclear titanium species through periodic wetting-drying of inert n-hexane on the catalytic particles. Operando spectroscopy reveals how this unique fluid environment promotes the formation of dinuclear centers, in contrast to the monomeric species dominant in conventional gas- or slurry-phase systems. These dinuclear sites substantially enhance comonomer incorporation efficiency, yielding polyethylene with more uniform short-chain branching (SCB) distribution. Diffusion-ordered NMR spectroscopy further confirms that the capillary condensation of inert n-hexane in catalyst pores during liquid containing polymerization can enrich 1‑octene concentration by over twofold compared to the bulk slurry environment, thereby effectively promoting the SCB content in the synthesized polyethylene. This work establishes reactor fluid dynamics as a powerful tool for in-situ active-site engineering, opening avenues for selective control of polymer microstructure without modifying catalyst composition.
title_zh: 非均相聚烯烃催化中流体介导的核控制
abstract_zh: 非均相齐格勒-纳塔催化剂中活性位点的核从根本上控制着聚烯烃的微观结构，但其在聚合过程中的动态调节仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们报告了一种包含液体的聚合策略，该策略通过惰性正己烷在催化颗粒上的定期润湿-干燥来引导双核钛物质的形成。原位光谱揭示了这种独特的流体环境如何促进双核中心的形成，这与传统气相或浆相系统中占主导地位的单体物质形成对比。这些双核位点大大提高了共聚单体的结合效率，产生具有更均匀的短链支化（SCB）分布的聚乙烯。扩散有序核磁共振波谱进一步证实，在含液体聚合过程中，惰性正己烷在催化剂孔中的毛细管冷凝可以使1-辛烯浓度比本体浆料环境增加两倍以上，从而有效提高合成聚乙烯中的SCB含量。这项工作将反应器流体动力学确立为原位活性位点工程的强大工具，为在不改变催化剂组成的情况下选择性控制聚合物微观结构开辟了途径。

title: Light polarization-based electro-optic memory
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The integration of light polarization into non-volatile memory enables angle-resolved information processing, unlocking new photonic channels for communication, computation and imaging. Yet practical polarization-sensitive memory remains rare. Here, we report a 2D rhenium disulfide (ReS2)/hafnium zirconium oxide (Hf0.5Zr0.5O2, HZO) ferroelectric field-effect transistor in which field-driven charge separation realizes polarization-resolved memory. The redistribution of photo-generated carriers at the heterostructure interface establishes an interfacial electrostatic field that modulates HZO ferroelectric domains and encodes non-volatile states. We also find that interfacial compressive stress induced by lattice mismatch shortens the Re-Re bond, which enhances the Re-Re chain anisotropy by 3.7x (from 2.67 to 9.98). Integrated into arrays for photonic neural networks, the device attains >93% accuracy on a transformer model. Leveraging the cumulative switching property of HZO with sequential optical signals, the device enables in-situ multiplication and accumulation of inputs over time, achieving 4x area saving with
title_zh: 基于光偏振的电光存储器
abstract_zh: 将光偏振集成到非易失性存储器中可以实现角度分辨信息处理，从而解锁用于通信、计算和成像的新光子通道。然而实用的偏振敏感存储器仍然很少见。在这里，我们报道了一种二维二硫化铼（ReS2）/铪锆氧化物（Hf0.5Zr0.5O2，HZO）铁电场效应晶体管，其中场驱动电荷分离实现了极化分辨存储器。光生载流子在异质结构界面处的重新分布建立了界面静电场，该界面静电场可调制 HZO 铁电域并编码非易失性状态。我们还发现，晶格失配引起的界面压应力缩短了Re-Re键，从而将Re-Re链各向异性增强了3.7倍（从2.67到9.98）。该设备集成到光子神经网络阵列中，在变压器模型上实现了 >93% 的准确度。该器件利用 HZO 的累积开关特性和顺序光信号，能够随着时间的推移实现输入的原位乘法和累积，从而实现 4 倍的面积节省

title: A low-temperature, water-free fabrication route to Mg-based micro thermoelectric coolers for thermal management
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Sustainable thermal management of high-heat-flux electronics beyond Moore’s Law requires micro thermoelectric coolers (μ-TECs) that are both high-performance and environmentally sustainable. However, state-of-the-art μ-TECs rely on Bi2Te3-based materials, whose tellurium scarcity, toxicity concerns and limited mechanical robustness hinder widespread adoption. Mg-based thermoelectric materials offer a promising alternative but remain challenging to integrate into microscale devices. Here we show that a low-temperature, water-free fabrication strategy enables tellurium-minimized μ-TECs based on n-type Mg3(Bi,Sb)2 and p-type MgAgSb. Using magnetron sputtering as a cold bonding approach, we fabricate compact 12-pair microdevices (2.95 × 4.35 × 1.4 mm3), with thermoelectric legs approximately 3% the size of previously reported Mg-based devices. The resulting μ-TECs achieve a power density of 4.34 W cm−2 and a packing density of 93.5 pairs cm−2. Our work establishes a scalable route for sustainable thermoelectric cooling and a viable alternative to conventional Bi2Te3 technologies.
title_zh: 用于热管理的镁基微型热电冷却器的低温、无水制造路线
abstract_zh: 超越摩尔定律的高热通量电子产品的可持续热管理需要高性能且环境可持续的微型热电冷却器 (μ-TEC)。然而，最先进的 μ-TEC 依赖于 Bi2Te3 基材料，其碲稀缺、毒性问题和有限的机械鲁棒性阻碍了广泛采用。镁基热电材料提供了一种有前途的替代品，但集成到微型设备中仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们展示了一种低温、无水制造策略，可以实现基于 n 型 Mg3(Bi,Sb)2 和 p 型 MgAgSb 的碲最小化 μ-TEC。使用磁控溅射作为冷键合方法，我们制造了紧凑的 12 对微型器件 (2.95 × 4.35 × 1.4 mm3)，其热电臂尺寸约为之前报道的镁基器件的 3%。由此产生的 μ-TEC 实现了 4.34 W cm−2 的功率密度和 93.5 对 cm−2 的堆积密度。我们的工作为可持续热电冷却建立了一条可扩展的路线，并为传统 Bi2Te3 技术提供了可行的替代方案。

title: Comparative analysis of Cdc48-dependent proteolysis at the ER, mitochondria and chloroplasts
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The ubiquitin-proteasome system (UPS) is the preeminent proteolytic system in eukaryotes. While soluble nucleocytosolic proteins are readily accessed by the UPS, organelle-localised proteins present major, membrane-related accessibility challenges. Cells overcome this problem by employing the conserved AAA+ ATPase Cdc48 to extract organellar proteins to the cytosol, thereby enabling proteasomal degradation. Major Cdc48-dependent proteolytic systems exist at the endoplasmic reticulum, mitochondria and chloroplasts, and are uniquely adapted to deliver protein homeostasis within the respective organelles. We provide a focused comparison of these systems, analysing similarities and differences between them. Better understanding of underlying principles has important implications spanning human health and agriculture.
title_zh: ER、线粒体和叶绿体中 Cdc48 依赖性蛋白水解的比较分析
abstract_zh: 泛素蛋白酶体系统（UPS）是真核生物中最杰出的蛋白水解系统。虽然可溶性核细胞溶质蛋白很容易被 UPS 访问，但细胞器定位蛋白却面临着与膜相关的主要可访问性挑战。细胞通过使用保守的 AAA+ ATP 酶 Cdc48 将细胞器蛋白提取到细胞质中，从而实现蛋白酶体降解，从而克服了这个问题。主要的 Cdc48 依赖性蛋白水解系统存在于内质网、线粒体和叶绿体中，并且独特地适应于在各自的细胞器内提供蛋白质稳态。我们对这些系统进行了重点比较，分析了它们之间的异同。更好地理解基本原理对人类健康和农业具有重要影响。

title: Multitrophic interaction networks mediate biodiversity effects on ecosystem multifunctionality
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Biodiversity loss threatens the multifunctionality of ecosystems on which human well-being ultimately depends. Multitrophic species interactions may be key to explaining the ecological consequences of biodiversity loss, but research explicitly linking species interactions and ecosystem multifunctionality remains rare. To fill this gap, we synthesize data from a large-scale biodiversity experiment established in 2009 in subtropical China that manipulates tree species richness (1-24 species). We integrate 11 types of antagonistic and mutualistic species interaction networks, and 34 ecosystem functions associated with a diverse set of species and trophic levels. Our analysis highlights that characterizing the structure of species interaction networks is invaluable for assessing interaction-mediated biodiversity effects and underlying mechanisms. Positive effects of network size align with expected benefits of multitrophic diversity for ecosystem multifunctionality. Positive effects of niche overlap among interacting species and negative effects of highly connected species (i.e. high linkage density) reveal additional, interaction-mediated drivers. The effects of niche overlap suggest benefits of functionally similar species, and the effects of linkage density underscore the importance of specialized interactions in promoting ecosystem multifunctionality. These findings emphasize that ecosystem service provisioning does not only rely on biodiversity across trophic levels, but to a similar degree on how species interact.
title_zh: 多营养相互作用网络调节生物多样性对生态系统多功能性的影响
abstract_zh: 生物多样性丧失威胁着人类福祉最终依赖的生态系统的多功能性。多营养物种相互作用可能是解释生物多样性丧失的生态后果的关键，但明确将物种相互作用和生态系统多功能性联系起来的研究仍然很少。为了填补这一空白，我们综合了 2009 年在中国亚热带地区建立的大规模生物多样性实验的数据，该实验控制了树种丰富度（1-24 种）。我们整合了 11 种对抗性和互利性物种相互作用网络，以及与不同物种和营养级相关的 34 种生态系统功能。我们的分析强调，描述物种相互作用网络的结构对于评估相互作用介导的生物多样性影响和潜在机制非常有价值。网络规模的积极影响与多营养多样性对生态系统多功能性的预期效益一致。相互作用的物种之间生态位重叠的积极影响和高度关联的物种（即高连锁密度）的消极影响揭示了额外的相互作用介导的驱动因素。生态位重叠的影响表明功能相似物种的好处，而连锁密度的影响强调了专门相互作用在促进生态系统多功能性方面的重要性。这些发现强调，生态系统服务的提供不仅依赖于各个营养级的生物多样性，而且在很大程度上依赖于物种之间的相互作用。

title: CDIN1-Codanin-1 complex defective in congenital dyserythropoietic anaemia type I is an RNA nuclease
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Congenital Dyserythropoietic Anaemia type I (CDA-I) is a rare inherited disorder of erythropoiesis, in which erythroid cells display a unique nuclear phenotype referred to as ‘spongy’ heterochromatin. The molecular basis of CDA-I remains unknown, with most cases of CDA-I caused by mutations in CDAN1, encoding Codanin-1, or CDIN1, encoding for Codanin-1-interacting nuclease 1 (CDIN1). To date, very little is known about the function of CDA-I disease proteins and the mechanism by which their associated mutations cause disease. Here, we demonstrate that endogenous CDIN1 interacts with Codanin-1, to form a stable complex. Structural and functional analysis of this complex reveals that the CDIN1-Codanin-1 complex is an RNA nuclease. We shed light on the key mechanistic features of the complex using biochemical and biophysical approaches, complemented by all-atom molecular dynamics (MD) structural simulations. We identify various functional consequences of founder patient mutations on the RNA nuclease activity of CDIN1, providing a framework for understanding the pathophysiology and developing therapeutic strategies for CDA-I.
title_zh: 先天性红细胞生成障碍性贫血 I 型缺陷的 CDIN1-Codanin-1 复合物是一种 RNA 核酸酶
abstract_zh: 先天性红细胞生成障碍性贫血 I 型 (CDA-I) 是一种罕见的遗传性红细胞生成障碍，其中红细胞表现出一种独特的核表型，称为“海绵状”异染色质。 CDA-I 的分子基础仍不清楚，大多数 CDA-I 病例是由编码 Codanin-1 的 CDAN1 或编码 Codanin-1 相互作用核酸酶 1 (CDIN1) 的 CDIN1 突变引起的。迄今为止，人们对 CDA-I 疾病蛋白的功能及其相关突变引起疾病的机制知之甚少。在这里，我们证明内源性 CDIN1 与 Codanin-1 相互作用，形成稳定的复合物。该复合物的结构和功能分析表明，CDIN1-Codanin-1 复合物是一种 RNA 核酸酶。我们利用生化和生物物理方法阐明了该复合物的关键机械特征，并辅以全原子分子动力学（MD）结构模拟。我们确定了创始人患者突变对 CDIN1 RNA 核酸酶活性的各种功能后果，为理解 CDA-I 的病理生理学和制定治疗策略提供了框架。

title: Sulfur-passivated Pt cluster edges on CeO2 for selective CO2-to-CO conversion
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The catalytic conversion of CO2 into value-added chemicals via the reverse water-gas shift (RWGS) reaction represents a significant pathway for mitigating climate change and enabling sustainable carbon utilization. However, Pt-based catalysts, despite their superior H2 activation ability, often suffer from inadequate CO selectivity and durability under high-temperature conditions, primarily due to excessive CO adsorption at low-coordinated Pt edge sites. Herein, we present a sulfur (S)-mediated targeted passivation strategy to engineer Pt-CeO2 catalysts with atomically tailored active sites, effectively addressing the critical activity-stability-selectivity trade-off. The incorporation of S into CeO2 support induced optimized electronic modulation, as evidenced by in situ/ex situ characterizations and density functional theory (DFT) calculations, which weakened *CO adsorption strength and suppressed the methanation pathway. The optimized Pt-S-CeO2 catalyst exhibits remarkable performance at 600 °C: CO selectivity >95%, CO production rate of 8.8×10−5 mol gcat−1 s−1, and 2 hydrogenation systems and beyond.
title_zh: CeO2 上的硫钝化 Pt 簇边缘用于选择性 CO2 转化为 CO
abstract_zh: 通过逆水煤气变换（RWGS）反应将二氧化碳催化转化为增值化学品是缓解气候变化和实现可持续碳利用的重要途径。然而，Pt 基催化剂尽管具有优异的 H2 活化能力，但在高温条件下常常存在 CO 选择性和耐久性不足的问题，这主要是由于低配位 Pt 边缘位点过度吸附 CO。在此，我们提出了一种硫（S）介导的靶向钝化策略，以设计具有原子定制活性位点的 Pt-CeO2 催化剂，有效解决关键的活性-稳定性-选择性权衡问题。原位/非原位表征和密度泛函理论（DFT）计算证明，将S掺入CeO2载体中会引起优化的电子调制，从而削弱了*CO吸附强度并抑制了甲烷化途径。优化后的Pt-S-CeO2催化剂在600℃下表现出卓越的性能：CO选择性>95%，CO产率为8.8×10−5 mol gcat−1 s−1，以及2个加氢系统及以上。

title: VPS13C/PARK23 initiates lipid transfer and membrane remodeling for efficient lysosomal repair
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Perturbations in lysosome integrity are tightly linked to neurological disorders and ageing, but the underlying pathogenic mechanisms are incompletely understood. Using an unbiased proteomic approach, we here identified the bridge-like lipid transport protein VPS13C/PARK23 as a key component of a global early response pathway to lysosome damage. VPS13C readily binds lysosomes under mechanical or osmotic tension in anticipation of membrane lesions. The latter trigger a conformational change in the protein’s C-terminus, involving its ATG2C domain acting as sensor of damage-induced lipid packing defects. We show that ER-lysosome contacts formed by VPS13C provide critical binding platforms for OSBP/ORPs to enable efficient ER wrapping of damaged lysosomes. A chemical approach to assess directional ER-to-lysosome lipid transport revealed that VPS13C is essential for large-scale lipid delivery to acutely damaged lysosomes to facilitate their repair. Our findings offer new mechanistic insights into how loss-of-function mutations in VPS13C may enhance the risk of Parkinson’s disease.
title_zh: VPS13C/PARK23 启动脂质转移和膜重塑以实现有效的溶酶体修复
abstract_zh: 溶酶体完整性的扰动与神经系统疾病和衰老密切相关，但潜在的致病机制尚不完全清楚。使用公正的蛋白质组学方法，我们确定桥状脂质转运蛋白 VPS13C/PARK23 是溶酶体损伤的整体早期反应途径的关键组成部分。 VPS13C 在机械或渗透张力下很容易结合溶酶体，以预测膜损伤。后者触发蛋白质 C 末端的构象变化，其中 ATG2C 结构域充当损伤诱导的脂质堆积缺陷的传感器。我们表明，VPS13C 形成的 ER-溶酶体接触为 OSBP/ORP 提供了关键的结合平台，以实现受损溶酶体的有效 ER 包裹。评估内质网至溶酶体脂质定向转运的化学方法表明，VPS13C 对于大规模脂质递送至严重受损的溶酶体以促进其修复至关重要。我们的研究结果为 VPS13C 功能丧失突变如何增加帕金森病的风险提供了新的机制见解。

title: Years of life lost in patients with a false-negative diagnosis of primary melanoma. A prospective study of the German Central Malignant Melanoma Registry involving 9063 patients over 28 years
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: A false-negative diagnosis of cancer can lead to a delay in effective treatment and a poorer prognosis. Here, we use the example of cutaneous melanoma to examine how many years of life are lost after a false-negative diagnosis compared to a primarily correct diagnosis. From 1996 to 2015, 9,063 patients are prospectively registered in the German Central Malignant Melanoma Registry and followed up until December 2023. A false-negative diagnosis is found in 206 (2.3%) patients. The median time to correct diagnosis is 24.0 months. The 10-year recurrence-free survival probabilities are 32.9% for false-negative diagnoses and 76.2% for correct diagnoses (p
title_zh: 原发性黑色素瘤假阴性诊断的患者会损失多年的生命。德国中央恶性黑色素瘤登记处的一项前瞻性研究，涉及 28 年来的 9063 名患者
abstract_zh: 癌症的假阴性诊断可能会导致有效治疗的延迟和预后较差。在这里，我们使用皮肤黑色素瘤的例子来检查与基本正确的诊断相比，假阴性诊断后会损失多少年的生命。从 1996 年到 2015 年，德国中央恶性黑色素瘤登记处前瞻性登记了 9,063 名患者，并随访至 2023 年 12 月。其中 206 名 (2.3%) 患者发现假阴性诊断。正确诊断的中位时间为 24.0 个月。假阴性诊断的 10 年无复发生存概率为 32.9%，正确诊断的 10 年无复发生存概率为 76.2%（p

title: Modulation of intra-oceanic trench bending and along-trench thermochemical transport by mantle toroidal flow
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Oceanic trench bending over 1000 km occurs globally, with notable along-trench variations in mantle wedge thermochemistry. However, the mechanisms influencing both shallow trench geometry and deep mantle state remain unclear. Here we focus on the Mariana Trench as a representative case. Our 3D model successfully replicates its curved geometry. Modeling results further reveal that extensive intra-oceanic trench retreat and bending occur when the incoming plate features sharp density variations along the trench accompanied by a large buoyant segment (e.g., the Caroline Plate). In this scenario, significant dynamic pressure fluctuations develop in the mantle wedge, generating vigorous toroidal flow extending >1000 km from the buoyant segment, even under non-linear mantle rheology. The model-predicted toroidal flow transports warm mantle materials, reshaping local topography, rejuvenate the mantle wedge, and heating the slab surface to facilitate volatile release. These experiments highlight toroidal flow as a key regular of both large-scale trench bending and along-trench thermochemical variations.
title_zh: 地幔环形流对大洋内海沟弯曲和沿海沟热化学传输的调节
abstract_zh: 全球范围内都存在超过 1000 公里的海沟弯曲，地幔楔热化学沿海沟变化显着。然而，影响浅海沟几何形状和深部地幔状态的机制仍不清楚。这里我们重点以马里亚纳海沟为代表案例。我们的 3D 模型成功复制了其弯曲的几何形状。模拟结果进一步表明，当传入的板块沿着海沟出现急剧的密度变化并伴有大的浮力部分（例如加罗林板块）时，就会发生广泛的洋内海沟后退和弯曲。在这种情况下，地幔楔中会出现显着的动态压力波动，即使在非线性地幔流变条件下，也会产生从浮力段延伸超过 1000 公里的剧烈环形流。模型预测的环形流输送温暖的地幔物质，重塑局部地形，使地幔楔重新焕发活力，并加热板块表面以促进挥发物释放。这些实验强调环形流动是大规模沟槽弯曲和沿沟槽热化学变化的关键规律。

title: Dissecting autonomous enzymatic variability in single cells
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Metabolic enzymes perform life-sustaining functions in various cellular compartments. Anecdotally, metabolic activity is observed to vary between genetically identical cells, which impacts drug resistance, differentiation, and immune cell activation. However, no large-scale resource systematically reporting metabolic cellular heterogeneity exists. Here, we leverage imaging-based single-cell spatial proteomics to reveal the extent of non-genetic variability of the human enzymatic proteome, as a proxy for metabolic states. Nearly two fifths of enzymes exhibit cell-to-cell variable expression, and half localize to multiple cellular compartments. Metabolic heterogeneity arises largely autonomously of cell cycling, and individual cells reestablish these myriad metabolic phenotypes over several cell divisions. We reveal through multiplexed imaging that metabolic states are continuous and that the correlation between metabolic pathways is metabolic state dependent. These results establish cell-to-cell enzymatic heterogeneity as an organizing principle of cell biology that may rewire our understanding of drug resistance, treatment design, and other aspects of medicine.
title_zh: 剖析单细胞的自主酶促变异性
abstract_zh: 代谢酶在各种细胞区室中发挥维持生命的功能。有趣的是，观察到基因相同的细胞之间的代谢活动存在差异，这会影响耐药性、分化和免疫细胞激活。然而，不存在系统地报告代谢细胞异质性的大规模资源。在这里，我们利用基于成像的单细胞空间蛋白质组学来揭示人类酶蛋白质组的非遗传变异程度，作为代谢状态的代表。近五分之二的酶表现出细胞间的可变表达，其中一半定位于多个细胞区室。代谢异质性很大程度上独立于细胞周期而产生，并且单个细胞在几次细胞分裂中重建这些无数的代谢表型。我们通过多重成像揭示代谢状态是连续的，并且代谢途径之间的相关性是代谢状态依赖性的。这些结果将细胞间酶异质性确立为细胞生物学的组织原则，可能会重新认识我们对耐药性、治疗设计和医学其他方面的理解。

title: Macrophage INSIG1 deficiency drives psoriasiform dermatitis via the SREBP2-STAT1 axis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Psoriasis is an autoimmune skin disease, and its pathogenesis remains incompletely understood. As central drivers of psoriasis pathogenesis that bridge innate and adaptive immunity, macrophages are known to be modulated in their function by insulin-induced gene 1 (INSIG1), a regulator of cholesterol synthesis. Bioinformatic analysis of human psoriatic lesions reveals a significant negative correlation between INSIG1 expression and pro-inflammatory cytokine levels (IL-23, IL-17A). Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) and immunofluorescence confirm significantly reduced INSIG1 expression specifically in macrophages from psoriatic skin. In vivo, myeloid-specific Insig1 deficiency exacerbates imiquimod (IMQ)-induced psoriasiform dermatitis, characterized by increased epidermal thickening and immune infiltration. By activating sterol regulatory element-binding protein 2 (SREBP2), INSIG1 deficiency leads to the transcriptional upregulation of STAT1, which drives M1 macrophage polarization and ultimately amplifies psoriatic inflammation. This study reveals an important role of macrophage INSIG1 in regulating inflammatory responses and lipid metabolism, providing insight into the pathogenesis of psoriasis and potential therapeutic targets.
title_zh: 巨噬细胞 INSIG1 缺陷通过 SREBP2-STAT1 轴驱动银屑病皮炎
abstract_zh: 牛皮癣是一种自身免疫性皮肤病，其发病机制尚不完全清楚。作为连接先天免疫和适应性免疫的银屑病发病机制的核心驱动因素，巨噬细胞的功能受到胰岛素诱导基因 1 (INSIG1)（胆固醇合成的调节因子）的调节。对人类银屑病皮损的生物信息分析显示，INSIG1 表达与促炎细胞因子水平（IL-23、IL-17A）之间存在显着负相关。单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq) 和免疫荧光证实 INSIG1 表达显着降低，特别是在银屑病皮肤巨噬细胞中。在体内，骨髓特异性 Insig1 缺陷会加剧咪喹莫特 (IMQ) 诱导的银屑病样皮炎，其特征是表皮增厚和免疫浸润增加。通过激活甾醇调节元件结合蛋白 2 (SREBP2)，INSIG1 缺陷导致 STAT1 转录上调，从而驱动 M1 巨噬细胞极化并最终放大银屑病炎症。这项研究揭示了巨噬细胞INSIG1在调节炎症反应和脂质代谢中的重要作用，有助于深入了解银屑病的发病机制和潜在的治疗靶点。

title: Chemical intuition on bond-dissociation energies as an emergent ability of universal machine-learning interatomic potentials
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Machine-learning interatomic potentials have demonstrated power-law scaling in predictive accuracy as training data and model capacity increase, but it remains unclear whether models trained at scale acquire interpretable chemical concepts. Here we show that an E(3)-equivariant machine-learning interatomic potential learns local bond information without direct supervision of bond properties. To expose this information, we develop an edge-wise emergent energy-decomposition framework and apply it to an Allegro neural-network potential trained on SPICE2, a dataset composed of stable molecular structures. The framework analyzes edge-wise energy contributions obtained from the trained model and their distributions together with information entropy to examine how data size, data composition and model-training scenarios shape the internal representation of chemical bonds. The resulting bond-dissociation energy estimates for archetypal bond types agree quantitatively with literature values and are consistent across models trained on organic and inorganic datasets. We further examine a hybrid training set and find that combining complementary chemical data improves transition-state energy-prediction accuracy while reshaping the learned bond representations. These results indicate that scalable interatomic potentials can acquire transferable bond concepts without explicit bond-energy labels, providing a way to analyze the transition-state energy-prediction problem.
title_zh: 键解离能的化学直觉作为通用机器学习原子间势的新兴能力
abstract_zh: 随着训练数据和模型容量的增加，机器学习原子间势已经证明了预测准确性的幂律缩放，​​但目前尚不清楚大规模训练的模型是否获得可解释的化学概念。在这里，我们展示了 E(3) 等变机器学习原子间势能在不直接监督键属性的情况下学习局部键信息。为了揭示这些信息，我们开发了一个边缘式紧急能量分解框架，并将其应用于在 SPICE2（一个由稳定分子结构组成的数据集）上训练的 Allegro 神经网络势。该框架分析从训练模型获得的边缘能量贡献及其分布以及信息熵，以检查数据大小、数据组成和模型训练场景如何塑造化学键的内部表示。由此产生的原型键类型的键解离能估计在数量上与文献值一致，并且在有机和无机数据集上训练的模型之间保持一致。我们进一步检查了混合训练集，发现结合互补的化学数据可以提高过渡态能量预测的准确性，同时重塑学习的键表示。这些结果表明，可扩展的原子间势可以获得可转移的键概念，而无需明确的键能标签，从而提供了一种分析过渡态能量预测问题的方法。

title: Dynamic evolution of higher alcohols from CO2 on Fe3O4-Fe5C2-Cu catalytic interfaces with amorphous Ti layout
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Selective synthesis of alcohols from carbon-based feedstocks remains a fundamental challenge due to complex reaction networks and competing pathways. Here we report a titanium iron ore material FeTiOx synthesized via a high-temperature calcination strategy that introduces amorphous Ti species into the catalyst framework. The FeTiOx system exhibits an intrinsic preference for higher alcohols formation, and tuning the dispersion of Cu species further enhances higher alcohols selectivity to 30.2%, while maintaining a CO2 conversion of 42.5%. Operando X-ray diffraction and diffuse reflectance Fourier transform infrared spectroscopy are employed to monitor the evolution of the catalyst phase structure (Fe2O3 → Fe3O4 → Fe5C2) and chemical intermediates (CO*, CHx*, CH3CH2O*) in real time, thereby elucidating the dynamic evolutions of the catalyst phases and surface intermediates under reaction conditions. These results uncover the structural adaptability of the catalyst and its role in regulating key reaction intermediates. This work highlights the importance of phase-structure engineering in Fe-based catalytic systems and provides a strategy for designing efficient catalysts for selective higher alcohols synthesis.
title_zh: 无定形 Ti 布局 Fe3O4-Fe5C2-Cu 催化界面上 CO2 动态演化高级醇
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的反应网络和竞争途径，从碳基原料选择性合成醇仍然是一个基本挑战。在这里，我们报道了一种通过高温煅烧策略合成的钛铁矿石材料 FeTiOx，该策略将非晶态钛物质引入到催化剂框架中。 FeTiOx 系统表现出对高级醇形成的内在偏好，并且调节 Cu 物种的分散性进一步将高级醇选择性提高至 30.2%，同时保持 CO2 转化率 42.5%。采用原位X射线衍射和漫反射傅里叶变换红外光谱实时监测催化剂相结构（Fe2O3→Fe3O4→Fe5C2）和化学中间体（CO*、CHx*、CH3CH2O*）的演变，从而阐明反应条件下催化剂相和表面中间体的动态演变。这些结果揭示了催化剂的结构适应性及其在调节关键反应中间体中的作用。这项工作强调了相结构工程在铁基催化系统中的重要性，并为设计用于选择性高级醇合成的高效催化剂提供了策略。

title: Near-unity charge readout signal in a nonlinear resonator without matching the sensor dissipation
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Dissipative sensors typically use linear resonators with impedance matching to achieve maximal signal and fast operation. The impedance matching, however, sets an upper limit to the bandwidth of the readout. In this paper, we present a nonlinear resonator performing the readout of a double quantum dot charge state via a charge-sensing quantum dot. We show that by driving the resonator in the nonlinear regime, we achieve a near-unity signal for a dissipative sensor. This despite not satisfying the sensor impedance matching requirements necessary for such large signals in the linear regime. Our experiments, supported by numerical calculations, demonstrate that the signal increase stems from the sensor dissipation shifting the onset of the nonlinear resonator response. By lifting the matching requirement, we open up an avenue to ultra-fast charge detectors as the resonator input-output coupling - setting the detector bandwidth - does not have to match to the typically much slower sensor dissipation rate.
title_zh: 非线性谐振器中接近一致的电荷读出信号，无需匹配传感器耗散
abstract_zh: 耗散传感器通常使用具有阻抗匹配的线性谐振器来实现最大信号和快速操作。然而，阻抗匹配设置了读出带宽的上限。在本文中，我们提出了一种非线性谐振器，通过电荷感应量子点执行双量子点电荷态的读出。我们表明，通过在非线性状态下驱动谐振器，我们为耗散传感器实现了接近一致的信号。尽管不满足线性区域中如此大的信号所需的传感器阻抗匹配要求，但这仍然是这样。我们的实验在数值计算的支持下表明，信号增加源于传感器耗散改变了非线性谐振器响应的开始。通过提高匹配要求，我们为超快电荷检测器开辟了一条途径，因为谐振器输入输出耦合（设置检测器带宽）不必与通常慢得多的传感器耗散率相匹配。

title: Conserved macromolecular architecture of poplar secondary cell walls revealed by ssNMR and atomistic modeling
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The macromolecular architecture of plant secondary cell walls governs wood’s mechanical and biochemical properties, yet its natural intra-species variability remains poorly characterized. Here, we combined ¹³C solid-state NMR (ssNMR), multivariate statistical analysis, and molecular modeling to profile nanoscale structure across 13 genetically diverse Populus trichocarpa genotypes grown in ¹³C-enriched atmospheres. SsNMR-derived phenotypes spanning composition, structure, mobility, and inter-polymer proximities reveal a conserved architecture, with a subtle yet coordinated variation organizing into dominant structural and secondary mobility axes. A representative atomistic model captures these features and reproduces experimental metrics. Molecular dynamics simulations support a weak but consistent positive correlation between cellulose abundance and crystalline-like order, with interior cellulose chains enriched in tg (trans–gauche) conformations without expanding crystalline cores. Together, experiment and simulation reveal a genetically buffered, broadly conserved nanoscale architecture across genotypes, where subtle fine-tuning of cellulose bundling and matrix packing balances mechanical performance with biological function.
title_zh: ssNMR和原子模型揭示杨树次生细胞壁的保守大分子结构
abstract_zh: 植物次生细胞壁的大分子结构控制着木材的机械和生化特性，但其自然的种内变异性仍然很少被表征。在这里，我们结合了 13C 固态核磁共振 (ssNMR)、多元统计分析和分子建模来分析在富含 13C 的大气中生长的 13 种遗传多样性毛果杨基因型的纳米级结构。 SsNMR 衍生的表型涵盖组成、结构、迁移率和聚合物间的邻近性，揭示了一种保守的结构，具有微妙但协调的变化，组织成主要结构轴和次迁移率轴。代表性的原子模型捕获这些特征并重现实验指标。分子动力学模拟支持纤维素丰度和类晶体有序之间存在微弱但一致的正相关性，内部纤维素链富含 tg（反式高斯）构象，而不会扩展晶体核心。实验和模拟共同揭示了跨基因型的遗传缓冲、广泛保守的纳米级结构，其中纤维素成束和基质堆积的微妙微调平衡了机械性能和生物功能。

title: Concurrent control of natural and robotic limbs through a tactile-encoded brain-computer interface
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) promise to extend human movement capabilities by enabling direct neural control of supernumerary effectors, yet integrating augmented commands with multiple degrees of freedom without disrupting natural movement remains a key challenge. Here, we propose a tactile-encoded BCI that leverages sensory afferents through a tactile-evoked P300 paradigm, allowing reliable decoding of supernumerary motor intentions even when superimposed with voluntary actions. The interface was evaluated in a multi-day experiment comprising a single motor recognition task to validate baseline BCI performance and a dual-task paradigm to assess the potential influence between the BCI and natural human movement. The interface achieved real-time and reliable decoding of four supernumerary degrees of freedom, with significant performance improvements after three days of training. After training, performance did not differ significantly between the single-task and dual-task conditions, and natural movement remained unimpaired during concurrent supernumerary control. Lastly, the interface was deployed in a movement augmentation task, demonstrating its ability to command two supernumerary robotic arms for functional assistance during bimanual tasks. These results establish a neural interface paradigm for movement augmentation through stimulation of sensory afferents, expanding motor degrees of freedom without impairing natural movement.
title_zh: 通过触觉编码脑机接口同时控制自然肢体和机器人肢体
abstract_zh: 脑机接口（BCI）有望通过对多余效应器进行直接神经控制来扩展人类运动能力，但在不破坏自然运动的情况下将增强命令与多个自由度集成仍然是一个关键挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种触觉编码的 BCI，它通过触觉诱发的 P300 范式利用感觉传入，即使与自愿动作叠加，也可以可靠地解码多余的运动意图。该界面在为期多天的实验中进行了评估，其中包括验证基线 BCI 性能的单运动识别任务和评估 BCI 与自然人类运动之间潜在影响的双任务范例。该接口实现了四个多余自由度的实时可靠解码，经过三天的训练，性能显着提升。训练后，单任务和双任务条件下的表现没有显着差异，并且在并发额外控制期间自然运动保持不变。最后，该界面被部署在运动增强任务中，展示了其在双手任务期间指挥两个多余机械臂提供功能协助的能力。这些结果建立了一种神经接口范式，通过刺激感觉传入来增强运动，在不损害自然运动的情况下扩大运动自由度。

title: BRG1-mediated suppression of ferroptosis underlies BTK inhibitor resistance
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Resistance to Bruton’s tyrosine kinase inhibitors (BTKi) remains a major therapeutic challenge in B-cell malignancies. Here, we identify chromatin remodeler BRG1-mediated suppression of ferroptosis as a central mechanism of BTKi resistance in mantle cell lymphoma (MCL), in which aberrant BRG1-dependent transcription program protects cells from BTKi-induced ferroptosis by restricting reactive oxygen species (ROS) and labile iron. Mechanistically, BRG1 promotes resistance through regulation of both BTK-dependent survival signaling and a BTK-independent transcriptional program. The latter is mediated by BRG1-driven induction of MEF2B, which upregulates atypical mitochondrial complex I subunit NDUFA4L2. Increased NDUFA4L2 restricts cellular respiration, preemptively limiting mitochondrial ROS generation and activating AMPK signaling, together reducing susceptibility to lipid peroxidation and ferroptosis. Pharmacologic inhibition of BRG1 disrupts these programs, restoring ferroptotic sensitivity and synergizing with BTKi across resistant MCL models. Together, our study establishes BRG1 as a central regulator of BTKi resistance and provides a rationale for co-targeting BRG1 and BTK as a therapeutic strategy for B-cell malignancies.
title_zh: BRG1 介导的铁死亡抑制是 BTK 抑制剂耐药性的基础
abstract_zh: 对布鲁顿酪氨酸激酶抑制剂 (BTKi) 的耐药性仍然是 B 细胞恶性肿瘤的主要治疗挑战。在这里，我们发现染色质重塑蛋白 BRG1 介导的铁死亡抑制是套细胞淋巴瘤 (MCL) 中 BTKi 耐药的核心机制，其中异常的 BRG1 依赖性转录程序通过限制活性氧 (ROS) 和不稳定铁来保护细胞免受 BTKi 诱导的铁死亡。从机制上讲，BRG1 通过调节 BTK 依赖性生存信号和 BTK 独立转录程序来促进耐药性。后者是由 BRG1 驱动的 MEF2B 诱导介导的，MEF2B 上调非典型线粒体复合物 I 亚基 NDUFA4L2。 NDUFA4L2 增加会限制细胞呼吸，预先限制线粒体 ROS 生成并激活 AMPK 信号传导，从而降低脂质过氧化和铁死亡的易感性。 BRG1 的药理学抑制会破坏这些程序，恢复铁死亡敏感性，并在耐药性 MCL 模型中与 BTKi 协同作用。总之，我们的研究确立了 BRG1 作为 BTKi 耐药性的中心调节因子，并为 BRG1 和 BTK 共同靶向作为 B 细胞恶性肿瘤的治疗策略提供了理论基础。

title: Improvement of the tensile strength of carbon nanotube fibers to 12.5 GPa by fluidics-induced alignment and densification
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Achieving the superior tensile strength of individual carbon nanotubes (CNTs) in macroscopic fibers depends on how CNTs are assembled. This study reports a fluidics approach: spraying high-velocity ethanol to scour and shrink pre-made CNT fibers. Experimental measurements show that the continuous scouring and shrinking induce significant improvements of the CNT alignment and packing density, leading to large increases of the van der Waals forces between CNTs and thus the tensile strength of the fibers. Under optimal conditions, the new CNT fibers achieve a specific tensile strength of 7.5×106 N⋅m⋅kg⁻1 (or 7.5 N⋅tex⁻1) and absolute strength of 12.5 GPa, approaching the lower limit of individual CNTs. They also exhibit a high Young’s modulus of 370 GPa, electrical conductivity of ~3×106 S⋅m⁻1, and thermal conductivity of ~968 W⋅m⁻1⋅K⁻1. This fluidics approach offers a promising route to develop high-performance CNT materials comparable to CNT individuals.
title_zh: 通过流体诱导排列和致密化将碳纳米管纤维的拉伸强度提高至 12.5 GPa
abstract_zh: 宏观纤维中单个碳纳米管 (CNT) 的优异拉伸强度取决于 CNT 的组装方式。这项研究报告了一种流体方法：喷射高速乙醇来冲刷和收缩预制的碳纳米管纤维。实验测量表明，连续的冲刷和收缩导致碳纳米管排列和堆积密度显着改善，导致碳纳米管之间的范德华力大幅增加，从而提高纤维的拉伸强度。在最佳条件下，新型碳纳米管纤维的比拉伸强度为7.5×106 N⋅m⋅kg⁻1（或7.5 N⋅tex⁻1），绝对强度为12.5 GPa，接近单根碳纳米管的下限。它们还表现出 370 GPa 的高杨氏模量、~3×106 S⋅m⁻1 的电导率和~968 W⋅m⁻1⋅K⁻1 的热导率。这种流体学方法为开发与碳纳米管个体相当的高性能碳纳米管材料提供了一条有前途的途径。

title: Single cell spatial transcriptomics track the evolutionary hierarchy and microenvironment remodeling during breast carcinoma invasion
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The progression from ductal carcinoma in situ (DCIS) to invasive breast carcinoma (IBC) critically determines patient outcomes, yet its mechanisms remain incompletely understood. Integrating single-cell RNA sequencing, spatial transcriptomics, and genomics across 28 patients with synchronous DCIS and IBC, we delineate the spatial-molecular hierarchy of this transition. Invasion is primarily driven by clonal expansion of pre-existing DCIS subclones, emphasizing transcriptional reprogramming and tumor microenvironment (TME) remodeling over acquisition of additional driver alterations. IBC cells exhibit pronounced epithelial-mesenchymal transition and metabolic reprogramming. We uncover dynamic TME remodeling at the invasive front, identifying key ligand–receptor interactions (e.g., PPIA-BSG, MDK-LRP1, CXCL12-CXCR4) facilitating basement membrane disruption, angiogenesis and immunosuppression. Deconvolution of basement membrane breach reveals four molecularly defined stages (NMFT1–NMFT4) with progressively worsening patient survival. This study establishes a unified spatial-molecular atlas of DCIS-IBC progression, highlighting clonal expansion, transcriptional plasticity and TME remodeling as key drivers of invasion.
title_zh: 单细胞空间转录组学追踪乳腺癌侵袭过程中的进化层次和微环境重塑
abstract_zh: 从导管原位癌 (DCIS) 到浸润性乳腺癌 (IBC) 的进展关键决定患者的预后，但其机制仍不完全清楚。通过整合 28 名同步 DCIS 和 IBC 患者的单细胞 RNA 测序、空间转录组学和基因组学，我们描绘了这一转变的空间分子层次结构。入侵主要是由预先存在的 DCIS 亚克隆的克隆扩张驱动的，强调转录重编程和肿瘤微环境 (TME) 重塑，而不是获得额外的驱动改变。 IBC 细胞表现出明显的上皮-间质转化和代谢重编程。我们发现了侵入前沿的动态 TME 重塑，识别了促进基底膜破坏、血管生成和免疫抑制的关键配体-受体相互作用（例如 PPIA-BSG、MDK-LRP1、CXCL12-CXCR4）。基底膜破裂的反卷积揭示了四个分子定义的阶段（NMFT1-NMFT4），患者生存率逐渐恶化。这项研究建立了 DCIS-IBC 进展的统一空间分子图谱，强调克隆扩张、转录可塑性和 TME 重塑是侵袭的关键驱动因素。

title: A single-cell atlas of alternative wing development in two hemipteran species
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Insect wing polyphenism enables a single genome to produce distinct wing morphs in response to environmental cues, yet its underlying cellular determinants remain elusive. Here, we perform single-cell RNA sequencing of long-winged- and short-winged-destined wing buds of Pyrrhocoris apterus and Nilaparvata lugens, identifying six conserved cell types with comparable proportions between the two morphs. RNA interference-mediated silencing of 51 marker genes indicates that wing-patterning genes En (epithelial-like cells) and bs (tracheal cells), and cell-cycle genes Anln, CycB3, and cdk1 (neuron cells), are essential for long-winged development, among which En exhibits a specific temporal requirement. Flow cytometry analysis shows that long-winged formation mainly relies on an extended duration of cell proliferation. Cross-species comparisons indicate shared wing cell identities. Our findings indicate that hemipteran short-winged morphs may evolve from ancestral long-winged forms via precise regulation of wing-patterning and cell-cycle gene expression in epithelial‑like, tracheal, and neuron cells. This provides insights into the developmental plasticity of insect tissues at single‑cell resolution.
title_zh: 两种半翅目物种替代翅膀发育的单细胞图谱
abstract_zh: 昆虫翅膀多态性使单个基因组能够响应环境线索产生不同的翅膀形态，但其潜在的细胞决定因素仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们对 Pyrrocoris apterus 和 Nilaparvata lugens 的长翅和短翅翅芽进行了单细胞 RNA 测序，鉴定了两种形态之间比例相当的六种保守细胞类型。 RNA干扰介导的51个标记基因的沉默表明，翅膀图案基因En（上皮样细胞）和bs（气管细胞）以及细胞周期基因Anln、CycB3和cdk1（神经元细胞）对于长翅发育至关重要，其中En表现出特定的时间要求。流式细胞术分析表明，长翅的形成主要依赖于细胞增殖持续时间的延长。跨物种比较表明共享的翼细胞身份。我们的研究结果表明，半翅目短翅亚型可能是通过精确调控上皮样细胞、气管细胞和神经元细胞中的翅膀模式和细胞周期基因表达而从祖先的长翅亚型进化而来的。这提供了在单细胞分辨率下了解昆虫组织发育可塑性的见解。

title: Siderophore production by the lichen fungus Xanthoria parietina supports its algal symbiont
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Lichens are symbiotic associations between a fungal mycobiont and a photosynthetic photobiont. They thrive in nutrient-poor environments; yet the mechanisms underlying their adaptation to iron limitation remained largely unknown. Here, we characterize the iron acquisition system of Xanthoria parietina, a globally distributed lichen-forming fungus associated with the microalgal photobiont Trebouxia decolorans. We demonstrate that the mycobiont produces the siderophore ferrichrome and possesses the full genetic repertoire not only for siderophore biosynthesis, but also reductive iron assimilation, iron detoxification, and regulation. The ferrichrome-synthesizing non-ribosomal peptides synthetase exhibits a lichen-specific compact architecture but retains functionality when heterologously expressed in a non-lichenized ascomycete. Transcriptomic analysis and ferrichrome quantification reveal substrate-dependent regulation of the siderophore system. Importantly, ferrichrome promotes photobiont growth independent of extracellular iron reduction, indicating direct utilization. These findings provide the functional evidence of siderophore-mediated iron acquisition in a lichen symbiosis and highlight ferrichrome as a key mediator of mutualistic nutrient exchange.
title_zh: 地衣真菌 Xanthoria parietina 产生的铁载体支持其藻类共生体
abstract_zh: 地衣是真菌真菌生物体和光合光生物体之间的共生关联。它们在营养贫乏的环境中茁壮成长；然而，它们适应铁限制的机制仍然很大程度上未知。在这里，我们描述了 Xanthoria parietina 的铁获取系统，Xanthoria parietina 是一种全球分布的地衣形成真菌，与微藻光生物 Trebouxia decolorans 相关。我们证明，真菌生物体产生铁载体铁色素，并拥有完整的遗传库，不仅用于铁载体生物合成，还包括还原性铁同化、铁解毒和调节。铁红合成非核糖体肽合成酶表现出地衣特异性的紧凑结构，但在非地衣化子囊菌中异源表达时保留功能。转录组分析和铁色素定量揭示了铁载体系统的底物依赖性调节。重要的是，铁铬促进光生物生长，独立于细胞外铁的还原，表明直接利用。这些发现提供了地衣共生中铁载体介导的铁获取的功能证据，并强调铁铬作为互利养分交换的关键介质。

title: L-type pyocins inhibit the BAM complex to kill without cell entry
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Many antibiotics are ineffective against the Gram-negative pathogen Pseudomonas aeruginosa because of intrinsic defence mechanisms, such as the impermeable bacterial outer membrane. Here, we show that protein antibiotics called L-type pyocins kill P. aeruginosa by inhibiting the β-barrel assembly machinery (BAM) complex at the cell surface, halting outer-membrane protein assembly. Using single-particle cryo-electron microscopy, we show that L-type pyocins bind a surface-exposed region of BamA and deploy a C-terminal peptide that competitively inhibits the BAM complex, demonstrating that cell entry is not required for antibiotic activity. We combine genetics, multi-omics and cryo-electron tomography to show that BAM complex inhibition by L-type pyocins or the cyclic-peptide antibiotic, darobactin, triggers a multifaceted transcriptomic, proteomic, and morphological response. BAM inhibition ultimately leads to a catastrophic loss of membrane integrity and cell death. These results validate BAM as a target for antibiotics that do not enter the cell and define an engineerable system for their development.
title_zh: L 型脓毒素抑制 BAM 复合物在不进入细胞的情况下杀死细胞
abstract_zh: 由于内在的防御机制，例如不可渗透的细菌外膜，许多抗生素对革兰氏阴性病原体铜绿假单胞菌无效。在这里，我们发现称为 L 型脓毒素的蛋白质抗生素通过抑制细胞表面的 β-桶组装机器 (BAM) 复合物、停止外膜蛋白质组装来杀死铜绿假单胞菌。使用单颗粒冷冻电子显微镜，我们发现 L 型脓毒素结合 BamA 的表面暴露区域，并部署竞争性抑制 BAM 复合物的 C 端肽，证明抗生素活性不需要进入细胞。我们将遗传学、多组学和冷冻电子断层扫描相结合，证明 L 型脓毒菌素或环肽抗生素达罗巴汀对 BAM 复合物的抑制会引发多方面的转录组、蛋白质组和形态学反应。 BAM 抑制最终会导致膜完整性的灾难性丧失和细胞死亡。这些结果验证了 BAM 作为不进入细胞的抗生素的靶标，并为其开发定义了一个可工程系统。

title: Field angle-independent high magnetoresistance and field angle-dependent coercivity in Fe3GaTe2/Phosphorus all-van der Waals spin valves at room temperature
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) spin valves are important for energy-efficient memory and computation devices but remain limited in achieving high magnetoresistance (MR) ratios at room temperature due to the lack of suitable ferromagnetic materials, optimal spin transport channel spacers, and great challenges in atom-level interface control in heterostructures. Here we report a record room temperature MR up to 103% for all-van der Waals (vdW) heterostructures by employing vdW ferromagnetic Fe3GaTe2 (FGaT) electrodes with vdW monoelemental black or violet phosphorus spacers. Notably, these devices exhibit magnetic field angle-independent MR while retaining anisotropic coercivity. This behavior originates from domain wall motion-driven magnetization reversal and the strong perpendicular magnetic anisotropy of the FGaT. First‑principles transport calculations reveal an intrinsic zero‑bias MR of up to 330% at the Fermi level for ideal interfaces and a monolayer spacer, supporting the high spin‑polarized transport capability of these heterostructures. The experimental room temperature MR is lower due to finite bias, temperature, spacer thickness, and realistic interface conditions. These results demonstrate the potential of 2D vdW monoelemental phosphorus as a high-efficiency spin-transport channel in room temperature all-vdW spin valves and provide a framework for designing field-orientation-resilient non-volatile spintronic memory devices.
title_zh: 室温下 Fe3GaTe2/磷全范德华自旋阀中与场角无关的高磁阻和与场角相关的矫顽力
abstract_zh: 二维（2D）自旋阀对于节能存储和计算设备非常重要，但由于缺乏合适的铁磁材料、最佳自旋传输通道间隔物以及异质结构中原子级界面控制的巨大挑战，在室温下实现高磁阻（MR）比方面仍然受到限制。在这里，我们报告了通过使用带有 vdW 单元素黑或紫磷间隔物的 vdW 铁磁 Fe3GaTe2 (FGaT) 电极，全范德华 (vdW) 异质结构的室温 MR 高达 103%。值得注意的是，这些器件表现出与磁场角度无关的磁阻，同时保留各向异性矫顽力。这种行为源于畴壁运动驱动的磁化反转和 FGaT 的强垂直磁各向异性。第一原理输运计算揭示了理想界面和单层间隔物在费米能级上高达 330% 的固有零偏压 MR，支持这些异质结构的高自旋极化输运能力。由于有限的偏置、温度、间隔物厚度和实际的界面条件，实验室温 MR 较低。这些结果证明了二维 vdW 单元素磷作为室温全 vdW 自旋阀中高效自旋输运通道的潜力，并为设计场取向弹性非易失性自旋电子存储器件提供了框架。

title: Structure-guided reprogramming of DELLA turnover for a sustainable Green Revolution in rice
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The Green Revolution of the 1960s significantly boosted cereal yields but incurred substantial environmental costs due to overreliance on chemical fertilizer inputs; thus, future agricultural sustainability demands improved nitrogen-use efficiency (NUE). The semi-dwarf Green Revolution varieties (GRVs) characterized by elevated DELLA protein accumulation introduce a fundamental trade-off, increasing lodging resistance and harvest index at the expense of diminished biomass and grain productivity per plant, and require high nitrogen fertilizer inputs to achieve maximum yield potential under high planting density. Here we show that gibberellin (GA)-bound GA-INSENSITIVE DWARF1 (GID1) induces multi-level conformational changes in DELLA protein, affecting its N-terminal DELLA and VHYN/DPT/S and C-terminal VVLV and SAW motifs, thereby facilitating recognition by the SKP1-CULLIN-F-box (SCF) ubiquitin ligase complex and subsequent proteasomal degradation. We also performed structure-guided engineering of the rice SLENDER RICE1 (SLR1)-GID1-GID2 complex and created a series of dwarf alleles exhibiting a continuous spectrum of plant heights in elite cultivars. Notably, the dominant alleles slr1Y94A and slr1Y580A achieved superior yield and enhanced NUE over conventional sd1-containing GRVs. Reprogramming DELLA turnover thus enables to break the long-standing trade-off between high yield and fertilizer dependency, offering a strategy toward a more sustainable and productive Green Revolution.
title_zh: 结构引导的 DELLA 营业额重新编程，实现水稻可持续绿色革命
abstract_zh: 20世纪60年代的绿色革命显着提高了谷物产量，但由于过度依赖化肥投入而造成了巨大的环境成本；因此，未来农业的可持续发展需要提高氮肥利用效率（NUE）。以 DELLA 蛋白质积累增加为特征的半矮化绿色革命品种 (GRV) 引入了根本性的权衡，以降低单株生物量和谷物生产力为代价，提高抗倒伏性和收获指数，并且需要高氮肥投入才能在高种植密度下实现最大产量潜力。在这里，我们发现赤霉素（GA）结合的GA-INSENSITIVE DWARF1（GID1）诱导DELLA蛋白的多级构象变化，影响其N端DELLA和VHYN/DPT/S以及C端VVLV和SAW基序，从而促进SKP1-CULLIN-F-box（SCF）泛素连接酶复合物的识别和随后的蛋白酶体降解。我们还对水稻 SLENDER RICE1 (SLR1)-GID1-GID2 复合体进行了结构引导工程，并创建了一系列矮化等位基因，在优良品种中表现出连续的株高谱。值得注意的是，与传统的含有 sd1 的 GRV 相比，显性等位基因 slr1Y94A 和 slr1Y580A 实现了更高的产量和更高的 NUE。因此，重新规划 DELLA 营业额能够打破高产与化肥依赖之间长期存在的权衡，为实现更加可持续和高效的绿色革命提供战略。

title: 250 years of promise
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: America has for its entire history been fascinated with science. Although the lofty ideals associated with establishing the country have mostly to do with personal liberty and equality, the founders were very aware of the importance of new knowledge, and scientific knowledge, in particular. Benjamin Franklin perhaps best exemplified the broad curiosity about both principles of the natural world and the ideals of political philosophy when forging the foundation of a new democracy, and New England was already home to private universities before the Revolution. In the South, public universities were created concomitantly with the formation of the country, first in Georgia and North Carolina, and then in Virginia where Thomas Jefferson devoted his post-presidency to a new institution in Charlottesville. Although these establishments were partly dedicated to training clergy, they were not divorced from science. Jefferson had become an admirer of the chemist Antoine-Laurent Lavoisier while in France and directed the construction of a chemistry laboratory in the basement of the University of Virginia rotunda. At the same time, Elisha Mitchell, a geologist and minister, became president of the University of North Carolina. These universities were revered by America’s founders. President James Madison said that “learned institutions ought to be favored objects with every free people.”
title_zh: 250年的承诺
abstract_zh: 美国在其整个历史上一直对科学着迷。尽管建国的崇高理想主要与个人自由和平等有关，但创始人们非常清楚新知识，特别是科学知识的重要性。本杰明·富兰克林也许是在奠定新民主基础时对自然世界原则和政治哲学理想的广泛好奇心的最佳例证，而新英格兰在革命之前就已经是私立大学的所在地。在南方，公立大学是随着国家的形成而建立的，首先是在佐治亚州和北卡罗来纳州，然后是在弗吉尼亚州，托马斯·杰斐逊在卸任总统后在夏洛茨维尔建立了一个新机构。尽管这些机构部分致力于培训神职人员，但它们并没有脱离科学。杰斐逊在法国期间成为化学家安托万·洛朗·拉瓦锡的崇拜者，并指导在弗吉尼亚大学圆形大厅的地下室建造了一个化学实验室。与此同时，地质学家兼部长伊丽莎·米切尔（Elisha Mitchell）成为北卡罗来纳大学校长。这些大学受到美国开国元勋的推崇。詹姆斯·麦迪逊总统说，“学术机构应该成为每个自由人民青睐的对象。”

title: Alternating atomic-dipole layers and switching dynamics in Al1-xScxN ferroelectrics
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Wurtzite Al
                    1-x
                    Sc
                    x
                    N ferroelectrics exhibit exceptional polarization and thermal stability, making them highly promising for a wide range of electronic applications. However, a more profound understanding is required regarding the atomic-scale mechanism through which cation substitution lowers the switching energy barrier and thus reduces the coercive field. We used spherical aberration–corrected transmission electron microscopy to reveal a periodic modulation of cation-anion spacing along the polarization direction, forming alternating atomic dipole layers. This modulation arises from energetically favorable chemical ordering of aluminum and scandium atoms between adjacent layers, with layer-resolved asymmetry in atomic arrangement. In situ imaging directly captures atomic-scale, noncollective, stepwise polarization switching, revealing intermediate states and local spacing fluctuations. Compositional inhomogeneity in these dipole layers creates multiple transient states that reduce the switching energy barrier. Our findings connect atomic-scale dipole structures to polarization switching kinetics, enabling the rational design of wurtzite ferroelectrics.
title_zh: Al1-xScxN 铁电体中交替原子偶极层和开关动力学
abstract_zh:
纤锌矿铝
                    1-x
                    钪
                    x
                    N铁电体表现出优异的极化和热稳定性，使其在广泛的电子应用中极具前景。然而，需要对原子尺度机制有更深刻的理解，通过该机制，阳离子取代降低了开关能垒，从而降低了矫顽力场。我们使用球差校正透射电子显微镜揭示了沿偏振方向的阳离子-阴离子间距的周期性调制，形成交替的原子偶极子层。这种调制源于相邻层之间铝和钪原子的能量上有利的化学排序，以及原子排列中层分辨的不对称性。原位成像直接捕获原子尺度、非集体、逐步偏振切换，揭示中间态和局部间距波动。这些偶极子层的成分不均匀性会产生多种瞬态，从而降低开关能垒。我们的研究结果将原子级偶极子结构与极化切换动力学联系起来，从而能够合理设计纤锌矿铁电体。

title: A sub–10-millisecond neural dynamical system based on phase-change memristors
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
High-fidelity geometry for physical-world modeling demands real-time, dense, and differentiable deformation fields on manifolds. Neural dynamical systems (NDSs) using adaptive stepsize integration with embedded neural networks excel at these tasks but still suffer latency on the order of hundreds of milliseconds. In this work, we report a sub–10-millisecond NDS hardware leveraging the precisely controlled conductance drift of phase-change memristors and their multilevel compute-in-memory capabilities. We fabricated a 40-nanometer NDS chip for the challenging surface reconstruction tasks. Compared with state-of-the-art NDS hardware, our NDS design achieves a latency of 2.12 milliseconds (below 10 milliseconds) for single-iteration NDS computations with an error tolerance of 10
                    −7
                    and delivers 3.82× to 36.27× faster speed while consuming 11.75× to 24.73× less power. The end-to-end NDS latency through hardware measurements and simulations outperformed graphics processing unit A100 by 50.38× to 478.18×.
title_zh: 基于相变忆阻器的亚 10 毫秒神经动力系统
abstract_zh:
用于物理世界建模的高保真几何需要流形上的实时、密集且可微的变形场。使用自适应步长集成与嵌入式神经网络的神经动力系统（NDS）在这些任务中表现出色，但仍然存在数百毫秒数量级的延迟。在这项工作中，我们报告了一种亚 10 毫秒的 NDS 硬件，它利用相变忆阻器的精确控制电导漂移及其多级内存计算功能。我们制造了 40 纳米 NDS 芯片，用于执行具有挑战性的表面重建任务。与最先进的 NDS 硬件相比，我们的 NDS 设计实现了单次 NDS 计算的延迟为 2.12 毫秒（低于 10 毫秒），容错率为 10
                    −7
                    速度提高 3.82 倍至 36.27 倍，同时功耗降低 11.75 倍至 24.73 倍。通过硬件测量和模拟得出的端到端 NDS 延迟优于图形处理单元 A100 50.38 倍至 478.18 倍。

title: Height does not impair the hydraulic system of the tallest tropical Dipterocarp trees
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Half of the aboveground biomass in forests is stored in a disproportionately small number of very tall trees. These giants are predicted to be more vulnerable to drought-induced damage because height impairs their hydraulic system. We evaluated whether the hydraulic system of world’s tallest tropical tree species—Southeast Asian dipterocarps—are negatively affected by their height. The more negative xylem pressures caused by tree height were fully compensated for through adjustment of vessel anatomy and leaf hydraulic traits, and the trees suffered no height-related loss in growth during a severe drought. Therefore, height does not make the hydraulic systems of the world’s tallest tropical tree species more vulnerable to drought, and the growth rates of these trees are not more negatively affected by drought than are their smaller counterparts.
title_zh: 高度不会损害最高的热带龙脑香树的液压系统
abstract_zh: 森林中一半的地上生物量储存在数量极少的高大树木中。预计这些巨型植物更容易受到干旱引起的损害，因为高度会损害它们的液压系统。我们评估了世界上最高的热带树种——东南亚龙脑香树——的水力系统是否受到其高度的负面影响。通过调整导管解剖结构和叶片水力特性，可以充分补偿由树高引起的木质部负压，并且在严重干旱期间，树木没有遭受与高度相关的生长损失。因此，高度并不会使世界上最高的热带树种的水力系统更容易受到干旱的影响，而且这些树的生长速度也不会比较小的树种更容易受到干旱的负面影响。

title: Observation of disorder-free localization using a (2+1)D lattice gauge theory on a quantum processor
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Disorder-induced phenomena in quantum many-body systems pose a challenge for analytical and numerical approaches at relevant time and system scales. To reduce the cost of disorder sampling, we investigated quantum circuits initialized in states that form tunable superpositions over all disorder configurations, which in lattice gauge theories can be interpreted as superpositions over gauge sectors. On the experimentally accessible timescales, we observed localization in the absence of disorder in one and two dimensions: Perturbations failed to diffuse despite fully disorder-free evolution and initial states. However, entropy measurements revealed that superposition-prepared states fundamentally differ from those obtained by direct disorder sampling. Leveraging superposition, we propose an algorithm with a polynomial speedup in sampling disorder configurations, a long-standing challenge in many-body localization studies.
title_zh: 在量子处理器上使用 (2+1)D 晶格规范理论观察无序定位
abstract_zh: 量子多体系统中的无序诱发现象对相关时间和系统尺度的分析和数值方法提出了挑战。为了降低无序采样的成本，我们研究了在所有无序配置上形成可调叠加的状态下初始化的量子电路，这在晶格规范理论中可以解释为规范扇区上的叠加。在实验可访问的时间尺度上，我们观察到在一维和二维没有无序的情况下的局域化：尽管完全无序进化和初始状态，扰动未能扩散。然而，熵测量表明，叠加准备的状态与直接无序采样获得的状态根本不同。利用叠加，我们提出了一种在采样无序配置中具有多项式加速的算法，这是多体定位研究中长期存在的挑战。

title: Fruit flies actively restart their circadian clock by proactively shaping their environment
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Circadian clocks provide adaptive advantages, enabling organisms to adjust their physiology and behavior to daily environmental changes on Earth. Here, we show that fruit flies prefer a temporally organized life. Because of light-induced degradation of the core circadian clock protein Timeless, constant illumination stops the circadian clock and leads to arrhythmic locomotor activity. When given the choice to move between dark and illuminated areas in a constant light environment, flies were able to maintain, or even regain, rhythmic behavioral patterns. These self-inflicted rhythms were accompanied by molecular rhythms in clock neurons known to drive behavioral rhythms. Behavioral rhythmicity was correlated with improved sleep quality compared with that of arrhythmic flies, demonstrating an immediate benefit of choosing to live under circadian clock control.
title_zh: 果蝇通过主动塑造环境来积极重启生物钟
abstract_zh: 昼夜节律时钟提供了适应性优势，使生物体能够根据地球上的日常环境变化调整其生理和行为。在这里，我们表明果蝇更喜欢有时间组织的生活。由于光诱导核心生物钟蛋白 Timeless 降解，持续照明会使生物钟停止并导致心律失常的运动活动。当果蝇选择在恒定的光照环境中在黑暗和照明区域之间移动时，它们能够保持甚至恢复有节奏的行为模式。这些自我造成的节律伴随着已知驱动行为节律的时钟神经元中的分子节律。与心律不齐的果蝇相比，行为节律性与睡眠质量的改善相关，这表明选择在生物钟控制下生活有直接的好处。

title: A dietary switch promotes sensory neuron–dependent cancer-associated cachexia
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Sickness behaviors are common in cancer-associated cachexia and affect up to half of lung cancer patients. We demonstrate that among the most common cancer mutations, loss of liver kinase B1 (
                    Lkb1
                    ) promotes the development of cachexia in preclinical models of lung cancer. In an effort to improve caloric intake with an obesogenic high-fat diet, we paradoxically observed worsened cachexia-associated sickness. We found that local production of prostaglandin E2 (PGE
                    2
                    ), rather than circulating factors, promotes sickness and that genetic, dietary, and pharmacological inhibition of tumor-derived PGE
                    2
                    suppresses sickness and cachexia. Notably, we demonstrate that lung sensory neuron abrogation prevents PGE
                    2
                    -dependent cachexia. Our study establishes localized tumor-derived signals to sensory neurons, rather than circulating factors, as drivers of cachexia and highlights a previously unknown role of the peripheral nervous system in cancer cachexia.
title_zh: 饮食改变会促进感觉神经元依赖性癌症相关恶病质
abstract_zh:
疾病行为在癌症相关恶病质中很常见，影响多达一半的肺癌患者。我们证明，在最常见的癌症突变中，肝激酶 B1 的缺失（
                    Lkb1
                    ）促进肺癌临床前模型中恶病质的发展。为了通过致胖的高脂肪饮食来改善热量摄入，我们矛盾地观察到与恶病质相关的疾病恶化。我们发现本地生产的前列腺素 E2 (PGE
                    2
                    ），而不是循环因素，会促进疾病，并且遗传、饮食和药理学抑制肿瘤衍生的 PGE
                    2
                    抑制疾病和恶病质。值得注意的是，我们证明肺感觉神经元消除可以预防 PGE
                    2
                    依赖性恶病质。我们的研究确定了感觉神经元的局部肿瘤衍生信号，而不是循环因子，作为恶病质的驱动因素，并强调了周围神经系统在癌症恶病质中以前未知的作用。

title: Surface immune signaling unlocks NLR activation through mRNA alternative splicing
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Plants activate pattern-triggered immunity (PTI) and effector-triggered immunity (ETI) to combat pathogens. However, how these systems coordinate immune activation while preventing autoimmunity remains poorly understood. In this study, we uncovered a regulatory mechanism in which surface immune signaling unlocks nucleotide-binding leucine-rich repeat (NLR) immune receptor activation through mRNA splicing. We identified an N-terminal prodomain in the potato late blight resistance protein Rpi-vnt1.1 that inhibits resistosome formation, preventing potential autoactivation of this NLR. Upon pathogen perception, PTI signaling induced alternative splicing of Rpi-vnt1.1 mRNA, removing this inhibitory element. This primed Rpi-vnt1.1 for activation by the
                    Phytophthora infestans
                    effector AVRvnt1, enabling resistosome assembly and immune signaling. The widespread conservation of N-terminal extensions in coiled coil–type NLRs points to a common regulatory mechanism in preventing potential autoactivation while preserving pathogen sensitivity.
title_zh: 表面免疫信号通过 mRNA 选择性剪接解锁 NLR 激活
abstract_zh:
植物激活模式触发免疫（PTI）和效应触发免疫（ETI）来对抗病原体。然而，这些系统如何在预防自身免疫的同时协调免疫激活仍知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们发现了一种调节机制，其中表面免疫信号通过 mRNA 剪接解锁核苷酸结合富含亮氨酸重复序列 (NLR) 免疫受体的激活。我们在马铃薯晚疫病抗性蛋白 Rpi-vnt1.1 中发现了一个 N 末端前结构域，它可以抑制抗性体的形成，从而防止该 NLR 的潜在自动激活。在病原体感知后，PTI 信号传导诱导 Rpi-vnt1.1 mRNA 的选择性剪接，从而消除这种抑制元件。这为 Rpi-vnt1.1 的激活做好了准备
                    马铃薯晚疫病
                    效应子 AVRvnt1，实现抗性体组装和免疫信号传导。卷曲线圈型 NLR 中 N 端延伸的广泛保守性表明了一种共同的调节机制，可以防止潜在的自动激活，同时保持病原体敏感性。

title: Orbital magnetoresistance in the antiferromagnet CoO driven by dynamic orbital angular momentum
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Recent predictions of orders of magnitude larger orbital current effects compared with spin currents have attracted considerable interest. However, orbital currents must first be converted into spin currents to interact with the static magnetization dominated by spin angular momentum in conventional magnets. By using a magnet dominated by orbital angular momentum (OAM), we demonstrate a 70-fold enhancement in orbital Hall magnetoresistance in cobalt II oxide/copper (CoO/Cu*), compared with spin Hall magnetoresistance in cobalt II oxide/platinum (CoO/Pt). This arises from interactions between dynamic OAM from surface-oxidized Cu* and static OAM in the antiferromagnetic insulator CoO. Our results show how by using OAM-dominated materials, we can harness the benefits of giant orbital currents that have not been possible using conventional spin-dominated magnets.
title_zh: 动态轨道角动量驱动的反铁磁体 CoO 中的轨道磁阻
abstract_zh: 最近关于轨道电流效应比自旋电流大几个数量级的预测引起了人们极大的兴趣。然而，轨道电流必须首先转换为自旋电流，以与传统磁体中由自旋角动量主导的静态磁化强度相互作用。通过使用以轨道角动量 (OAM) 为主的磁体，我们证明了二氧化钴/铜 (CoO/Cu*) 中的轨道霍尔磁阻比二氧化钴/铂 (CoO/Pt) 中的自旋霍尔磁阻增强了 70 倍。这是由表面氧化 Cu* 的动态 OAM 与反铁磁绝缘体 CoO 中的静态 OAM 之间的相互作用引起的。我们的结果表明，通过使用 OAM 主导的材料，我们可以利用传统的自旋主导磁体无法实现的巨大轨道电流的优势。

title: Analytical modeling for suction cup designs for skin-interfaced wearable devices
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Stable mounting is a central requirement for skin-interfaced wearable biomedical devices, because accurate and long-term measurements with clinical utility typically demand intimate contact with the skin, whereas practical use also requires gentle removal to minimize skin irritation and damage. Existing mounting strategies often struggle to satisfy these competing requirements simultaneously, especially under prolonged wear or in the presence of sweat and moisture. Suction-based mounting has recently emerged as a promising alternative because it can provide strong, reversible, and adhesive-free attachment, yet its underlying mechanics remain insufficiently understood. Here, we establish analytical models for the deformation and force of suction cups in a fully explicit form, covering both the cone suction cup and an optimized ring suction cup design. Unlike previous approaches that rely on indirect quantities such as the pressure difference and contact radius, which are not available before experiments and therefore cannot serve as controllable design variables, the present framework yields direct relations between suction performance and geometry parameters, material properties, and loading conditions, including the maximum push down displacement and the subsequent pull up displacement. The resulting formulas agree closely with accurate numerical solutions and lead to compact scaling laws that clearly identify how geometry and material parameters govern suction performance. These results provide a quantitative and physically transparent foundation for the design of suction-based mounting strategies in wearable devices.
title_zh: 皮肤界面可穿戴设备吸盘设计的分析建模
abstract_zh: 稳定的安装是皮肤界面可穿戴生物医学设备的核心要求，因为临床应用中的准确和长期测量通常需要与皮肤紧密接触，而实际使用还需要轻轻移除，以尽量减少皮肤刺激和损伤。现有的安装策略通常难以同时满足这些相互竞争的要求，特别是在长时间佩戴或存在汗水和湿气的情况下。基于吸力的安装最近已成为一种有前途的替代方案，因为它可以提供坚固、可逆且无粘合剂的附着，但其基本机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们以完全明确的形式建立了吸盘变形和力的分析模型，涵盖锥形吸盘和优化的环形吸盘设计。与之前依赖于实验前无法获得的间接量（例如压力差和接触半径）的方法不同，因此不能作为可控设计变量，本框架产生吸力性能与几何参数、材料特性和负载条件（包括最大下推位移和随后的上拉位移）之间的直接关系。由此产生的公式与精确的数值解非常吻合，并得出紧凑的比例定律，可以清楚地识别几何形状和材料参数如何控制吸力性能。这些结果为吸力设计提供了定量和物理透明的基础

title: Fatty acid regulation and phosphatidylethanolamine biosynthesis are important for hepatitis E virus replication
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Hepatitis E virus (HEV), a leading cause of viral hepatitis globally, is associated with adverse outcomes during pregnancy. Despite its clinical significance, the mechanisms driving enhanced HEV replication during pregnancy remain poorly understood. In this study, we uncover a lipid-mediated pathway that facilitates HEV replication, with potential implications for pregnancy-associated pathogenesis. Lipidomic profiling reveals a marked upregulation of oleic acid during HEV infection in both human liver cells and in HEV-3ra-infected pregnant rabbits. We showed that oleic acid significantly enhances HEV replication, possibly through interaction with a predicted fatty acid–binding domain (FABD) located within the papain-like cysteine protease region of the HEV ORF1 polyprotein. We further demonstrated that phosphatidylethanolamine (PE) levels are elevated during HEV-3ra infection in pregnant rabbits, and that inhibition of PE biosynthesis by CRISPR/Cas9-mediated knockdown and silencing of phosphatidylserine decarboxylase/phosphoethanolamine cytidylyltransferase genes that are responsible for PE synthesis resulted in decreased HEV replication, indicating that PE is important for HEV replication. Additionally, we found that placental lactogen hormone, which is elevated during late pregnancy, stimulated fatty acid accumulation and potentiated HEV replication, therefore providing a potential explanation for pregnancy-associated adverse outcomes. Collectively, our findings reveal an important role of host lipid metabolism in HEV replication and offer mechanistic insights into lipid-dependent enhancement of HEV replication and a potential role of lipid reprogramming in HEV pathogenesis. The results may inform potential future anti-HEV therapeutic strategies targeting lipid pathways.
title_zh: 脂肪酸调节和磷脂酰乙醇胺生物合成对于戊型肝炎病毒复制很重要
abstract_zh: 戊型肝炎病毒 (HEV) 是全球病毒性肝炎的主要原因，与妊娠期间的不良后果相关。尽管具有临床意义，但妊娠期间驱动 HEV 复制增强的机制仍知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们发现了一种促进 HEV 复制的脂质介导途径，对妊娠相关发病机制具有潜在影响。脂质组学分析显示，在人肝细胞和感染 HEV-3ra 的怀孕兔子中，HEV 感染期间油酸显着上调。我们发现，油酸可能通过与位于 HEV ORF1 多蛋白的木瓜蛋白酶样半胱氨酸蛋白酶区域内的预测脂肪酸结合域 (FABD) 相互作用，显着增强 HEV 复制。我们进一步证明，怀孕兔感染HEV-3ra期间磷脂酰乙醇胺（PE）水平升高，并且通过CRISPR/Cas9介导的敲低和沉默负责PE合成的磷脂酰丝氨酸脱羧酶/磷酸乙醇胺胞苷酰转移酶基因来抑制PE生物合成，导致HEV复制减少，表明PE对HEV复制很重要。此外，我们发现胎盘催乳激素在妊娠后期升高，刺激脂肪酸积累并增强 HEV 复制，因此为妊娠相关不良后果提供了可能的解释。总的来说，我们的研究结果揭示了宿主脂质代谢在 HEV 复制中的重要作用，并提供了脂质代谢的机制见解。

title: Inferring epidemiological parameters under an infectious phylogeography model with visitor dynamics
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: During an outbreak, infectious disease can spread among populations through host movement, potentially fueling local outbreaks with their own epidemiological dynamics. However, it is difficult to know how often infections between populations are transmitted by diseased travelers infecting healthy residents when abroad, rather than by diseased residents infecting healthy travelers, who later return home with the new pathogen. In this paper, we introduce a phylogeographic model where pathogens spread through visitor dynamics, whereby hosts visit other populations through short trips before returning home. To do so, we used the stationary properties of an epidemiological compartment model with visitor dynamics to construct an approximation that is statistically accurate and computationally tractable for phylogenetic modeling. In addition, we derive mathematical properties for the approximating model that provide a sufficient condition under which the approximation remains accurate. We applied our model to empirical infection data and travel statistics from the European SARS-CoV-2 pandemic. Inference under our model suggests that, in the early stages of the outbreak, SARS-CoV-2 was more often “pulled” into the home countries of returning travelers than “pushed” into foreign countries by visitors from abroad. Estimates of host movement-related parameter values under our visitor model suggest that alternative migration models, with trips of indefinite length, may underestimate the magnitude of outbreaks caused by visitors. This study emphasizes the importance of carefully incorporating host movement dynamics into such models.
title_zh: 利用访客动态推断传染性系统发育地理学模型下的流行病学参数
abstract_zh: 在疫情爆发期间，传染病可以通过宿主的移动在人群中传播，从而可能以其自身的流行病学动态加剧当地的疫情爆发。然而，很难知道人群之间感染的传播频率是由患病旅行者在国外感染健康居民，还是由患病居民感染健康旅行者，后者随后携带新病原体回国。在本文中，我们介绍了一种系统发育地理学模型，其中病原体通过访客动态传播，宿主通过短途旅行访问其他种群，然后返回家园。为此，我们使用流行病学区室模型的平稳特性和访客动态来构建一个近似值，该近似值在统计上准确且计算上易于处理，可用于系统发育建模。此外，我们推导了近似模型的数学属性，为近似保持准确提供了充分的条件。我们将我们的模型应用于欧洲 SARS-CoV-2 大流行的经验感染数据和旅行统计数据。根据我们的模型推断，在疫情爆发的早期阶段，SARS-CoV-2 更多时候是被回国旅客“拉”到本国，而不是被国外旅客“推”到国外。我们的访客模型下对宿主移动相关参数值的估计表明，行程长度不确定的替代迁移模型可能会低估访客引起的疫情爆发的严重程度。这项研究强调了仔细纳入的重要性

title: Inhibitory potential of autologous neutralizing antibodies sets quantitative limits on the rebound-competent HIV-1 reservoir
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
HIV-1 cure requires preventing viral rebound after treatment interruption, but quantitative criteria defining the rebound-competent reservoir are lacking. We studied individuals undergoing observational treatment interruption without confounding interventions to identify virologic and immunologic determinants of rebound. In 9 of 13 participants, rebound viruses were genetically identical or similar to proviruses in circulating resting CD4
                    +
                    T-cells. We found no evidence of recombination among rebound sequences. Instead, resistance to autologous neutralizing antibodies (aNAbs) was a critical determinant of viral rebound. Increased suppression of viral outgrowth by contemporaneous IgG isolated from plasma was correlated with longer time to rebound. Using inhibitory potential (
                    IP
                    ), the log reduction in single-round infection at physiologic IgG concentrations, we defined quantitative limits governing rebound-competency with respect to contemporaneous aNAbs. Contemporaneous IgG antibodies inhibited different reservoir variants with a wide range of
                    IP
                    values (0.4 to 8.2 logs), whereas rebound viruses were minimally inhibited (0.5 to 2.8 logs), indicating that inhibition by even up to 2.8 logs (631-fold) cannot prevent rebound. Longitudinal analyses revealed that waning aNAb potency over time on antiretroviral therapy (ART) allows previously neutralized variants to gain rebound potential, consistent with the finding that rebound can come from variants deposited in the reservoir at different pre-ART time points. Thus, rebound competency is a dynamic, immune-governed property defined by quantitative immunologic constraints, including those exerted by aNAbs.
title_zh: 自体中和抗体的抑制潜力对具有反弹能力的 HIV-1 储存库设定了定量限制
abstract_zh:
HIV-1 治愈需要防止治疗中断后病毒反弹，但缺乏定义有反弹能力的病毒库的定量标准。我们研究了接受观察性治疗中断且没有混杂干预措施的个体，以确定反弹的病毒学和免疫学决定因素。 13 名参与者中有 9 名的反弹病毒在基因上与循环静息 CD4 中的原病毒相同或相似
